Description: Discrepancy report of Canceled Device Plans with Active Installment String status. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH cancelled_gd AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
          client_acct_id                         AS c_client_id
        , msisdn                                 AS c_msisdn
        , inst_id                                AS c_inst_id
        , general_device_aria_instance_no        AS c_gd_instance_no
        , general_device_plan_status             AS c_gd_status
        , inst_status                            AS c_inst_status
        , general_device_oli_id                  AS c_general_device_oli_id
        , TRY_CAST(general_device_plan_status_date AS DATE) AS c_gd_status_date
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_hierarchy_all_status_reverse
    WHERE COALESCE(acct_status, 'Active') = 'Active'
      AND COALESCE(master_plan_status, 'Active') = 'Active'
      AND general_device_plan_status like '%Canceled%'
),
active_gd AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
          client_acct_id                         AS a_client_id
        , msisdn                                 AS a_msisdn
        , inst_id                                AS a_inst_id
        , general_device_aria_instance_no        AS a_gd_instance_no
        , general_device_plan_status             AS a_gd_status
        , inst_status                            AS a_inst_status
        , general_device_oli_id                  AS a_general_device_oli_id
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_hierarchy_all_status_reverse
    WHERE COALESCE(acct_status, 'Active') = 'Active'
      AND COALESCE(master_plan_status, 'Active') = 'Active'
      AND COALESCE(group_plan_status, 'Active') = 'Active'
      AND COALESCE(rate_plan_status,  'Active') = 'Active'
      AND general_device_plan_status like '%Active%'
),
combined_data AS (
    SELECT
        c.*,
        a.a_client_id,
        a.a_msisdn,
        a.a_inst_id,
        a.a_gd_instance_no,
        a.a_gd_status,
        a.a_inst_status,
        a.a_general_device_oli_id
    FROM cancelled_gd c
    LEFT JOIN active_gd a
        ON  a.a_client_id = c.c_client_id
        AND a.a_msisdn    = c.c_msisdn
        AND a.a_inst_id   = c.c_inst_id
)
SELECT
    'DQ-0000164' AS dq_no,
    *
FROM combined_data
WHERE c_inst_status = 'PAID'
  AND a_inst_id IS NOT NULL;

Description: Discrepancy report to Ensure duplicate promotions (service credits) are not applied for the same instalment id (device)​. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH vw_lla_recurr AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_lla_recurr_credits_installment
    WHERE credit_status = 'Credits Created, Incomplete'
      AND COALESCE(NULLIF(UPPER(TRIM(service_number)), 'NULL'), '') <> ''
      AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(installment_id), ''), 'NULL') <> 'NULL'
),

vw_lla_rpt AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod"."vw_lla_credit_rpt_installment"
    WHERE reason_category <> 'Courtesy Credit'
      AND applied_to = ''
),

-- Count how many times each rec_credit_number appears in RPT
rpt_dups AS (
    SELECT
        recurring_credit_number       AS rec_credit_number,
        COUNT(*)                       AS rpt_count
    FROM vw_lla_rpt
    GROUP BY recurring_credit_number
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
),

-- Join recurr + rpt + dup logic
base AS (
    SELECT
        vw.*,
        rpt.credit_number,
        md.bill_day,
        d.rpt_count
    FROM vw_lla_recurr vw
    LEFT JOIN vw_lla_rpt rpt
        ON vw.rec_credit_number = rpt.recurring_credit_number
       AND vw.installment_id   = rpt.installment_id
    LEFT JOIN "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_masterplan_details md
        ON md.client_acct_id = vw.ban_can
    INNER JOIN rpt_dups d
        ON vw.rec_credit_number = d.rec_credit_number
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_ariafinal_all
        WHERE aria_instance_no = vw.plan_instance_number
          AND plan_status = 'Active'
    )
)

SELECT
    'DQ-0000159' AS dq_no,
    plan_instance_id,
    CONCAT('Installment Id: ', installment_id) AS installment_id,

    array_join(
        array_distinct(array_agg(ban_can ORDER BY created_date DESC)),
        ', '
    ) AS ban_can,

    array_join(
        array_distinct(array_agg(credit_number ORDER BY created_date DESC)),
        ', '
    ) AS credit_number,

    array_join(
        array_distinct(array_agg(rec_credit_number ORDER BY created_date DESC)),
        ', '
    ) AS rec_credit_number,

    array_join(
        array_distinct(array_agg(bill_day ORDER BY created_date DESC)),
        ', '
    ) AS bill_day,

    LISTAGG(created_date, ', ')       WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY created_date DESC) AS created_date,
    LISTAGG(first_credit_date, ', ')  WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY created_date DESC) AS first_credit_date,
    LISTAGG(last_credit_date, ', ')   WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY created_date DESC) AS last_credit_date,
    LISTAGG(next_credit_date, ', ')   WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY created_date DESC) AS next_credit_date,
    LISTAGG(CAST(credits_remaining AS VARCHAR), ', ')
        WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY created_date DESC) AS credits_remaining,
    LISTAGG(credit_status, ', ')
        WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY created_date DESC) AS credit_status,
    LISTAGG(cancel_date, ', ')
        WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY created_date DESC) AS cancel_date,
    LISTAGG(canceled_user, ', ')
        WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY created_date DESC) AS canceled_user,
    LISTAGG(comments, ' -| | |- ')
        WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY created_date DESC) AS comments,
    LISTAGG(CAST(plan_instance_number AS VARCHAR), ', ')
        WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY created_date DESC) AS plan_instance_number,
    LISTAGG(service_number, ', ')
        WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY created_date DESC) AS service_number,
    LISTAGG(service_id, ', ')
        WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY created_date DESC) AS service_id,
    LISTAGG(customer_class, ', ')
        WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY created_date DESC) AS customer_class,
    LISTAGG(customer_type, ', ')
        WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY created_date DESC) AS customer_type

FROM base
GROUP BY plan_instance_id, installment_id
ORDER BY plan_instance_id, installment_id;

Description: Missing Accounts: Active Accounts in SF or Aria missing in the other system. . Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH missing_accounts AS (
	SELECT *
	FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_all_segement_accounts
	WHERE sf_acct_paymenttype = 'Postpaid'
		AND sf_acct_status_std = 'Active'
		AND COALESCE(CAST(sf_acct_number AS VARCHAR), '') != ''
		AND COALESCE(ar_client_acct_id, '') = ''
		AND bancan IN (
			SELECT bancan
			FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_salesforce_msisdn_child_assets
			GROUP BY bancan
			HAVING COUNT(line_asset_id) > 0
			union 
			select bancan from "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sffinal_b2b_assets where product2_code IN (
    SELECT
      productcode
    FROM
      "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".stg_salesforce_products
    WHERE
      vlocity_cmt__parentclasscode__c = 'PR_B2C_Mobile_Line_Class'
  ) group by bancan 
having count(id)>0
		)
	UNION
	SELECT *
	FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_all_segement_accounts 
	WHERE 
		ar_acct_status_std = 'Active'
		AND ar_plan_status_std = 'Active'
		AND COALESCE(sf_record_id, '') = ''
		AND COALESCE(ar_client_acct_id, '') = ''
		AND NOT EXISTS (
			SELECT 1
			FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_ariafinal_accounts
			WHERE vw_all_segement_accounts.bancan = vw_ariafinal_accounts.supp_ban_can
		)
)
select 'DQ-0000049' as DQ_No,
	CASE
		WHEN sf_billfromdate_pr IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(
			EXTRACT(
				DAY
				FROM CAST(sf_billfromdate_pr AS DATE)
			) AS INT
		) ELSE -1
	END AS sf_billfromdate_pr_std,
	*
FROM missing_accounts a
	LEFT JOIN "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_ariafinal_accounts b ON a.bancan = b.supp_ban_can
WHERE (
		b.supp_ban_can IS NULL
		OR b.acct_status <> 'Archived'
	);

Description: MSISDN: Check on duplicate MSISDNs within one account in Aria. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH aria_plan_grain AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        client_acct_id,
        msisdn,
        bill_day,
        test_acct_ind,
        customer_type,
        group_plan_oli_id,
        group_plan_name,
        rate_plan_oli_id,
        rate_plan_name
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_hierarchy_all_status_reverse
    WHERE acct_status = 'Active'
      AND master_plan_status = 'Active'
      AND COALESCE(group_plan_status, 'Active') = 'Active'
      AND COALESCE(rate_plan_status,  'Active') = 'Active'
      AND rate_plan_name NOT IN ('PR_B2C_Mobile_Accessory_Plan', 'PR_B2C_Liberty_Connected_Wearable')
      AND msisdn IS NOT NULL
),

dup AS (
    SELECT
        client_acct_id,
        msisdn,
        COUNT(*) AS plan_rows,
        COUNT(DISTINCT rate_plan_oli_id)  AS distinct_rate_plans,
        COUNT(DISTINCT group_plan_oli_id) AS distinct_group_plans
    FROM aria_plan_grain
    GROUP BY client_acct_id, msisdn
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
       AND (
            COUNT(DISTINCT rate_plan_oli_id) > 1
         OR COUNT(DISTINCT group_plan_oli_id) > 1
       )
),

sf_orders AS (
    SELECT
        bancan,
        pr_msisdn__c AS msisdn,
        ARRAY_JOIN(ARRAY_DISTINCT(ARRAY_AGG(CAST(orderid AS VARCHAR))), ', ') AS sf_orderids,
        ARRAY_JOIN(ARRAY_DISTINCT(ARRAY_AGG(COALESCE(vlocity_cmt__orderstatus__c,''))), ', ') AS sf_order_statuses,
        ARRAY_JOIN(ARRAY_DISTINCT(ARRAY_AGG(COALESCE(vlocity_cmt__reason__c,''))), ', ') AS sf_order_reasons
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sf_order
    WHERE COALESCE(vlocity_cmt__orderstatus__c,'') <> 'In Progress'
      AND COALESCE(vlocity_cmt__reason__c,'') <> 'New'
    GROUP BY bancan, pr_msisdn__c
)

SELECT
    'DQ-0000064' AS dq_no,
    d.client_acct_id,
    d.msisdn,
    d.plan_rows,
    d.distinct_group_plans,
    d.distinct_rate_plans,

    ARRAY_JOIN(ARRAY_DISTINCT(ARRAY_AGG(pg.group_plan_oli_id)), ', ') AS group_plan_oli_ids,
    ARRAY_JOIN(ARRAY_DISTINCT(ARRAY_AGG(pg.group_plan_name)),  ', ') AS group_plan_names,
    ARRAY_JOIN(ARRAY_DISTINCT(ARRAY_AGG(pg.rate_plan_oli_id)),  ', ') AS rate_plan_oli_ids,
    ARRAY_JOIN(ARRAY_DISTINCT(ARRAY_AGG(pg.rate_plan_name)),    ', ') AS rate_plan_names,

    MAX(pg.bill_day)      AS bill_day,
    MAX(pg.test_acct_ind) AS test_acct_ind,
    MAX(pg.customer_type) AS customer_type,

    so.sf_orderids,
    so.sf_order_statuses,
    so.sf_order_reasons
FROM dup d
JOIN aria_plan_grain pg
  ON pg.client_acct_id = d.client_acct_id
 AND pg.msisdn        = d.msisdn
LEFT JOIN sf_orders so
  ON so.bancan = d.client_acct_id
 AND so.msisdn = d.msisdn
GROUP BY
    d.client_acct_id, d.msisdn, d.plan_rows, d.distinct_group_plans, d.distinct_rate_plans,
    so.sf_orderids, so.sf_order_statuses, so.sf_order_reasons
;

Description: Discrepancy report for SF Oli ID and Aria Client Instance ID mismatches for B2C accounts: Custom Query. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH
sf AS (
    select
        acct_status,
        bill_acct_status,
        bancan,
        msisdn,
        plan_id,
        plan_oli_id,
        plan_code,
        plan_asset_ref,
        NULLIF(
            CASE
                WHEN plan_oli_id IS NULL THEN NULL
                WHEN lower(trim(plan_oli_id)) IN ('', 'null') THEN NULL
                ELSE trim(plan_oli_id)
            END,
            ''
        ) AS sf_plan_oli_id_norm
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sf_all_segment_w_inst_dedup
    WHERE acct_status_std = 'Active'
      AND plan_status_std = 'Active'
      AND lower(vip_account__c) = 'false'
      AND acct_segment = 'B2C'
      AND acct_paymenttype = 'Postpaid'
      and plan_code not in ('PR_B2C_Mobile_Accessory_Plan','PR_B2C_Liberty_Connected_Wearable')
),
ar AS (
    SELECT
        client_acct_id AS bancan,
        msisdn,
        acct_status,
        master_plan_status,
        dunning_state,
        bill_day,
        rate_plan_oli_id,
        rate_plan_name,
        NULLIF(
            CASE
                WHEN rate_plan_oli_id IS NULL THEN NULL
                WHEN lower(trim(rate_plan_oli_id)) IN ('', 'null') THEN NULL
                ELSE trim(rate_plan_oli_id)
            END,
            ''
        ) AS ar_rate_plan_oli_id_norm
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_ar_all_segment_dedup_hierarchy
    WHERE acct_status_std = 'Active'
      AND rate_plan_status = 'Active'
      and coalesce(group_plan_status,'Active') = 'Active'
      and customer_type = 'B2C'
      AND test_acct_ind = '0'
      and rate_plan_name not in ('PR_B2C_Mobile_Accessory_Plan','PR_B2C_Mobile_Late_Payment_Fee','PR_B2C_Liberty_Connected_Wearable')
),
report as (
select distinct
    'DQ-0000085' AS DQ_No,
    COALESCE(sf.bancan, ar.bancan)   AS bancan,
    COALESCE(sf.msisdn, ar.msisdn)   AS msisdn,
    sf.acct_status,
    ar.acct_status,
    sf.bill_acct_status,
    ar.dunning_state,
    ar.master_plan_status,
    sf.plan_id,
    sf.plan_oli_id,
    ar.rate_plan_oli_id,
    sf.plan_code,
    ar.rate_plan_name,
   -- sf.plan_asset_ref,

    CASE
        WHEN sf.bancan IS NULL THEN 'Missing in Salesforce (record not found)'
        WHEN ar.bancan IS NULL THEN 'Missing in Aria (record not found)'

        WHEN sf.sf_plan_oli_id_norm IS NULL AND ar.ar_rate_plan_oli_id_norm IS NULL
            THEN 'OLI missing in both systems'
        WHEN sf.sf_plan_oli_id_norm IS NULL AND ar.ar_rate_plan_oli_id_norm IS NOT NULL
            THEN 'Salesforce plan_oli_id missing'
        WHEN sf.sf_plan_oli_id_norm IS NOT NULL AND ar.ar_rate_plan_oli_id_norm IS NULL
            THEN 'Aria rate_plan_oli_id missing'

        WHEN sf.sf_plan_oli_id_norm <> ar.ar_rate_plan_oli_id_norm
            THEN 'OLI mismatch between Salesforce and Aria'

        ELSE 'Match'
    END AS discrepancy_reason

FROM sf
FULL OUTER JOIN ar
  ON sf.bancan = ar.bancan
 AND sf.msisdn = ar.msisdn

)
select
	*
from
	report
where
	discrepancy_reason = 'OLI mismatch between Salesforce and Aria' and plan_code =rate_plan_name

Description: MSISDN: Check on duplicate MSISDNs within one account in SF. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH find_distinct_msisdn AS (
    SELECT 
        sf_parent_msisdn,
        bancan,
        sf_parent_asset_id
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod"."vw_sf_generic_device"
    WHERE sf_parent_plan_status = 'Active'
      AND sf_child_plan_status = 'Active'
    GROUP BY sf_parent_msisdn, bancan, sf_parent_asset_id
),
duplicate_msisdn_same_bancan AS (
    SELECT sf_parent_msisdn, bancan
    FROM find_distinct_msisdn
    GROUP BY sf_parent_msisdn, bancan
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
),
duplicate_msisdn_diff_bancan AS (
    SELECT sf_parent_msisdn
    FROM find_distinct_msisdn
    GROUP BY sf_parent_msisdn
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT bancan) > 1
),
discrepancy_report_same AS (
    SELECT 
        sf.*,
        'Same Bancan' AS duplicate_type
    FROM duplicate_msisdn_same_bancan dms
    JOIN "dvsum-s3-glue-prod"."vw_sf_generic_device" sf 
      ON sf.sf_parent_msisdn = dms.sf_parent_msisdn 
     AND sf.bancan = dms.bancan
),
discrepancy_report_diff AS (
    SELECT 
        sf.*,
        'Different Bancan' AS duplicate_type
    FROM duplicate_msisdn_diff_bancan dmd
    JOIN "dvsum-s3-glue-prod"."vw_sf_generic_device" sf 
      ON sf.sf_parent_msisdn = dmd.sf_parent_msisdn
)
SELECT 
    bancan,
    LISTAGG(sf_parent_msisdn, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY sf_parent_msisdn) AS aggregated_sf_parent_msisdns,
    sf_parent_asset_acct_segment,
    LISTAGG(sf_parent_asset_id, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY sf_parent_asset_id) AS aggregated_sf_parent_asset_ids,
    LISTAGG(sf_parent_product2_code, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY sf_parent_product2_code) AS aggregated_sf_parent_product2_codes,
    LISTAGG(sf_parent_plan_status, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY sf_parent_plan_status) AS aggregated_sf_parent_plan_status,
    LISTAGG(sf_child_asset_id, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY sf_child_asset_id) AS aggregated_child_asset_ids,
    LISTAGG(sf_child_acct_id, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY sf_child_acct_id) AS aggregated_child_acct_ids,
    LISTAGG(sf_child_oli_id, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY sf_child_oli_id) AS aggregated_child_oli_ids,
    LISTAGG(sf_child_product2_name, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY sf_child_product2_name) AS aggregated_child_product2_names,
    LISTAGG(sf_child_product2_code, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY sf_child_product2_code) AS aggregated_child_product2_codes,
    LISTAGG(sf_child_plan_status, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY sf_child_plan_status) AS aggregated_child_plan_statuses
FROM (
    SELECT * FROM discrepancy_report_same
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM discrepancy_report_diff
) t 
WHERE duplicate_type = 'Same Bancan' 
GROUP BY 
    bancan, 
    sf_parent_asset_acct_segment, 
    duplicate_type
ORDER BY aggregated_sf_parent_msisdns;

Description: Discrepancy report of B2B & B2C to find account with the Master Plan in Aria as Active Non-billable status with a Salesforce Billing Account status of Current. Custom Query
Custom Query:
with data as (
SELECT 
distinct 
  a.customer_type aria_customer_type,
  a.client_acct_id,
  a.lines_count,
  a.acct_status         AS aria_acct_status,
  a.acct_status_std     AS aria_acct_status_std,
  a.plan_status master_plan_status,
  a.plan_status_std,
  COALESCE(b.acct_status, c.billing_acct_status,'Acct not in SF')         AS sf_acct_status,
  COALESCE(b.acct_status_std, c.acct_status_std,'Acct not in SF')         AS sf_acct_status_std,
  COALESCE(b.bill_acct_status, c.bill_acct_status,'Acct not in SF')       AS sf_bill_acct_status,
    COALESCE(b.acct_segment, c.acct_segment,'Acct not in SF')       AS sf_acct_segment,
  case when (select count(*) from "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_salesforce_msisdn_child_assets where bancan = b.bancan ) > 0 then 'Y' else 'N' end as has_asset_in_sf ,
  case when (select count(*) from "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_hierarchy_all_status_reverse where client_acct_id  = b.bancan) > 0 then 'Y' else 'N' end as has_asset_in_aria ,
   case when (select count(*) from "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_salesforce_msisdn_child_assets where bancan = b.bancan and provisioning_status_std = 'Active' ) > 0 then 'Y' else 'N' end as has_active_asset_in_sf ,
  case when (select count(*) from "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_hierarchy_all_status_reverse where client_acct_id  = b.bancan and 
  coalesce (group_plan_status,'Active') = 'Active' and coalesce (rate_plan_status,'Active') = 'Active' and coalesce (general_device_plan_status ,'Active') = 'Active') > 0 then 'Y' else 'N' end as has_active_asset_in_aria 
FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_ariafinal_accounts AS a
LEFT JOIN "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sffinal_accounts AS b
  ON a.client_acct_id = b.bancan
  AND a.customer_type = 'B2C'
LEFT JOIN "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sffinal_b2b_accounts AS c
  ON a.client_acct_id = c.billing_bancan
  AND a.customer_type = 'B2B'
WHERE 
  a.plan_status = 'Active Non-Billable'
  AND a.acct_status = 'Active') select * from data where sf_acct_status != 'Acct not in SF' and has_asset_in_sf = 'Y' and has_asset_in_aria = 'Y'
  and has_active_asset_in_sf = 'Y' and has_active_asset_in_aria = 'Y' and lines_count <> '0';

Description: Discrepancy report for Pending invoice includes ALL active assets for the account in SF/Aria. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH invoice_devices AS (
    SELECT
        ban_can,
        msisdn,
        TRY(CAST(date_parse(regexp_replace(transaction_date, '[-]', '/'), '%m/%d/%Y') AS date)) AS invoice_date,
        plan_instance_cdi oli_id
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_lla_pending_inv_line_dtl
    WHERE transaction_type = 'Recurring Charge'
        AND service = 'Generic Device'
        AND msisdn IS NOT NULL
        AND ban_can IS NOT null
        and msisdn  <> ''
),
ar_asset_devices AS (
    -- Get all MSISDNs for LLA_General_Device from asset hierarchy
    SELECT
        client_acct_id,
        msisdn,
        general_device_oli_id
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_hierarchy_all_status_reverse
    WHERE --addon_plan_names LIKE '%General_Device%'
       --- AND 
msisdn IS NOT NULL
        AND client_acct_id IS NOT NULL
        AND COALESCE(rate_plan_status,'Active') = 'Active'
        AND COALESCE(group_plan_status,'Active') = 'Active'
),
sf_asset_devices as (select * from "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sf_all_segment_hierarchy where acct_status_std = 'Active'
and plan_status_std = 'Active'
and device_status_std = 'Active'),
invoice_counts AS (
    -- Count MSISDNs per BAN_CAN in invoice
    SELECT
        ban_can,
        COUNT(DISTINCT msisdn) as total_invoice_msisdns
    FROM invoice_devices
    GROUP BY ban_can
),
ar_matching_assets_per_ban AS (
    -- Count how many MSISDNs from each BAN_CAN exist in assets
    SELECT
        i.ban_can,
        COUNT(DISTINCT a.msisdn) as ar_matching_assets
    FROM invoice_devices i
    INNER JOIN ar_asset_devices a ON i.msisdn = a.msisdn and i.oli_id like '%'||a.general_device_oli_id || '%'
    GROUP BY i.ban_can
),
sf_matching_assets_per_ban AS (
    -- Count how many MSISDNs from each BAN_CAN exist in assets
    SELECT
        i.ban_can,
        COUNT(DISTINCT a.msisdn) as sf_matching_assets
    FROM invoice_devices i
    INNER JOIN sf_asset_devices a ON i.msisdn = a.msisdn and i.oli_id = '%'||a.device_oli_id || '%'
    GROUP BY i.ban_can
),
all_msisdns_status AS (
    -- Check status of all MSISDNs from invoice
    SELECT
        i.ban_can,
        i.msisdn,
        i.invoice_date,
        i.oli_id,
        CASE 
            WHEN a.msisdn IS NOT NULL THEN 'Available in Both'
            ELSE 'Missing in Asset'
        END as discrepancy_type
    FROM invoice_devices i
    LEFT JOIN ar_asset_devices a ON i.msisdn = a.msisdn
	left join sf_asset_devices b on i.msisdn = b.msisdn
),
ar_details AS (
    SELECT
        ar.*,
        COALESCE(
    TRY(CAST(date_parse(ar.rate_plan_status_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date)),
    TRY(CAST(date_parse(ar.rate_plan_status_date, '%m/%d/%Y') AS date))
) AS ar_rate_plan_status_date_dt
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_hierarchy_all_status_reverse  ar
)
-- Final discrepancy report
select distinct
    'DQ000125' as dq_no,
    d.ban_can,
    d.msisdn,
    ar.customer_type,
    ar.bill_day,
    d.invoice_date,
    ar.ar_rate_plan_status_date_dt,
    ar.master_plan_status,
    ar.group_plan_oli_id,
    ar.group_plan_name,
    ar.group_plan_status,
    ar.rate_plan_oli_id,
    ar.rate_plan_name,
    sf.plan_name ,
    ar.rate_plan_status,
    sf.plan_status,
    d.discrepancy_type,
    ic.total_invoice_msisdns as msisdn_count_in_invoice,
    COALESCE(ac.ar_matching_assets, 0) as matching_count_in_assets_ar,
    (ic.total_invoice_msisdns - COALESCE(ac.ar_matching_assets, 0)) as missing_in_asset_ar,
	COALESCE(sc.sf_matching_assets, 0) as matching_count_in_assets_sf,
    (ic.total_invoice_msisdns - COALESCE(sc.sf_matching_assets, 0)) as missing_in_asset_sf
FROM all_msisdns_status d
LEFT JOIN invoice_counts ic ON d.ban_can = ic.ban_can
LEFT JOIN ar_matching_assets_per_ban ac ON d.ban_can = ac.ban_can
left join sf_matching_assets_per_ban sc ON d.ban_can = sc.ban_can
left join ar_details ar on ar.client_acct_id = d.ban_can and ar.msisdn = d.msisdn 
 and d.oli_id like '%'||ar.general_device_oli_id || '%'
left join "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sf_all_segment_hierarchy sf on sf.bancan = d.ban_can and sf.msisdn = d.msisdn 
where discrepancy_type <> 'Available in Both'
and d.invoice_date > ar.ar_rate_plan_status_date_dt
ORDER BY d.ban_can, d.discrepancy_type, d.msisdn;

Description: Discrepancy report of Promotions – valid promotions applied on the pending invoice. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH device_hierarchy AS (
  SELECT 
    client_acct_id,
    msisdn,
    addon_plan_oli_ids,
    addon_plan_names,
    group_plan_status,
    rate_plan_status,
    general_device_aria_instance_no AS aria_instance_no,
    inst_id,
    inst_promo_monthly_amt
  FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_hierarchy_all_status_reverse 
  WHERE COALESCE(group_plan_status, 'Active') = 'Active'
    AND COALESCE(rate_plan_status, 'Active') = 'Active'
    AND active_general_device_plan_status = 'Active'
),
device_recurring_credits AS (
  SELECT 
    rc.*,
    dh.*
  FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".lla_recurr_credits rc
  JOIN device_hierarchy dh
    ON rc.plan_instance_id = dh.addon_plan_oli_ids
  WHERE rc.credit_status = 'Credits Created, Incomplete'
),
base AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    'DQ-0000126' AS dq_no,

    inv.account_number,
    inv.ban_can,
    inv.msisdn,
    inv.invoice_number,
    inv.invoice_item_no,
    inv.customer_type,
    inv.business_unit,
    inv.service_no AS account_service_credit_no,
    inv.service,
    inv.transaction_type,

    -- raw values
    inv.transaction_date AS transaction_date_raw,
    drc.next_credit_date AS next_credit_date_raw,

    -- parsed dates
    TRY(CAST(DATE_PARSE(inv.transaction_date, '%m/%d/%Y') AS DATE)) AS transaction_dt,
    TRY(CAST(DATE_PARSE(drc.next_credit_date, '%m/%d/%Y') AS DATE)) AS next_credit_dt,

    -- amounts (raw + numeric with COALESCE)
    inv.amount AS invoice_amount_raw,
    COALESCE(TRY(CAST(inv.amount AS DOUBLE)), 0) AS invoice_amount_num,

    drc.credit_amount AS credit_amount_raw,
    COALESCE(TRY(CAST(drc.credit_amount AS DOUBLE)), 0) AS credit_amount_num,

    drc.inst_promo_monthly_amt AS promo_monthly_amt_raw,
    COALESCE(TRY(CAST(drc.inst_promo_monthly_amt AS DOUBLE)), 0) AS promo_monthly_amt_num,

    drc.rec_credit_number AS credit_number,
    drc.plan_instance_number,
    drc.plan_instance_id,
    drc.inst_id,

    drc.credit_status,
    drc.credits_completed,
    drc.credits_remaining
  FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".lla_pending_inv_line_dtl inv
  JOIN device_recurring_credits drc
    ON inv.ban_can = drc.ban_can
   AND inv.msisdn = drc.msisdn
  WHERE inv.service = 'Generic Device'
),
discrepancy_report as (
SELECT
  dq_no,
  account_number,
  ban_can,
  msisdn,
  invoice_number,

  DATE_FORMAT(transaction_dt, '%Y-%m-%d') AS transaction_date,
  DATE_FORMAT(next_credit_dt, '%Y-%m-%d') AS next_credit_date,

  credit_number,
  plan_instance_number,
  plan_instance_id,
  inst_id,

  invoice_item_no,
  invoice_amount_raw AS device_service_rate,

  credit_amount_raw AS credit_amount,
  promo_monthly_amt_raw AS inst_promo_monthly_amt,

  credit_status,
  credits_completed,
  credits_remaining,

  customer_type,
  business_unit,
  account_service_credit_no,
  service,
  transaction_type,

  CASE
    -- 1️⃣ Date violation
    WHEN transaction_dt IS NOT NULL
     AND next_credit_dt IS NOT NULL
     AND next_credit_dt < transaction_dt
      THEN CONCAT(
        'Invoice created in future Date then next Recurring Credit Date',
        DATE_FORMAT(next_credit_dt, '%Y-%m-%d'),
        ' | transaction_date=',
        DATE_FORMAT(transaction_dt, '%Y-%m-%d')
      )
	  
	when COALESCE(TRIM(credit_amount_raw), '') IN ('', 'None') or COALESCE(TRIM(invoice_amount_raw), '') IN ('', 'None') or COALESCE(TRIM(promo_monthly_amt_raw), '') IN ('', 'None')
	   then concat(' Invalid credit_amount_raw,invoice_amount_raw,promo_monthly_amt_raw :',credit_amount_raw,' - invoice_amount:',invoice_amount_raw,' - promo_monthly_amt: ',promo_monthly_amt_raw)

    WHEN credit_amount_num > 0 and invoice_amount_num = 0 and promo_monthly_amt_num > 0
      THEN CONCAT('Invoice Amount should not be Zero when valid Credit amount is available credit_amount :',credit_amount_raw,' - invoice_amount:',invoice_amount_raw,' - promo_monthly_amt: ',promo_monthly_amt_raw)

    ELSE NULL
  END AS discrepancy_reason

FROM base
)select * from discrepancy_report where discrepancy_reason is not null;

Description: Discrepancy report of installment start date validation for the device and accessory. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH enriched AS (
    SELECT
        client_acct_id,
        msisdn,
        customer_type,
        bill_day,
        inst_status,
        inst_status_accessory,
        inst_string,
        inst_string_accessory,
        inst_start_date,
        inst_start_date_accessory,
        REGEXP_REPLACE(trim(BOTH FROM split_part(COALESCE(inst_string, ''), '|', 9)), '')         AS inst_string_dt_extract,
        REGEXP_REPLACE(trim(BOTH FROM split_part(COALESCE(inst_string_accessory, ''), '|', 9)), '') AS inst_string_acc_dt_extract,
        regexp_like(inst_start_date,'^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}$')         AS device_date_validation,
        regexp_like(inst_start_date_accessory, '^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}$') AS accessory_date_validation,
        active_general_accessory_plan_date,
        active_general_device_plan_date,
		active_general_accessory_oli_id,
        active_general_device_oli_id
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_hierarchy_all_status_reverse
    WHERE COALESCE(
        CAST(inst_start_date AS varchar),
        CAST(inst_start_date_accessory AS varchar),
        inst_string,
        inst_string_accessory
    ) IS NOT null
    and acct_status = 'Active'
    and master_plan_status = 'Active'
    and coalesce (group_plan_status,'Active') = 'Active'
    and coalesce (rate_plan_status, 'Active') = 'Active'
    and coalesce (active_general_device_plan_status, 'Active' )= 'Active'
    and coalesce (active_general_accessory_plan_status, 'Active') = 'Active'
),
flag AS (
    SELECT
        a.*,
        CASE WHEN inst_string IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS has_device_installment,
        CASE WHEN inst_string_accessory IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS has_accessory_installment,

        -- NOTE: these are actually "invalid" flags (1 = invalid), despite the naming.
        CASE WHEN inst_string_dt_extract IS NULL
                  AND inst_string IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_device_inst_string_valid,
        CASE WHEN inst_string_acc_dt_extract IS NULL
                  AND inst_string_accessory IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_accessory_inst_string_valid,

        CASE WHEN inst_string_dt_extract <> inst_start_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_device_inst_start_date_match,
        CASE WHEN inst_string_acc_dt_extract <> inst_start_date_accessory THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_accessory_inst_start_date_match
    FROM enriched a
)
select
'DQ-0000167' as dq_no,
client_acct_id,
msisdn,
customer_type,
bill_day,
active_general_device_oli_id device_oli_id,
inst_status inst_status_device,
active_general_accessory_oli_id accessory_oli_id,
        inst_status_accessory,
        inst_string inst_string_device,
        inst_string_accessory,
        inst_start_date inst_start_date_device,
        inst_string_dt_extract inst_string_dt_extract_device,
        active_general_device_plan_date device_plan_date,
        inst_start_date_accessory,
        inst_string_acc_dt_extract inst_string_dt_extract_accessory,
        active_general_accessory_plan_date accessory_plan_date,
    concat_ws( '|',
                CASE
                    WHEN is_device_inst_string_valid = 1
                    THEN 'Device installment: inst_string does not contain a valid date (inst_string_dt_extract IS NULL)'
                END,
                CASE
                    WHEN is_accessory_inst_string_valid = 1
                    THEN 'Accessory installment: inst_string_accessory does not contain a valid date (inst_string_acc_dt_extract IS NULL)'
                END,
                CASE
                    WHEN is_device_inst_start_date_match = 1
                    THEN 'Device installment: date in inst_string_dt_extract does not match inst_start_date'
                END,
                CASE
                    WHEN is_accessory_inst_start_date_match = 1
                    THEN 'Accessory installment: date in inst_string_acc_dt_extract does not match inst_start_date_accessory'
                end,
                case 
                	 when (device_date_validation = false or accessory_date_validation = false ) and (inst_start_date is not null or inst_start_date_accessory is not null )
                	 then 'Device or Accessory installment date not valid format'
                end
            ) AS discrepancy_reason
FROM flag
WHERE
      is_device_inst_string_valid = 1
   OR is_accessory_inst_string_valid = 1
   OR is_device_inst_start_date_match = 1
   OR is_accessory_inst_start_date_match = 1
   or device_date_validation = false 
   or accessory_date_validation = false
;

Description: Add-Ons: Identify duplicate charges for Insurance, Roadside Assist, Home Assist,Quick Upgrade and Mobility Control (B2B ONLY) with "Active" Parent Plan status. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH add_on_counts AS (
	SELECT
		aca.acct_no,
		aca.aria_instance_no,
		aca.client_acct_id as bancan,
		aca.client_instance_id,
		aca.msisdn,
		coalesce(sfo.orderid,'') sf_orderid,
		coalesce(sfo.vlocity_cmt__OrderStatus__c,'') sf_order_status,
		coalesce(sfo.vlocity_cmt__Reason__c,'') sf_order_reason,
		aml.customer_type,
		aml.bill_day,
		aml.acct_status_std,
		---count the addon for each msisdn
		COUNT(CASE WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%International_Calling%' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS international_cnt,
		COUNT(CASE WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Device_Protection%' THEN 1
		           WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Insurance%' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS insurance_cnt,
		COUNT(CASE WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Roadside%' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS roadside_assist_cnt,
		COUNT(CASE WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Quick%' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS quick_upgrade_cnt,
		COUNT(CASE WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Bundle_Home%' THEN 1
		           WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Home_Assist%' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS home_assist_cnt,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Bus_Mob_Controls%' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS mob_control_cnt,
		
		---Aggregate the International Calling
		LISTAGG(CASE WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%International_Calling%' THEN aca.child_client_instance_id ELSE NULL END, ',') 
			WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY afa.aria_instance_no) AS International_calling_child_client_instance_id_list,
		LISTAGG(CASE WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%International_Calling%' THEN afa.aria_instance_no ELSE NULL END, ',') 
			WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY afa.aria_instance_no) AS International_calling_child_aria_instance_no_list,
		LISTAGG(CASE WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%International_Calling%' THEN aca.client_parent_instance_id ELSE NULL END, ',') 
			WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY afa.aria_instance_no) AS International_calling_parent_client_instance_id_list,
		LISTAGG(CASE WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%International_Calling%' THEN aca.child_client_plan_id ELSE NULL END, ',') 
			WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY afa.aria_instance_no) AS International_calling_child_client_plan_id_list,
		
		---Aggregate the Insurance/Device Protection
		LISTAGG(CASE WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Device_Protection%' OR child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Insurance%' 
			THEN aca.child_client_instance_id ELSE NULL END, ',') 
			WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY afa.aria_instance_no) AS Insurance_calling_child_client_instance_id_list,
		LISTAGG(CASE WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Device_Protection%' OR child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Insurance%' 
			THEN afa.aria_instance_no ELSE NULL END, ',') 
			WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY afa.aria_instance_no) AS Insurance_calling_child_aria_instance_no_list,
		LISTAGG(CASE WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Device_Protection%' OR child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Insurance%' 
			THEN aca.client_parent_instance_id ELSE NULL END, ',') 
			WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY afa.aria_instance_no) AS Insurance_calling_parent_client_instance_id_list,
		LISTAGG(CASE WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Device_Protection%' OR child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Insurance%' 
			THEN aca.child_client_plan_id ELSE NULL END, ',') 
			WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY afa.aria_instance_no) AS Insurance_calling_child_client_plan_id_list,
			
		---Aggregate the Road Side Assistance
		LISTAGG(CASE WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Roadside%' THEN aca.child_client_instance_id ELSE NULL END, ',') 
			WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY afa.aria_instance_no) AS Roadside_calling_child_client_instance_id_list,
		LISTAGG(CASE WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Roadside%' THEN afa.aria_instance_no ELSE NULL END, ',') 
			WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY afa.aria_instance_no) AS Roadside_calling_child_aria_instance_no_list,
		LISTAGG(CASE WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Roadside%' THEN aca.client_parent_instance_id ELSE NULL END, ',') 
			WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY afa.aria_instance_no) AS Roadside_calling_parent_client_instance_id_list,
		LISTAGG(CASE WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Roadside%' THEN aca.child_client_plan_id ELSE NULL END, ',') 
			WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY afa.aria_instance_no) AS Roadside_calling_child_client_plan_id_list,
			
		---Aggregate the Quick Upgrade
		LISTAGG(CASE WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Quick%' THEN aca.child_client_instance_id ELSE NULL END, ',') 
			WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY afa.aria_instance_no) AS Quick_upgrade_child_client_instance_id_list,
		LISTAGG(CASE WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Quick%' THEN afa.aria_instance_no ELSE NULL END, ',') 
			WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY afa.aria_instance_no) AS Quick_upgrade_child_aria_instance_no_list,
		LISTAGG(CASE WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Quick%' THEN aca.client_parent_instance_id ELSE NULL END, ',') 
			WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY afa.aria_instance_no) AS Quick_upgrade_parent_client_instance_id_list,
		LISTAGG(CASE WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Quick%' THEN aca.child_client_plan_id ELSE NULL END, ',') 
			WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY afa.aria_instance_no) AS Quick_upgrade_child_client_plan_id_list,
			
		---Aggregate the Home Assistance and bundle home
		LISTAGG(CASE WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Bundle_Home%' OR child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Home_Assist%' 
			THEN aca.child_client_instance_id ELSE NULL END, ',') 
			WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY afa.aria_instance_no) AS Homeassist_calling_child_client_instance_id_list,
		LISTAGG(CASE WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Bundle_Home%' OR child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Home_Assist%' 
			THEN afa.aria_instance_no ELSE NULL END, ',') 
			WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY afa.aria_instance_no) AS Homeassist_calling_child_aria_instance_no_list,
		LISTAGG(CASE WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Bundle_Home%' OR child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Home_Assist%' 
			THEN aca.client_parent_instance_id ELSE NULL END, ',') 
			WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY afa.aria_instance_no) AS Homeassist_calling_parent_client_instance_id_list,
		LISTAGG(CASE WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Bundle_Home%' OR child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Home_Assist%' 
			THEN aca.child_client_plan_id ELSE NULL END, ',') 
			WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY afa.aria_instance_no) AS Homeassist_calling_child_client_plan_id_list,
			
			
		---Aggregate the Mobility Control
		LISTAGG(CASE WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Bus_Mob_Controls%' THEN aca.child_client_instance_id ELSE NULL END, ',') 
			WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY afa.aria_instance_no) AS mob_control_child_client_instance_id_list,
		LISTAGG(CASE WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Bus_Mob_Controls%' THEN afa.aria_instance_no ELSE NULL END, ',') 
			WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY afa.aria_instance_no) AS mob_control_child_aria_instance_no_list,
		LISTAGG(CASE WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Bus_Mob_Controls%' THEN aca.client_parent_instance_id ELSE NULL END, ',') 
			WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY afa.aria_instance_no) AS mob_control_parent_client_instance_id_list,
		LISTAGG(CASE WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%Bus_Mob_Controls%' THEN aca.child_client_plan_id ELSE NULL END, ',') 
			WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY afa.aria_instance_no) AS mob_control_child_client_plan_id_list
			
	FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_msisdn_child_assets aca
		INNER JOIN "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_msisdn_lines aml
			ON aca.aria_instance_no = aml.aria_instance_no
		LEFT JOIN "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_ariafinal_all afa
			ON aca.child_client_instance_id = afa.client_instance_id
		left join  "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sf_order sfo
		    on sfo.bancan = aca.client_acct_id and sfo.pr_msisdn__c = aca.msisdn
	WHERE aml.plan_status_std = 'Active'
	  AND aml.acct_status_std = 'Active'
	GROUP BY aca.acct_no,
	         aca.client_acct_id,
	         aca.client_instance_id,
	         aca.msisdn,
	         aml.customer_type,
	         aml.bill_day,
	         aml.acct_status_std,
	         aca.aria_instance_no,
	         sfo.orderid,
	         sfo.vlocity_cmt__OrderStatus__c,
		     sfo.vlocity_cmt__Reason__c
)
SELECT 'DQ-0000065' AS DQ_No,
       *
FROM add_on_counts
WHERE (international_cnt > 1
   OR insurance_cnt > 1
   OR roadside_assist_cnt > 1
   OR home_assist_cnt > 1
   OR quick_upgrade_cnt > 1
   OR mob_control_cnt > 1)
   and sf_order_status <> 'In Progress'
ORDER BY acct_no, msisdn, bancan, client_instance_id;

Description: Discrepancy report to find If change plan or TOBR same installement id should associated with new plan instance number. Custom Query
Custom Query:
with parent_asset as (
select
	*
from
	"dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sffinal_assets
where
	provisioning_status not in ('Deleted', 'Disconnect')
),
child_asset as (
select
	*
from
	"dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sffinal_assets
where
	provisioning_status not in ('Deleted', 'Disconnect')
		and coalesce(external_asset_reference_id__c,
		'') <> ''
			and msisdn is null
			and contract_term__c <> 'No Commit Retail Price'
),
-- pick the latest 'Change' order per (bancan, msisdn) in last 2 days
sfo_latest as (
select
	bancan,
	pr_msisdn__c as msisdn,
	vlocity_cmt__OrderStatus__c,
	vlocity_cmt__Reason__c,
	orderid,
	activateddate_ts,
	row_number() over (
           partition by bancan,
	pr_msisdn__c
order by
	activateddate_ts desc,
	orderid desc
         ) as rn
from
	"dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sf_order
where
	order_type = 'Change'
and "vlocity_cmt__Reason__c" in ('Change Plan',
'Change Device - LCPR to LCPR',
'Swap Lost or Stolen Device',
'Swap Lost or Stolen Device and SIM',
'TOBR')
	and activateddate_ts >= date_add('day',
	-2,
	current_timestamp)
),
sfo_one as (
select
	*
from
	sfo_latest
where
	rn = 1
),
-- dedupe attribute to one row per child OLI (choose your rule: latest/max)
vj_one as (
select
    id,
	pr_original_oli_id__c,
	MAX("attributeruntimeinfo.value") as sf_installment_id
from
	"dvsum-s3-glue-prod".stg_sf_vlocity_json_att_cat_prb2c_mobile
where
	attributeuniquecode__c = 'PR_B2C_MB_ATT_InstallmentID'
group by
	1,2
),
sf_gd_inst as (
select
	p.bancan,
	p.msisdn as sf_parent_msisdn,
	p.acct_segment as sf_parent_asset_acct_segment,
	p.id as sf_parent_asset_id,
	p.product2_code as sf_parent_product2_code,
	p.provisioning_status as sf_parent_plan_status,
	c.id as sf_child_asset_id,
	c.acct_id as sf_child_acct_id,
	c.pr_original_oli_id__c as sf_child_oli_id,
	c.product2_name as sf_child_product2_name,
	c.product2_code as sf_child_product2_code,
	c.provisioning_status as sf_child_plan_status,
	s.vlocity_cmt__OrderStatus__c,
	s.vlocity_cmt__Reason__c,
	s.orderid,
	v.sf_installment_id sf_inst_id
from
	parent_asset p
join child_asset c
  on
	p.acct_id = c.acct_id
	and p.vlocity_cmt__assetreferenceid__c = c.external_asset_reference_id__c
	-- move filter into JOIN
left join sfo_one s
  on
	s.bancan = p.bancan
	and s.msisdn = p.msisdn
left join vj_one v
  on
	v.pr_original_oli_id__c = c.pr_original_oli_id__c and v.id = c.id
where
	length(trim(v.sf_installment_id)) >0
		and s.vlocity_cmt__OrderStatus__c is not null),
ar_gd_ins as (
select
	sf.*,
	inst_id ar_inst_id
from

	and general_device_plan_status = 'Active'
	and msisdn = sf.sf_parent_msisdn

'DQ-0000162' as dq_no,

Description: DISCOUNTS: Signature Discount matches between SF and Aria Active Accounts / Plans. Custom Query
Custom Query:
select distinct 'DQ-0000047' as DQ_No,
	--v2
	bancan as A_bancan,
	sf_acct_segment AS sf_acct_segment,
	--v2
	CASE
		WHEN sf_billfromdate_pr IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(
			EXTRACT(
				DAY
				FROM CAST(sf_billfromdate_pr AS DATE)
			) AS INT
		) ELSE -1
	END AS sf_billfromdate_pr_std,
	sf_fan_number as A_sf_fan_number,
	ar_coupon_codes as A_ar_coupon_codes,
	ar_coupon_codes_active as A_ar_coupon_codes_active,
	ranked.vlocity_cmt__Reason__c,
	vw.sf_record_id,
	vw.sf_acct_status_std,
	vw.ar_customer_type,
	ranked.b2c_discount_applied__c,
	ranked.createddate,
	ranked.rn AS rank_number,
	ranked.ordernumber sf_ordernumber,
	ranked.vlocity_cmt__requestedstartdate__c sf_order_start_date,
	ranked.activateddate sf_actuvateddate,
	ranked.status sf_status,
	ranked.vlocity_cmt__fulfilmentstatus__c sf_order_fulfilmentstatus,
	ranked.vlocity_cmt__notes__c sf_order_notes,
	ranked.vlocity_cmt__orderstatus__c sf_vlty_order_status
FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_all_segement_accounts vw
JOIN (
		SELECT b.*,
			ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
				PARTITION BY b.vlocity_cmt__defaultbillingaccountid__c
				ORDER BY b.createddate DESC
			) AS rn
		FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".stg_salesforce_order b
		where b.vlocity_cmt__Reason__c IN (
				'Apply B2B2C Discount',
				'Existing',
				'Existing Port-In',
				'New',
				'Port In'
			) --v2
			AND b.b2c_discount_applied__c = 'true'
			AND b.vlocity_cmt__orderstatus__c = 'Activated' -- V2
	) ranked ON ranked.vlocity_cmt__defaultbillingaccountid__c = vw.sf_record_id
WHERE -- ar_customer_type = 'B2C' --v2
	--AND 
	sf_acct_status_std = 'Active'
	AND ar_acct_status_std = 'Active'
	AND ar_plan_status_std = 'Active'
    AND ranked.rn = 1 -- Only include the latest record (rank 1)
	AND ranked.vlocity_cmt__Reason__c IN (
		'Apply B2B2C Discount',
		'Existing',
		'Existing Port-In',
		'New',
		'Port In'
	)
	AND (
		UPPER(SUBSTRING(sf_fan_number, 1, 12)) like 'B2B2CDISCOUNT%'
		OR UPPER(ar_coupon_codes_active) like '%B2B2CDISCOUNT%'
	)
	AND UPPER(ar_coupon_codes_active) not like '%' || upper(SUBSTRING(sf_fan_number, 1, 11)) || '%'
	AND lower(ar_coupon_codes_active) <> 'no coupons found';

Description: DISCOUNTS: FMC Discount matches between SF and Aria Active Accounts / Plans. Custom Query
Custom Query:
select
distinct   'DQ-0000045' as DQ_No,--v2
   bancan as A_bancan,
   sf_acct_segment     AS sf_acct_segment, --v2
   CASE
    WHEN sf_billfromdate_pr IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(
      EXTRACT(
        DAY
        FROM CAST(sf_billfromdate_pr AS DATE)
      ) AS INT
    )
    ELSE -1
  END AS sf_billfromdate_pr_std,
  sf_fan_number as A_sf_fan_number,
   ar_coupon_codes as A_ar_coupon_codes,
   ar_coupon_codes_active as A_ar_coupon_codes_active,

   sf_acct_fixedaccountnumber_pr as A_sf_acct_fixedaccountnumber_pr,

	ranked.vlocity_cmt__requestedstartdate__c sf_order_start_date,
	ranked.activateddate sf_actuvateddate,
	ranked.status sf_status,
	ranked.vlocity_cmt__fulfilmentstatus__c sf_order_fulfilmentstatus,
	ranked.vlocity_cmt__notes__c sf_order_notes,
	ranked.vlocity_cmt__orderstatus__c sf_vlty_order_status
FROM

	JOIN (

            PARTITION BY b.vlocity_cmt__defaultbillingaccountid__c

    FROM

   -- ar_customer_type = 'B2C' commented out as part of v2

		'Existing Port-In',
		'New',
		'Port In'

AND (UPPER(SUBSTRING(sf_fan_number, 1, 12)) like 'FMCDISCOUNT%'

    )
AND	UPPER(ar_coupon_codes_active) not like '%' || upper(SUBSTRING(sf_fan_number, 1, 11)) || '%'
AND lower(ar_coupon_codes_active) <> 'no coupons found';

Description: Sox Reconciliation Report that compares account status between Salesforce, Aria, Matrixx. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH inconsistencies AS (
  SELECT
     'DQ-0000104' AS dq_no,
      a.bancan,
      CASE
        -- All three systems (plus Master Plan) are active: no inconsistency.
        WHEN (sf_acct_status_std = 'Active' OR sf_acct_status = 'Disconnected')
          AND COALESCE(sf_bill_acct_status, 'Current') IN ('Current','Final Suspension','Overdue')
          AND ar_acct_status_std = 'Active'
          AND ma_account_status = 'Active'
          AND ar_plan_status IN ('Active','Pending Termination','Suspended','Terminated','Active Non-Billable')
        THEN 'Consistent'

        -- SF active but one/both of Aria & Matrix are not.
        WHEN sf_acct_status_std = 'Active'
          AND COALESCE(sf_bill_acct_status, 'Current') IN ('Current','Final Suspension','Overdue')
          AND (ar_acct_status_std <> 'Active' OR ma_account_status <> 'Active')
        THEN CASE
               WHEN ar_acct_status_std <> 'Active' AND ma_account_status = 'Active'
                 THEN 'SF Active, Aria NOT Active, Matrix Active'
               WHEN ar_acct_status_std = 'Active' AND ma_account_status <> 'Active'
                 THEN 'SF Active, Aria Active, Matrix NOT Active'
               ELSE 'SF Active, Aria NOT Active, Matrix NOT Active'
             END

        -- SF NOT active but one/both of Aria & Matrix are active.
        WHEN sf_acct_status_std <> 'Active'
          AND (ar_acct_status_std = 'Active' OR ma_account_status = 'Active')
        THEN CASE
               WHEN ar_acct_status_std = 'Active' AND ma_account_status = 'Active'
                 THEN 'SF NOT Active, Aria Active, Matrix Active'
               WHEN ar_acct_status_std = 'Active' AND ma_account_status <> 'Active'
                 THEN 'SF NOT Active, Aria Active, Matrix NOT Active'
               ELSE 'SF NOT Active, Aria NOT Active, Matrix Active'
             END

        -- All 3 systems active but Master Plan isn’t.
        WHEN sf_acct_status_std = 'Active'
          AND COALESCE(sf_bill_acct_status, 'Current') IN ('Current','Final Suspension','Overdue')
          AND ar_acct_status_std = 'Active'
          AND ma_account_status = 'Active'
          AND ar_plan_status NOT IN ('Active','Pending Termination','Suspended','Active Non-Billable')
        THEN 'SF Active, Aria Active, Matrix Active, Master Plan NOT Active'

        -- All 3 systems active but SF billing status isn’t.
        WHEN sf_acct_status_std = 'Active'
          AND COALESCE(sf_bill_acct_status, 'Current') NOT IN ('Current','Final Suspension','Overdue')
          AND ar_acct_status_std = 'Active'
          AND ma_account_status = 'Active'
          AND ar_plan_status IN ('Active','Pending Termination','Suspended')
        THEN 'SF Active, Aria Active, Matrix Active, SF billing NOT Current'

        ELSE 'Other Inconsistency'
      END AS mismatch_type,
      sf_acct_status,
      sf_acct_status_std,
      sf_bill_acct_status,
      ar_acct_status,
      ar_acct_status_std,
      ar_plan_status,
      ar_plan_status_std AS ar_master_plan_status,
      COALESCE(ma_account_status, 'Not in Matrix') AS ma_account_status
  FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_all_accounts a
  WHERE a.ar_customer_type = 'B2C'
    AND a.sf_acct_status <> 'Deceased'
    AND a.ar_acct_status_std <> 'Archived'
	and a.ar_plan_description <> 'TESTING'
   AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_salesforce_msisdn_lines s
          WHERE s.bancan = a.bancan
            AND (s.provisioning_status_std <> 'Not Active'
                 OR s.product2_code NOT LIKE '%Wearable%')
        )
    AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_msisdn_lines ar
          WHERE ar.bancan = a.bancan
            AND ar.grand_parent_plan_status_std <> 'Not Active'
            AND ar.plan_status_std <> 'Not Active'
            AND ar.master_plan_status_std <> 'Not Active'
        )
    AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_salesforce_msisdn_child_assets c
          WHERE c.bancan = a.bancan
            AND c.provisioning_status_std = 'Active'
          GROUP BY c.line_asset_id
          HAVING COUNT(c.line_asset_id) > 1
        )
),
consistency_finder AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT *
  FROM inconsistencies
  WHERE mismatch_type <> 'Consistent'
)
SELECT *
FROM consistency_finder a
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".aria_accounts aa
        WHERE aa.test_acct_ind = '1'
          AND aa.client_acct_id = a.bancan
      )
  AND a.ar_acct_status <> 'Permanent'

Description: Plan Status consistency: Active Plans in Salesforce must have corresponding Active Plans in Aria for Active Aria accounts. Custom Query
Custom Query:
--v3 28/01/2025 Rule modified to include DQ number, customer_segment_type and sf_bill_day in output
with rule_DQ_0000055 as (
	SELECT bancan AS bancan,
		CASE
			WHEN sf_acct_status_std = 'Active'
			AND COALESCE(sf_bill_acct_status, 'Current') = 'Current'
			AND ar_acct_status_std <> 'Active' THEN 'SF Active, Aria NOT Active'
			WHEN sf_acct_status_std <> 'Active'
			AND ar_acct_status_std = 'Active' THEN 'SF NOT Active, Aria Active'
			WHEN sf_acct_status_std = 'Active'
			AND COALESCE(sf_bill_acct_status, 'Current') = 'Current'
			AND ar_acct_status_std = 'Active'
			AND ar_plan_status_std <> 'Active' THEN 'SF Active, Aria Active, Master Plan NOT Active'
			WHEN sf_acct_status_std = 'Active'
			AND COALESCE(sf_bill_acct_status, 'Current') = 'Current'
			AND ar_acct_status_std <> 'Active'
			AND ar_plan_status_std = 'Active' THEN 'SF Active, Aria NOT Active, Master Plan Active' ELSE 'Consistent'
		END AS mismatch_type,
		sf_acct_status AS sf_acct_status,
		sf_acct_status_std AS sf_acct_status_std,
		sf_bill_acct_status AS sf_bill_acct_status,
		ar_acct_status AS ar_acct_status,
		ar_acct_status_std AS ar_acct_status_std,
		ar_plan_status_std AS ar_master_plan_status,
		ar_plan_description AS ar_plan_description,
		sf_acct_segment AS sf_acct_segment,
		--v3
		sf_billfromdate_pr AS sf_billfromdate_pr --v3
	FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_all_segement_accounts -- commented out as apart of v3
)
select 'DQ-0000040' AS dq_no --v3
,
	sf.bancan,
	sf.msisdn,
	acct_consistency.sf_acct_segment as sf_acct_segment ,
CASE
		WHEN acct_consistency.sf_billfromdate_pr IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(
			EXTRACT(
				DAY
				FROM CAST(acct_consistency.sf_billfromdate_pr AS DATE)
			) AS INT
		) ELSE -1
	END AS sf_billfromdate_pr_std,
	sf.acct_status as sf_acct_status,
	sf.acct_status_std as sf_acct_status_std,
	sf.provisioning_status as sf_provisioning_status,
	sf.provisioning_status_std as sf_provisioning_status_std,
	a.acct_status as ar_acct_status,
	a.acct_status_std as ar_acct_status_std,
	a.plan_status as ar_plan_status,
	a.plan_status_std as ar_plan_status_std,
	a.master_acct_status_std as ar_master_acct_status_std,
	a.*
from "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sf_all_segement_active_plans sf
	left outer join "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_msisdn_lines a on a.bancan = sf.bancan
	and a.msisdn = sf.msisdn
	left outer join rule_DQ_0000055 acct_consistency on acct_consistency.bancan = sf.bancan
where --sf.acct_segment = 'B2C' -- commented out as apart of v3
	-- and 
	(
		sf.acct_status_std <> a.acct_status_std
		OR a.acct_status_std IS NULL
	)
	and sf.provisioning_status_std = 'Active'
	and a.acct_status_std = 'Active'
	and (
		a.master_plan_status <> 'Suspended'
		OR a.master_plan_status IS NULL
	)
	/* Do not include anything caught by the acct_consistency check */
	and mismatch_type = 'Consistent'
order by a.acct_status,
	sf.bancan,
	sf.msisdn;

Description: MSISDN: Check on duplicate MSISDNs across accounts in SF. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH find_distinct_msisdn AS (
    SELECT 
        sf_parent_msisdn,
        bancan,
        sf_parent_asset_id
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod"."vw_sf_generic_device"
    WHERE sf_parent_plan_status = 'Active'
      AND sf_child_plan_status = 'Active'
    GROUP BY sf_parent_msisdn, bancan, sf_parent_asset_id
),
duplicate_msisdn_same_bancan AS (
    SELECT sf_parent_msisdn, bancan
    FROM find_distinct_msisdn
    GROUP BY sf_parent_msisdn, bancan
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
),
duplicate_msisdn_diff_bancan AS (
    SELECT sf_parent_msisdn
    FROM find_distinct_msisdn
    GROUP BY sf_parent_msisdn
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT bancan) > 1
),
discrepancy_report_same AS (
    SELECT 
        sf.*,
        'Same Bancan' AS duplicate_type
    FROM duplicate_msisdn_same_bancan dms
    JOIN "dvsum-s3-glue-prod"."vw_sf_generic_device" sf 
      ON sf.sf_parent_msisdn = dms.sf_parent_msisdn 
     AND sf.bancan = dms.bancan
),
discrepancy_report_diff AS (
    SELECT 
        sf.*,
        'Different Bancan' AS duplicate_type
    FROM duplicate_msisdn_diff_bancan dmd
    JOIN "dvsum-s3-glue-prod"."vw_sf_generic_device" sf 
      ON sf.sf_parent_msisdn = dmd.sf_parent_msisdn
)
SELECT 
    LISTAGG(bancan, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY bancan) AS aggregated_sf_bancans,
    LISTAGG(sf_parent_msisdn, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY sf_parent_msisdn) AS aggregated_sf_parent_msisdns,
    sf_parent_asset_acct_segment,
    LISTAGG(sf_parent_asset_id, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY sf_parent_asset_id) AS aggregated_sf_parent_asset_ids,
    LISTAGG(sf_parent_product2_code, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY sf_parent_product2_code) AS aggregated_sf_parent_product2_codes,
    LISTAGG(sf_parent_plan_status, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY sf_parent_plan_status) AS aggregated_sf_parent_plan_status,
    LISTAGG(sf_child_asset_id, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY sf_child_asset_id) AS aggregated_child_asset_ids,
    LISTAGG(sf_child_acct_id, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY sf_child_acct_id) AS aggregated_child_acct_ids,
    LISTAGG(sf_child_oli_id, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY sf_child_oli_id) AS aggregated_child_oli_ids,
    LISTAGG(sf_child_product2_name, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY sf_child_product2_name) AS aggregated_child_product2_names,
    LISTAGG(sf_child_product2_code, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY sf_child_product2_code) AS aggregated_child_product2_codes,
    LISTAGG(sf_child_plan_status, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY sf_child_plan_status) AS aggregated_child_plan_statuses
FROM (
    SELECT * FROM discrepancy_report_same
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM discrepancy_report_diff
) t 
WHERE duplicate_type = 'Different Bancan' 
GROUP BY 
sf_parent_msisdn,
    sf_parent_asset_acct_segment, 
    duplicate_type
ORDER BY aggregated_sf_parent_msisdns;

Description: Discrepancy report of Account Type and Number Format Consistency.. Custom Query
Custom Query:
select distinct 'DQ-0000050' as DQ_No,
	--v3
	CASE
		WHEN sf_billfromdate_pr IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(
			EXTRACT(
				DAY
				FROM CAST(sf_billfromdate_pr AS DATE)
			) AS INT
		) ELSE -1
	END AS sf_billfromdate_pr_std,
	bancan,
	sf_acct_segment AS sf_acct_segment,
	--v3
	sf_billfromdate_pr AS sf_billfromdate_pr,
	--v3
	ar_customer_type,
	CASE
		WHEN ar_customer_type = 'B2C' THEN 'B2C bancans must start with 2 or 5'
		WHEN ar_customer_type = 'B2B' THEN 'B2B bancans must start with 4 or 7' ELSE NULL
	END as issue_explanation
FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_all_segement_accounts SF
WHERE sf_acct_status_std = 'Active'
	and bancan <> '23510697-23510634'
	AND ar_acct_status_std = 'Active'
	AND (
		(
			ar_customer_type = 'B2C'
			AND NOT REGEXP_LIKE(bancan, '^[25]\d{7}-\d{8}$')
		)
		OR (
			ar_customer_type = 'B2B'
			AND NOT REGEXP_LIKE(bancan, '^[47]\d{7}-\d{8}$')
		)
	)

Description: Discrepancy Report to Verify that the autopay due date is correctly set to 15 days.. Custom Query
Custom Query:
with discrepancy_report as (
select 'DQ-0000115' as DQ_No,acct_no,client_acct_id,customer_type,bill_day,payment_method,payment_option,b.ssp_autopayenable__c,collections_group_name,client_primary_payment_method_id ,collections_group_bg_no,billing_group_no,CLIENT_DEF_BILLING_GROUP_ID,

 where acct_status = 'Active'

Description: Missing OLI ID Check for SF Assets for B2C customers. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH assets AS (
   SELECT 
         a.id device_asset_id, 
         a.acct_id device_acct_id,
         b.product2_code plan_product2code, 
         b.product2id plan_product2id,
         b.product2_name plan_product2name,
         b.provisioning_status plan_prov_status,
         a.product2_code device_product2code, 
         a.product2id device_product2id,
         a.product2_name device_product2name,
         a.provisioning_status device_prov_status,
         a.bancan,
         b.msisdn plan_msisdn,
         a.acct_segment, 
         a.provisioning_status_std device_prov_status_std, 
         a.vlocity_cmt__assetreferenceid__c device_vlocity_cmt__assetreferenceid__c,
         a.external_asset_reference_id__c device_external_asset_reference_id__c,
         a.pr_original_oli_id__c device_oli_id,
         b.pr_original_oli_id__c plan_oli_id
    FROM "AwsDataCatalog"."dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sffinal_assets a,"dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sffinal_assets b
    WHERE (a.pr_original_oli_id__c IS NULL OR a.pr_original_oli_id__c = 'null')
      AND a.provisioning_status IN ('Active', 'Suspended')
      AND b.provisioning_status IN ('Active', 'Suspended')
      AND substr(a.bancan, 1, 1) IN ('2', '4', '5', '7')
      and a.acct_id = b.acct_id 
      --and a.vlocity_cmt__assetreferenceid__c = b.external_asset_reference_id__c
       and b.vlocity_cmt__assetreferenceid__c = a.external_asset_reference_id__c
       and a.acct_segment = 'B2C'
)
SELECT 
distinct 
    *
FROM assets a
WHERE  EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".stg_sf_vlocity_json_att_cat_prb2c_mobile b
    WHERE a.device_external_asset_reference_id__c = b.external_asset_reference_id__c
      AND a.device_vlocity_cmt__assetreferenceid__c = b.vlocity_cmt__assetreferenceid__c
     -- AND b.sa_name IN ('AT&T Generic Accessory', 'AT&T Generic Basic Phone','AT&T Generic Mobile Phone')
      and b.attributeuniquecode__c = 'PR_B2C_ATT_OriginalInstallmentID'
      and length(b."attributeruntimeinfo.value") >0
) and device_external_asset_reference_id__c is not null;

Description: Discrepancy report for Instalment charge – valid instalment charged on the pending invoice. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH pending_filtered AS (
    SELECT 
        ban_can,
        msisdn,
        rate,
        amount,
        service,
		plan_instance_number,
		plan_instance_cdi,
        TRY(CAST(date_parse(regexp_replace(transaction_date, '[-]', '/'), '%m/%d/%Y') AS date)) AS invoice_date
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_lla_pending_inv_line_dtl
    WHERE service = 'Generic Device'
    and transaction_type = 'Recurring Charge'
),

hierarchy_filtered AS (
    SELECT 
        client_acct_id,
        msisdn,
        inst_monthly_amt,
        addon_plan_names,
        inst_id,
        inst_nbr_of_pymts,
        general_device_oli_id,
        inst_nbr_of_pymts_inv,
        cast(cast(inst_nbr_of_pymts as double)as int) as overall_installment_months,
        cast(cast(inst_nbr_of_pymts_inv as double)as int) as paid_installment_months
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_hierarchy_all_status_reverse
    WHERE --addon_plan_names LIKE '%General_Device%'
   
     coalesce (group_plan_status,'Active') = 'Active' and coalesce (rate_plan_status,'Active') = 'Active' 
	 and( general_device_plan_status LIKE '%Active%' or (general_device_plan_status like '%Canceled%' and coalesce (inst_nbr_of_pymts,'')=coalesce (inst_nbr_of_pymts_inv,''))
)),
combined_data AS (
    SELECT 
        p.ban_can,
        p.msisdn AS invoice_msisdn,
        p.invoice_date,
        h.msisdn AS aria_msisdn,
        p.rate,
        p.amount,
        p.plan_instance_number,
        p.plan_instance_cdi,
        h.inst_monthly_amt,
        p.service,
        h.addon_plan_names,
        h.client_acct_id,
        h.inst_id,
        h.inst_nbr_of_pymts,
        h.inst_nbr_of_pymts_inv,
        h.overall_installment_months - h.paid_installment_months as diff_ins_months,
        CASE
    WHEN
    EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sf_order sfo
      WHERE sfo.pr_msisdn__c = p.msisdn
        AND sfo.bancan        = p.ban_can
        AND COALESCE(sfo.order_type, '') = 'Disconnect'
    )
    AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_billed_unbilled_report arb
      WHERE arb.msisdn = p.msisdn
        AND arb.bancan = p.ban_can
    )
    THEN 'Disconnected in SF and NSO order triggered'
    
    WHEN h.client_acct_id IS NULL
    THEN 'BAN_CAN not found in Hierarchy'

  WHEN h.msisdn IS NULL OR p.msisdn <> h.msisdn
    THEN 'MSISDN mismatch or missing'

  ELSE 'Both tables have matching records'
END AS match_status

    FROM pending_filtered p
    LEFT JOIN hierarchy_filtered h 
        ON p.ban_can = h.client_acct_id 
        and h.general_device_oli_id like '%'|| p.plan_instance_cdi||'%'
   
),
ar_details AS (
SELECT
ar.client_acct_id ar_client_acct_id, ar.msisdn ar_msisdn,ar.customer_type,ar.bill_day,general_device_oli_id,
COALESCE(
TRY(CAST(date_parse(ar.rate_plan_status_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date)),
TRY(CAST(date_parse(ar.rate_plan_status_date, '%m/%d/%Y') AS date))
) AS ar_rate_plan_status_date_dt
FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_hierarchy_all_status_reverse ar
),final_report as (
SELECT 
    'DQ-0000131' as dq_no,
    ban_can,
    invoice_msisdn,
    plan_instance_cdi invoice_oli_id,
    ar.customer_type,
    ar.bill_day,
    invoice_date,
    ar.ar_rate_plan_status_date_dt,
    aria_msisdn,
    client_acct_id,
    inst_id,
    rate,
    amount,
    inst_monthly_amt,
    service,
    addon_plan_names,
    match_status,
    CASE 
        WHEN match_status = 'Both tables have matching records' THEN
            CASE 
                WHEN ABS(COALESCE(CAST(inst_monthly_amt AS DOUBLE), 0.0) - COALESCE(CAST(rate AS DOUBLE), 0.0)) > 0.01 THEN
                    'inst_monthly_amt vs rate mismatch'
                WHEN ABS(COALESCE(CAST(inst_monthly_amt AS DOUBLE), 0.0) - COALESCE(CAST(amount AS DOUBLE), 0.0)) > 0.01 THEN
                    'inst_monthly_amt vs amount mismatch'
                ELSE 
                    'Amounts match within tolerance'
            END
        ELSE 
            'Record/MSISDN missing - cannot compare amounts'
    END AS discrepancy_type,
    CASE 
        WHEN match_status = 'Both tables have matching records' THEN
            ROUND(COALESCE(CAST(inst_monthly_amt AS DOUBLE), 0.0) - COALESCE(CAST(rate AS DOUBLE), 0.0), 2)
        ELSE NULL
    END AS diff_inst_vs_rate,
    CASE 
        WHEN match_status = 'Both tables have matching records' THEN
            ROUND(COALESCE(CAST(inst_monthly_amt AS DOUBLE), 0.0) - COALESCE(CAST(amount AS DOUBLE), 0.0), 2)
        ELSE NULL
    END AS diff_inst_vs_amount,
    inst_nbr_of_pymts,
    inst_nbr_of_pymts_inv,
    diff_ins_months
FROM combined_data cd left join ar_details ar on ar.ar_client_acct_id = cd.ban_can and ar.general_device_oli_id like '%'|| plan_instance_cdi||'%'
WHERE 
    match_status not in ('Both tables have matching records' ,'Disconnected in SF and NSO order triggered')
    OR (match_status = 'Both tables have matching records' 
        AND (ABS(COALESCE(CAST(inst_monthly_amt AS DOUBLE), 0.0) - COALESCE(CAST(rate AS DOUBLE), 0.0)) > 0.01 
             OR ABS(COALESCE(CAST(inst_monthly_amt AS DOUBLE), 0.0) - COALESCE(CAST(amount AS DOUBLE), 0.0)) > 0.01))
             and diff_ins_months = 1 and rate <>amount
ORDER BY 
    ban_can,
    invoice_msisdn
)select * from final_report
where   invoice_date > coalesce(ar_rate_plan_status_date_dt,invoice_date)
;

Description: Discrepancy report to ensure duplicate Accelerated Instalment Orders are not created for the same instalment id​. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        order_type,
        bancan,
        acct_no,
        master_plan_instance_no,
        sku,
        order_date,
        order_no,
        quantity,
        unit_price,
        amount,
        order_line_comment,
        product,
        msisdn,
        installment_id,
        plan_description,
        client_instance_id,
        aria_instance_no,
        plan_status
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_billed_unbilled_report
    WHERE sku IN (
        'PR_B2C_Mobile_Postpaid_Installment_Balance_Account',
        'PR_B2B_Mobile_Postpaid_Installment_Balance_Account'
    )
      -- optional: filter out trash keys
      AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(msisdn), ''), 'NULL') <> 'NULL'
      AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(aria_instance_no), ''), 'NULL') <> 'NULL'
      AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(installment_id), ''), 'NULL') <> 'NULL'
and date_parse(order_date, '%m/%d/%Y') >= current_date - interval '15' day
),

/* How many rows per (msisdn, aria_instance_no, installment_id) */
pair_level AS (
    SELECT
        msisdn,
        aria_instance_no,
        installment_id,
        COUNT(*) AS instid_row_count
    FROM base
    GROUP BY
        msisdn,
        aria_instance_no,
        installment_id
),

/* How many distinct installments per (msisdn, aria_instance_no) */
msisdn_aria_level AS (
    SELECT
        msisdn,
        aria_instance_no,
        COUNT(DISTINCT installment_id) AS distinct_instid_count
    FROM base
    GROUP BY
        msisdn,
        aria_instance_no
),

/* Classify at (msisdn, aria_instance_no, installment_id) level */
classified AS (
    SELECT
        p.msisdn,
        p.aria_instance_no,
        p.installment_id,
        p.instid_row_count,
        m.distinct_instid_count,
        CASE
            WHEN p.instid_row_count > 1
                 AND m.distinct_instid_count > 1
                THEN 'BOTH'
            WHEN p.instid_row_count > 1
                THEN 'REPEATED_PAIR'
            WHEN m.distinct_instid_count > 1
                THEN 'MULTIPLE_INSTALLMENTS_FOR_MSISDN'
            ELSE 'NONE'
        END AS discrepancy_type,
        CASE
            WHEN p.instid_row_count > 1
                 OR m.distinct_instid_count > 1
                THEN 'Y'
            ELSE 'N'
        END AS is_repeat_installment
    FROM pair_level p
    JOIN msisdn_aria_level m
      ON  p.msisdn         = m.msisdn
      AND p.aria_instance_no = m.aria_instance_no
),

/* Join back to base to pull all other columns */
report AS (
    select
        c.msisdn,
        c.aria_instance_no,
        concat('Installment_ID - ' ,c.installment_id) installment_id,
        c.discrepancy_type,
        c.is_repeat_installment,
        b.bancan,
        b.acct_no,
        b.master_plan_instance_no,
        b.sku,
        b.order_date,
        b.order_no,
        b.order_type,
        b.quantity,
        b.unit_price,
        b.amount,
        b.order_line_comment,
        b.product,
        b.plan_description,
        b.client_instance_id,
        b.plan_status,
        am.bill_day,
        am.customer_type
    FROM classified c
    JOIN base b
      ON  b.msisdn          = c.msisdn
      AND b.aria_instance_no = c.aria_instance_no
      AND b.installment_id  = c.installment_id
          left join  "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_masterplan_details am on am.client_acct_id = b.bancan
)
SELECT
    'DQ-0000157' AS dq_no,
    bancan,
    msisdn,
    customer_type,
    bill_day,
    aria_instance_no,
    discrepancy_type,
    array_join(array_distinct(array_agg(installment_id)), ', ')     AS installment_id_list,
    array_join(array_distinct(array_agg(bancan)), ', ')             AS bancan_list,
    array_join(array_distinct(array_agg(order_no)), ', ')           AS order_no_list,
    array_join(array_distinct(array_agg(order_date)), ', ')         AS order_date_list,
    array_join(array_distinct(array_agg(sku)), ', ')                AS sku_list,
    array_join(array_distinct(array_agg(order_type)), ', ')         AS order_type_list,
    array_join(array_distinct(array_agg(plan_description)), ', ')   AS plan_description_list,
    array_join(array_distinct(array_agg(plan_status)), ', ')        AS plan_status_list
FROM report
WHERE is_repeat_installment = 'Y'
GROUP BY
    msisdn,
    aria_instance_no,
    discrepancy_type,
    bancan,
     bill_day,
    aria_instance_no    ,
    customer_type
ORDER BY
    msisdn,
    aria_instance_no;

Description: Discrepancy report of completed Installment having ACtive installment status in Aria. Custom Query
Custom Query:
select 'DQ-0000183' as dq_no,client_acct_id,msisdn,customer_type,test_acct_ind,acct_status ,bill_day ,dunning_state ,master_plan_status ,group_plan_oli_id ,group_plan_name ,rate_plan_oli_id ,rate_plan_name ,
active_general_device_oli_id ,active_general_device_plan_name ,inst_string ,inst_nbr_of_pymts,inst_nbr_of_pymts_inv,inst_nbr_promos,inst_nbr_promos_inv,inst_promo_bal,inst_start_date,date_add(

Description: Discrepancy report of Roadside assistance addon. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH sf AS (
    SELECT
        bancan sf_bancan,
        msisdn sf_msisdn,
        acct_segment sf_acct_sgement,
        vip_account__c sf_test_acct,
        device_contract_term__c sf_device_contract_term,
        device_classcode sf_device_class_code,
        acct_status sf_acct_status,
        acct_status_std AS sf_acct_status_std,
        bill_acct_status sf_bill_acct_status,
        billfromdate_pr sf_bill_day,
        plan_created_on  sf_plan_created_on,
        plan_id sf_plan_id,
        plan_oli_id sf_plan_oli_id,
        plan_code sf_plan_name,
        plan_name sf_plan_desc,
        plan_status sf_plan_status,
        plan_status_std sf_plan_status_std,
        device_id sf_device_id,
        device_oli_id sf_device_oli_id,
        device_code sf_device_name,
        device_name sf_device_desc,
        device_status sf_device_status,
        device_status_std sf_device_status_std,
        device_installment_id sf_inst_id,
        split_part(plan_ra_asset_id, ',', 1)     AS sf_ra_asset_id,
        split_part(plan_ra_oli_id, ',', 1)       AS sf_ra_oli_id,
        split_part(plan_ra_product_code, ',', 1) AS sf_ra_plan_name,
        split_part(plan_ra_status, ',', 1)       AS sf_ra_status,
        CAST(
            TRY_CAST(
                NULLIF(
                    NULLIF(TRIM(split_part(plan_ra_rec_charge, ',', 1)), 'null'),
                    ''
                ) AS DOUBLE
            ) AS INTEGER
        ) AS  sf_ra_price_int,
        TRIM(split_part(plan_ra_rec_charge, ',', 1))  AS  sf_ra_price_raw
		FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sf_all_segment_hierarchy_w_installment
		where acct_status_std = 'Active'
		--AND (device_code IS NULL OR device_code NOT IN ('PR_B2C_Liberty_Connected_Wearable'))
		AND (plan_code  IS NULL OR plan_code  NOT IN ('PR_B2B_Liberty_BUS_UNL_Wearable','PR_B2C_Mobile_Accessory_Plan'))

),
ar AS (
    SELECT
        client_acct_id ar_bancan,
        msisdn ar_msisdn,
        acct_status ar_acct_status,
        acct_status_std AS ar_acct_status_std,
        test_acct_ind ar_test_acct,
        bill_day ar_bill_day,
        dunning_state ar_dunning_state,
        master_plan_status ar_master_plan_status,
        group_plan_oli_id ar_group_plan_oli_id,
        group_plan_name ar_group_plan_name,
        group_plan_description ar_group_plan_desc,
        group_plan_status ar_group_plan_status,
        rate_plan_oli_id ar_plan_oli_id,
        rate_plan_date ar_rate_plan_date,
        rate_plan_name ar_plan_name,
        rate_plan_description ar_plan_desc,
        rate_plan_status ar_plan_status,
        inst_id ar_inst_id,
        split_part(general_device_oli_id, ',', 1)              AS ar_device_oli_id,
        split_part(general_device_plan_name, ',', 1)           AS ar_device_name,
        split_part(general_device_plan_description, ',', 1)    AS ar_device_desc,
        split_part(general_device_plan_status, ',', 1)         AS ar_device_status,
        split_part(roadside_assistance_oli_id, ',', 1)           AS ar_ra_oli_id,
        split_part(roadside_assistance_plan_name, ',', 1)        AS ar_ra_plan_name,
        split_part(roadside_assistance_plan_status, ',', 1)      AS ar_ra_status,
        CAST(
            TRY_CAST(
                NULLIF(TRIM(LOWER(split_part(roadside_assistance_plan_rate, ',', 1))), 'null')
                AS DOUBLE
            ) AS INTEGER
        ) AS ar_ra_price_int,
        TRIM(LOWER(split_part(roadside_assistance_plan_rate, ',', 1))) as ar_ra_price_raw
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_hierarchy_all_status_reverse 
    where acct_status_std = 'Active'
    
),
sf_dedup as (
select * , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sf_bancan, sf_msisdn ORDER BY (CASE WHEN (sf_acct_status_std = 'Active') THEN 1 ELSE 2 END) ASC, 
(CASE WHEN (sf_bill_acct_status = 'Current') THEN 1 ELSE 2 END) ASC, 
(CASE WHEN (sf_plan_status = 'Active') THEN 1 WHEN (sf_plan_status = 'New') THEN 2 WHEN (sf_plan_status = 'Suspended') THEN 3 ELSE 9 END) ASC, 
(case when sf_plan_status_std = 'Active' then 1 else 9 end)ASC,
(CASE WHEN (coalesce (sf_device_status,'') = 'Active') THEN 1 WHEN (coalesce (sf_device_status,'') = 'New') THEN 2 WHEN (coalesce (sf_device_status,'') = 'Suspended') THEN 3 ELSE 9 END) ASC, 
(case when (coalesce (sf_ra_status,'') = 'Active') then 1 else 9 END) asc,
TRY_CAST(sf_plan_created_on AS timestamp) DESC) rn
from sf 
),
ar_dedup as (
select *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ar_bancan, ar_msisdn ORDER BY (CASE WHEN (ar_acct_status_std = 'Active') THEN 1 ELSE 2 END) ASC, 
(CASE WHEN (ar_master_plan_status = 'Active') THEN 1 ELSE 2 END) ASC, 
(CASE WHEN (ar_plan_status = 'Active') THEN 1 WHEN (ar_plan_status = 'New') THEN 2 WHEN (ar_plan_status = 'Suspended') THEN 3 ELSE 9 END) ASC, 
(case when coalesce(ar_group_plan_status,'')='Active' then 1 else 9 end) asc,
(CASE WHEN (ar_device_status = 'Active') THEN 1 WHEN (ar_device_status = 'New') THEN 2 WHEN (ar_device_status = 'Suspended') THEN 3 ELSE 9 END) ASC, 
(CASE WHEN (ar_ra_status = 'Active') THEN 1 WHEN (ar_ra_status = 'New') THEN 2 WHEN (ar_ra_status = 'Suspended') THEN 3 ELSE 9 END) ASC, 
TRY_CAST(ar_rate_plan_date AS timestamp) DESC) rn
from ar
),
aa AS (
    SELECT
        client_instance_id ar_oli_id,
        TRY_CAST(inst_nbr_of_pymts AS INTEGER)     AS ar_inst_nbr_of_pymts,
        TRY_CAST(inst_nbr_of_pymts_inv AS INTEGER)   AS ar_inst_nbr_of_pymts_inv,
        inst_status ar_inst_status
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".aria_accounts
),
joined AS (
    SELECT
        sf.*,
        ar.*,
        aa.ar_inst_nbr_of_pymts,
        aa.ar_inst_nbr_of_pymts_inv,
        aa.ar_inst_status
    FROM sf_dedup sf
    FULL OUTER JOIN ar_dedup ar
        ON sf.sf_bancan = ar.ar_bancan
       AND sf.sf_msisdn = ar.ar_msisdn
    LEFT JOIN aa
        ON aa.ar_oli_id = ar.ar_device_oli_id
        where   coalesce (sf.rn,0 ) = 1
       and coalesce(ar.rn,0) = 1
       and  sf.sf_plan_oli_id = ar.ar_plan_oli_id

),
valid_flag AS (
    SELECT
        *,
        case
	        
	        when ar_ra_status is null and sf_ra_status is null then true
	        
            WHEN sf_acct_status_std = 'Active'
             AND ar_acct_status_std = 'Active'
             AND COALESCE(ar_group_plan_status, 'Active') = 'Active'
             AND ar_plan_status = 'Active'
             AND sf_plan_status in ('Active' ,'Suspended','New')
             AND ar_plan_oli_id = sf_plan_oli_id
             AND ar_ra_status = 'Active'
             AND sf_ra_status in ('Active' ,'Suspended','New')
             AND COALESCE(ar_ra_price_int, 0) = COALESCE(sf_ra_price_int, 0)
            THEN true

            WHEN ar_plan_status = 'Canceled'
             AND sf_plan_status_std = 'Not Active'
            THEN true


            WHEN ar_dunning_state <> '0'
             AND sf_acct_status_std = 'Active'
             AND ar_acct_status_std = 'Active'
             AND COALESCE(ar_group_plan_status, 'Active') = 'Active'
             AND ar_plan_status = 'Active'
             AND sf_plan_status_std = 'Not Active'
             AND ar_plan_oli_id = sf_plan_oli_id
             AND ar_ra_status = 'Active'
             AND sf_ra_status = 'Active'
             AND COALESCE(ar_ra_price_int, 0) = COALESCE(sf_ra_price_int, 0)
            THEN true

           
            WHEN sf_ra_status <> 'Active'
             AND ar_ra_status <> 'Active'
            THEN true
            
            when sf_ra_status in ('Deleted','Disconnect')
             and ar_ra_status is null 
            then true 
            
            when ar_ra_status in ('Canceled','Terminated')
             and sf_ra_status is null 
            then true
            
            when sf_bill_acct_status = 'Final Suspension'
             and ar_acct_status is null 
            then true
            
            when sf_ra_oli_id = ar_ra_oli_id
              and sf_ra_status =ar_ra_status
              and sf_ra_price_int = ar_ra_price_int
            then true
            
            ELSE false
        END AS is_valid
    FROM joined
),
discrepancy_report AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM valid_flag
    WHERE NOT is_valid
),final_report as (
SELECT
    'DQ-00000191' AS dq_no,
coalesce (sf_bancan,ar_bancan) bancan, coalesce (sf_msisdn, ar_msisdn ) msisdn
,sf_acct_sgement,sf_test_acct,ar_test_acct,ar_dunning_state,ar_bill_day,sf_device_contract_term,sf_device_class_code,sf_acct_status,ar_acct_status,sf_bill_acct_status,ar_master_plan_status,ar_group_plan_status,
    sf_plan_id,sf_plan_oli_id,ar_plan_oli_id,sf_plan_name,ar_plan_name,sf_plan_status,ar_plan_status,sf_device_id,sf_device_oli_id,ar_device_oli_id,sf_device_status,ar_device_status,sf_inst_id, ar_inst_id,ar_inst_status,ar_inst_nbr_of_pymts,ar_inst_nbr_of_pymts_inv,
