    sf_ra_asset_id,sf_ra_oli_id,ar_ra_oli_id,sf_ra_plan_name,ar_ra_plan_name,sf_ra_status,ar_ra_status,sf_ra_price_raw,ar_ra_price_raw,sf_ra_price_int,ar_ra_price_int
FROM discrepancy_report )
select  dq_no,bancan,msisdn,sf_acct_sgement,sf_test_acct,ar_test_acct,ar_dunning_state,ar_bill_day,sf_device_contract_term,sf_device_class_code,sf_acct_status,ar_acct_status,sf_bill_acct_status,ar_master_plan_status,ar_group_plan_status,sf_plan_id,sf_plan_oli_id,ar_plan_oli_id,sf_plan_name,ar_plan_name,sf_plan_status,ar_plan_status,sf_device_id,sf_device_oli_id,ar_device_oli_id,sf_device_status,ar_device_status,sf_inst_id,ar_inst_id,ar_inst_status,ar_inst_nbr_of_pymts,ar_inst_nbr_of_pymts_inv,sf_ra_asset_id,sf_ra_oli_id,ar_ra_oli_id,sf_ra_plan_name,ar_ra_plan_name,sf_ra_status,ar_ra_status,sf_ra_price_raw,ar_ra_price_raw,
array_join(
filter(
ARRAY[
-- presence checks (the ones your old query could not see)
IF(sf_plan_oli_id IS NULL AND ar_plan_oli_id IS NOT NULL, 'SF_PLAN_MISSING', NULL),
IF(ar_plan_oli_id IS NULL AND sf_plan_oli_id IS NOT NULL, 'AR_PLAN_MISSING', NULL),
IF(sf_ra_oli_id IS NULL AND ar_ra_oli_id IS NOT NULL, 'SF_RA_OLI_MISSING', NULL),
IF(ar_ra_oli_id IS NULL AND sf_ra_oli_id IS NOT NULL, 'AR_RA_OLI_MISSING', NULL),
-- price/status checks
IF(sf_ra_price_int IS NULL AND ar_ra_price_int IS NOT NULL, 'sf_ra_price_int_MISSING', NULL),
IF(ar_ra_price_int IS NULL AND sf_ra_price_int IS NOT NULL, 'ar_ra_price_int_MISSING', NULL),
IF(
sf_ra_status IS NOT NULL
AND ar_ra_status IS NOT NULL
AND sf_ra_status <> ar_ra_status,
'ROADSIDE_ASSISTANCE_STATUS_MISMATCH',
NULL
),
IF(
COALESCE(sf_ra_price_int, 0) <> COALESCE(ar_ra_price_int, 0),
'ROADSIDE_ASSISTANCE_RATE_MISMATCH',
NULL
),

-- core plan OLI mismatch (important and explicit)
IF(
sf_plan_oli_id IS NOT NULL
AND ar_plan_oli_id IS NOT NULL
AND sf_plan_oli_id <> ar_plan_oli_id,
'PLAN_OLI_MISMATCH',
NULL
)
],
x -> x IS NOT NULL
),
'; '
) AS aggregated_issues,
CASE
WHEN ar_ra_price_int IS NULL
AND sf_ra_price_int IS NOT null
and sf_ra_status=ar_ra_status
THEN 'Aria_Rate_Missing'
WHEN sf_ra_price_int IS NULL
AND ar_ra_price_int IS NOT null
and sf_ra_status=ar_ra_status
THEN 'SF_Rate_Missing'
WHEN sf_ra_price_int = 6
AND ar_ra_price_int < 6
THEN 'AR_Rate_incorrect'
WHEN sf_ra_price_int < 6
AND ar_ra_price_int = 6
THEN 'SF_Rate_incorrect'
WHEN ar_ra_price_int = 0
AND sf_ra_price_int <> 0
THEN 'AR_Rate_set_to_Zero'
WHEN ar_ra_price_int <> 0
AND sf_ra_price_int = 0
THEN 'SF_Rate_set_to_Zero'
WHEN sf_ra_status = 'Active'
AND ar_ra_status IS NULL
THEN 'Road_Side_Assistance_missing_in_Aria'
WHEN sf_ra_status IS NULL
AND ar_ra_status = 'Active'
THEN 'Road_Side_Assistance_missing_in_SF'
WHEN sf_ra_status = 'Active'
AND ar_ra_status <> 'Active'
THEN 'Road_Side_Assistance_not_active_in_Aria'
WHEN sf_ra_status <> 'Active'
AND ar_ra_status = 'Active'
THEN 'Road_Side_Assistance_not_active_in_SF'
WHEN ar_ra_oli_id <> sf_ra_oli_id
THEN 'Road_Side_Assistance_Oli_mismatch'
WHEN sf_ra_price_int <> ar_ra_price_int
THEN 'Rate_Mimsmatch'
ELSE NULL
END AS discrepancy_reason from final_report
where not ( lower(coalesce(sf_test_acct,'false')) like 'true' and coalesce(ar_test_acct,'0') = '1')

Description: Instalment: Check if the Aria(Installment Strings) has less than or more than 18 pipes (|). Custom Query
Custom Query:
with instr_strin_validation as (select customer_type ,client_acct_id ,bill_day,msisdn,master_plan_status ,group_plan_status ,rate_plan_status ,general_device_plan_status ,
inst_string ,inst_string_accessory ,
LENGTH(Inst_String) - LENGTH(REPLACE(Inst_String, '|', '')) AS pipe_count_device,
        CASE
            WHEN LENGTH(Inst_String) - LENGTH(REPLACE(Inst_String, '|', '')) != 18 THEN 'Invalid'
            ELSE 'Valid'
        END AS validation_status_device,
        
        LENGTH(inst_string_accessory) - LENGTH(REPLACE(inst_string_accessory, '|', '')) AS pipe_count_accessory,
        CASE
            WHEN LENGTH(inst_string_accessory) - LENGTH(REPLACE(inst_string_accessory, '|', '')) != 18 THEN 'Invalid'
            ELSE 'Valid'
        END AS validation_status_accessory
from "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_hierarchy_all_status_reverse where acct_status_std = 'Active')
select 'DQ-0000078' as dq_no,* from instr_strin_validation where (validation_status_device = 'Invalid' or validation_status_accessory = 'Invalid')

Description: Discrepancy report of missing promotions in Aria recurring credit. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH aria_prom AS (
	SELECT
		client_acct_id,
		msisdn,
		customer_type,
		bill_day,
		test_acct_ind,
		group_plan_name,
		group_plan_date,
		rate_plan_name,
		rate_plan_date,
		active_general_device_oli_id general_device_oli_id,
		active_general_device_aria_instance_no general_device_aria_instance_no,
		active_general_device_plan_date general_device_plan_date,
		inst_id,
		inst_status,
		inst_promo_monthly_amt,
		inst_promo_bal,
		inst_nbr_promos_inv,
		inst_nbr_promos,
		inst_nbr_of_pymts
	FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_hierarchy_all_status_reverse
	WHERE acct_status = 'Active'
		AND COALESCE(group_plan_status, 'Active') = 'Active'
		AND COALESCE(rate_plan_status, 'Active') = 'Active'
		AND active_general_device_plan_status = 'Active'
		AND LOWER(inst_status) = 'active'
	---	AND (
	---	CAST(inst_nbr_promos AS INTEGER) - CAST(inst_nbr_promos_inv AS INTEGER)
	---	) > 1
               AND (
      COALESCE(TRY_CAST(inst_nbr_promos AS DOUBLE), 0) 
  - COALESCE(TRY_CAST(inst_nbr_promos_inv AS DOUBLE), 0)
) > 1
		AND TRUNCATE(CAST(inst_promo_bal AS DECIMAL(18, 4)), 0) <> 0
		AND (
		dunning_state is null
		OR dunning_state <> '2'
		)
),

-- All recurring credits, ALL statuses
rec_credit_all AS (
    SELECT
        installment_id,
        ban_can,
        rec_credit_number,
        created_date,    -- varchar, e.g. '11/12/2024'
        TRY_CAST(date_parse(created_date, '%m/%d/%Y') AS DATE) AS created_date_parsed,
        credit_amount,
        credits_completed,
        credits_remaining,
        plan_instance_number,
        plan_instance_id,
        credit_status,
        service_code
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_lla_recurr_credits_installment
),

-- Only the "valid" statuses we actually expect to map to installments
rec_credit_raw AS (
    SELECT
        installment_id,
        ban_can,
        rec_credit_number,
        created_date,
        created_date_parsed,
        credit_amount,
        credits_completed,
        credits_remaining,
        plan_instance_number,
        plan_instance_id,
        credit_status,
        service_code
    FROM rec_credit_all
    WHERE credit_status IN ('Credits Created, Incomplete', 'Credits Created, Complete')
),

-- Deduplicate recurring credit entries by BAN/CAN + plan + installment_id for valid statuses
rec_credit_dedup AS (
    SELECT
        installment_id,
        ban_can,
        rec_credit_number,
        created_date,
        created_date_parsed,
        credit_amount,
        credits_completed,
        credits_remaining,
        plan_instance_number,
        plan_instance_id,
        credit_status,
        service_code,
        dup_count
    FROM (
        SELECT
            installment_id,
            ban_can,
            rec_credit_number,
            created_date,
            created_date_parsed,
            credit_amount,
            credits_completed,
            credits_remaining,
            plan_instance_number,
            plan_instance_id,
            credit_status,
            service_code,
            COUNT(*) OVER (
                PARTITION BY ban_can, plan_instance_number, installment_id
            ) AS dup_count,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                PARTITION BY ban_can, plan_instance_number, installment_id
                ORDER BY created_date_parsed DESC, rec_credit_number DESC
            ) AS rn
        FROM rec_credit_raw
    ) t
    WHERE rn = 1
),

-- Plan exists with a VALID status
rec_credit_plan_valid AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        ban_can,
        plan_instance_number
    FROM rec_credit_raw
),

-- Plan exists with ANY status (even invalid ones)
rec_credit_plan_any AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        ban_can,
        plan_instance_number
    FROM rec_credit_all
),

-- Plan exists with ANY status (even invalid ones)
rec_credit_no_inst_num AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        ban_can,
        plan_instance_number,
		installment_id,
		plan_instance_id,
		rec_credit_number,
		service_code
    FROM rec_credit_dedup
),


joined AS (
    SELECT
        ap.client_acct_id,
        ap.msisdn,
        ap.customer_type,
        ap.bill_day,
        ap.test_acct_ind,
        ap.group_plan_name,
        ap.group_plan_date,
        ap.rate_plan_name,
        ap.rate_plan_date,
        ap.general_device_oli_id,
        ap.general_device_aria_instance_no,
        ap.general_device_plan_date,
        ap.inst_id,
        ap.inst_status,
        ap.inst_promo_monthly_amt,
        ap.inst_promo_bal,
		ap.inst_nbr_promos_inv,
		ap.inst_nbr_promos,
		ap.inst_nbr_of_pymts,

        rcd.ban_can,
        rcd.plan_instance_number,
        rcd.installment_id AS rc_installment_id,
        rcd.rec_credit_number,
        rcd.created_date,
        rcd.created_date_parsed,
        rcd.credit_amount,
        rcd.credits_completed,
        rcd.credits_remaining,
        rcd.credit_status,
        rcd.service_code,
        rcd.dup_count,
		length (rcni.plan_instance_number) has_plan_inst_number,
		length (rcni.plan_instance_id) has_plan_inst_id,
		case 
		    when rcni.rec_credit_number is not null then 1  else 0
		end as has_rec_credit_number,
        CASE 
            WHEN rcpv.ban_can IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0
        END AS has_plan_valid_credit,

        CASE
            WHEN rcpa.ban_can IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0
        END AS has_plan_any_credit
    FROM aria_prom ap
    LEFT JOIN rec_credit_dedup rcd
        ON ap.client_acct_id = rcd.ban_can
       AND ap.general_device_aria_instance_no = rcd.plan_instance_number
       AND ap.inst_id = rcd.installment_id
    LEFT JOIN rec_credit_plan_valid rcpv
        ON ap.client_acct_id = rcpv.ban_can
       AND ap.general_device_aria_instance_no = rcpv.plan_instance_number
    LEFT JOIN rec_credit_plan_any rcpa
        ON ap.client_acct_id = rcpa.ban_can
       AND ap.general_device_aria_instance_no = rcpa.plan_instance_number
	LEFT JOIN rec_credit_no_inst_num rcni 
	     ON rcni.ban_can = ap.client_acct_id 
	   AND rcni.installment_id = ap.inst_id
),

eval_flags AS (
    SELECT
        client_acct_id,
        msisdn,
        customer_type,
        bill_day,
        test_acct_ind,
        group_plan_name,
        group_plan_date,
        rate_plan_name,
        rate_plan_date,
        general_device_oli_id,
        general_device_aria_instance_no,
        general_device_plan_date,
        inst_id,
        inst_status,
        inst_promo_monthly_amt,
        inst_promo_bal,
		inst_nbr_promos_inv,
		inst_nbr_promos,
		inst_nbr_of_pymts,

        ban_can,
        plan_instance_number,
        rc_installment_id,
        rec_credit_number,
        created_date,
        created_date_parsed,
        credit_amount,
        credits_completed,
        credits_remaining,
        credit_status,
        service_code,
        dup_count,
        has_plan_valid_credit,
        has_plan_any_credit,

        CAST(inst_promo_monthly_amt AS DECIMAL(18,4)) AS inst_promo_monthly_amt_num,
        CAST(credit_amount        AS DECIMAL(18,4))   AS credit_amount_num,

        TRUNCATE(CAST(inst_promo_monthly_amt AS DECIMAL(18,4)), 0) AS inst_promo_amt_truncated,
        TRUNCATE(CAST(credit_amount        AS DECIMAL(18,4)), 0)   AS credit_amount_truncated,

        -- Duplicate recurring credit rows (on the valid-status set)
        CASE
            WHEN rc_installment_id IS NOT NULL
                 AND dup_count > 1 THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS is_duplicate_rec_credit,

        -- Installment ID mismatch: valid plan exists, but no row for this inst_id
        CASE
            WHEN rc_installment_id IS NULL
                 AND has_plan_valid_credit = 1
            THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS is_installment_id_mismatch,


        CASE
            WHEN rc_installment_id IS NULL
                 AND has_plan_valid_credit = 0
                 AND has_plan_any_credit   = 1
            THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS is_missing_rec_credit_invalid_status,

        -- Truly missing: no record at all in recurring credits table
        CASE
            WHEN rc_installment_id IS NULL
                 AND has_plan_any_credit = 0
				 and (has_plan_inst_number <> 0 or has_plan_inst_number is null )
            THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS is_missing_rec_credit_absent,
		
		CASE 
			when has_rec_credit_number = 1
			     and has_plan_inst_id = 0 
				 and has_plan_any_credit   = 0
			then 1
			else 0
		end as is_missing_plan_instance_number,
		

        -- Amount mismatch using ±1 tolerance after truncation
        CASE
            WHEN rc_installment_id IS NOT NULL
                 AND ABS(
                        TRUNCATE(CAST(inst_promo_monthly_amt AS DECIMAL(18,4)), 0)
                        -
                        TRUNCATE(CAST(credit_amount        AS DECIMAL(18,4)), 0)
                     ) > 1
            THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS is_amount_mismatch,
        
        --- Insatallment number of payments match with credit completed
        case
        	when (cast(inst_nbr_promos as integer) <> ( cast(credits_completed as integer) + cast (credits_remaining as integer)) and credit_status = 'Credits Created, Complete')
        	then 1
        	else 0
        end as is_credits_completed
        
        
    FROM joined
),
discrepancy_report as (
SELECT
    'DQ-0000165' AS dq_no,  

    -- Core identifiers
    client_acct_id,
    msisdn,
    customer_type,
    bill_day,
    test_acct_ind,
    group_plan_name,
    group_plan_date,
    rate_plan_name,
    rate_plan_date,
    general_device_oli_id,
    general_device_aria_instance_no,
    general_device_plan_date,
    concat('Installment_ID - ',inst_id) inst_id,
    inst_status,

    -- Aria promo --
    inst_promo_bal,
	inst_nbr_promos_inv,
	inst_nbr_promos,
--    inst_promo_monthly_amt_num,
--    inst_promo_amt_truncated,
    inst_promo_monthly_amt,

    -- Recurring credit side --
--    ban_can,
--    plan_instance_number,
--    rc_installment_id,
    credit_amount,
    rec_credit_number,
    created_date,
--    created_date_parsed,
--    credit_amount_num,
--    credit_amount_truncated,
    credit_status,
    service_code,
    credits_completed,
    credits_remaining,
/*	
    dup_count,
    has_plan_valid_credit,
    has_plan_any_credit,

    -- Flags --
    is_duplicate_rec_credit,
    is_installment_id_mismatch,
    is_missing_rec_credit_invalid_status,
    is_missing_rec_credit_absent,
    is_amount_mismatch,

    -- Individual reasons --
    CASE WHEN is_duplicate_rec_credit = 1
         THEN 'Duplicate recurring credit rows found (BAN/CAN + plan + installment) with valid credit status'
    END AS duplicate_rec_credit_reason,

    CASE WHEN is_installment_id_mismatch = 1
         THEN 'Installment ID mismatch: recurring credit exists for BAN/CAN + plan instance with valid status, but installment_id does not match Aria inst_id'
    END AS installment_id_mismatch_reason,

    CASE WHEN is_missing_rec_credit_invalid_status = 1
         THEN 'Recurring credit exists for BAN/CAN + plan instance, but credit_status is not in (''Credits Created, Incomplete'',''Credits Created, Complete'')'
    END AS missing_rec_credit_invalid_status_reason,

    CASE WHEN is_missing_rec_credit_absent = 1
         THEN 'No recurring credit record exists for BAN/CAN + plan instance in recurring credits table'
    END AS missing_rec_credit_absent_reason,

    CASE WHEN is_amount_mismatch = 1
         THEN 'Promo amount and recurring credit amount mismatch after truncation with ±1 tolerance'
    END AS amount_mismatch_reason,
*/
    -- Combined human-readable reason
    CONCAT_WS(
        ' | ',
        CASE WHEN is_duplicate_rec_credit = 1
             THEN 'Duplicate recurring credit rows found (BAN/CAN + plan + installment) with valid credit status' END,
        CASE WHEN is_installment_id_mismatch = 1
             THEN 'Installment ID mismatch: recurring credit exists for BAN/CAN + plan instance with valid status, but installment_id does not match Aria inst_id' END,
        CASE WHEN is_missing_rec_credit_invalid_status = 1
             THEN 'Recurring credit exists for BAN/CAN + plan instance, but credit_status is not in (''Credits Created, Incomplete'',''Credits Created, Complete'')' END,
        CASE WHEN is_missing_rec_credit_absent = 1
             THEN 'No recurring credit record exists for BAN/CAN + plan instance in recurring credits table' END,
		CASE when is_missing_plan_instance_number = 1
		     THEN 'Recurring service credit not tied to Device Plan Instance' end,
        CASE WHEN is_amount_mismatch = 1
             THEN 'Promo amount and recurring credit amount mismatch after truncation with ±1 tolerance' end,
        case when is_credits_completed = 1
        	 then 'Recurring Credit frequency does not match with Promotion term' end
    ) AS discrepancy_reason

FROM eval_flags WHERE
is_duplicate_rec_credit = 1
OR is_installment_id_mismatch = 1
OR is_missing_rec_credit_invalid_status = 1
OR is_missing_rec_credit_absent = 1
OR is_amount_mismatch = 1
or is_credits_completed = 1
or is_missing_plan_instance_number = 1)
select distinct * from discrepancy_report where (
discrepancy_reason like '%Recurring service credit not tied to Device Plan Instance%'
or
discrepancy_reason like  '%No recurring credit record exists for BAN/CAN + plan instance in recurring credits table%'
);

Description: Discrepancy report for SF Oli ID and Aria Client Instance ID mismatches for B2B customers. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH
sf AS (
    select
        acct_status,
        bill_acct_status,
        bancan,
        msisdn,
        plan_id,
        plan_oli_id,
        plan_code,
        plan_asset_ref,
        NULLIF(
            CASE
                WHEN plan_oli_id IS NULL THEN NULL
                WHEN lower(trim(plan_oli_id)) IN ('', 'null') THEN NULL
                ELSE trim(plan_oli_id)
            END,
            ''
        ) AS sf_plan_oli_id_norm
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sf_all_segment_hierarchy
    WHERE acct_status_std = 'Active'
      AND plan_status_std = 'Active'
      AND lower(vip_account__c) = 'false'
      AND acct_segment = 'B2B'
      AND acct_paymenttype = 'Postpaid'
      and plan_code not in ('PR_B2C_Mobile_Accessory_Plan','PR_B2C_Liberty_Connected_Wearable')
),
ar AS (
    SELECT
        client_acct_id AS bancan,
        msisdn,
        acct_status,
        master_plan_status,
        dunning_state,
        bill_day,
        rate_plan_oli_id,
        rate_plan_name,
        NULLIF(
            CASE
                WHEN rate_plan_oli_id IS NULL THEN NULL
                WHEN lower(trim(rate_plan_oli_id)) IN ('', 'null') THEN NULL
                ELSE trim(rate_plan_oli_id)
            END,
            ''
        ) AS ar_rate_plan_oli_id_norm
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_hierarchy_all_status_reverse
    WHERE acct_status_std = 'Active'
      AND rate_plan_status = 'Active'
      and coalesce(group_plan_status,'Active') = 'Active'
      and customer_type = 'B2B'
      AND test_acct_ind = '0'
      and rate_plan_name not in ('PR_B2C_Mobile_Accessory_Plan','PR_B2C_Mobile_Late_Payment_Fee','PR_B2C_Liberty_Connected_Wearable')
),
report as (
select distinct
    'DQ-0000099' AS DQ_No,
    COALESCE(sf.bancan, ar.bancan)   AS bancan,
    COALESCE(sf.msisdn, ar.msisdn)   AS msisdn,
    sf.acct_status,
    ar.acct_status,
    sf.bill_acct_status,
    ar.dunning_state,
    ar.master_plan_status,
    sf.plan_id,
    sf.plan_oli_id,
    ar.rate_plan_oli_id,
    sf.plan_code,
    ar.rate_plan_name,
   -- sf.plan_asset_ref,

    CASE
        WHEN sf.bancan IS NULL THEN 'Missing in Salesforce (record not found)'
        WHEN ar.bancan IS NULL THEN 'Missing in Aria (record not found)'

        WHEN sf.sf_plan_oli_id_norm IS NULL AND ar.ar_rate_plan_oli_id_norm IS NULL
            THEN 'OLI missing in both systems'
        WHEN sf.sf_plan_oli_id_norm IS NULL AND ar.ar_rate_plan_oli_id_norm IS NOT NULL
            THEN 'Salesforce plan_oli_id missing'
        WHEN sf.sf_plan_oli_id_norm IS NOT NULL AND ar.ar_rate_plan_oli_id_norm IS NULL
            THEN 'Aria rate_plan_oli_id missing'

        WHEN sf.sf_plan_oli_id_norm <> ar.ar_rate_plan_oli_id_norm
            THEN 'OLI mismatch between Salesforce and Aria'

        ELSE 'Match'
    END AS discrepancy_reason

FROM sf
FULL OUTER JOIN ar
  ON sf.bancan = ar.bancan
 AND sf.msisdn = ar.msisdn

)
select
	*
from
	report
where
	discrepancy_reason = 'OLI mismatch between Salesforce and Aria'

Description: DISCOUNTS: Appreciation Discount matches between SF and Aria Active Accounts / Plans. Custom Query
Custom Query:
select distinct 'DQ-0000046' as DQ_No,
	--v3
	vw.bancan AS A_bancan,
	vw.sf_acct_segment AS sf_acct_segment,
	--v3
	CASE
		WHEN sf_billfromdate_pr IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(
			EXTRACT(
				DAY
				FROM CAST(sf_billfromdate_pr AS DATE)
			) AS INT
		) ELSE -1
	END AS sf_billfromdate_pr_std,
	vw.sf_fan_number AS A_sf_fan_number,
	vw.ar_coupon_codes AS A_ar_coupon_codes,
	vw.ar_coupon_codes_active AS A_ar_coupon_codes_active,
	CASE
		WHEN EXISTS (
			SELECT 1
			FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".aria_accounts aa
			WHERE aa.client_acct_id = vw.bancan
				AND aa.plan_description = 'Liberty U-Pick Mobile Ultimate'
				AND aa.plan_status = 'Active'
		) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N'
	END AS is_liberty_u_pick_ultimate_active,
	ranked.vlocity_cmt__Reason__c,
	vw.sf_record_id,
	vw.sf_acct_status_std,
	vw.ar_customer_type,
	ranked.b2c_discount_applied__c,
	ranked.createddate,
	ranked.rn AS rank_number,
	ranked.ordernumber sf_ordernumber,
	ranked.vlocity_cmt__requestedstartdate__c sf_order_start_date,
	ranked.activateddate sf_actuvateddate,
	ranked.status sf_status,
	ranked.vlocity_cmt__fulfilmentstatus__c sf_order_fulfilmentstatus,
	ranked.vlocity_cmt__notes__c sf_order_notes,
	ranked.vlocity_cmt__orderstatus__c sf_vlty_order_status
FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_all_segement_accounts vw
	JOIN (
		SELECT b.*,
			ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
				PARTITION BY b.vlocity_cmt__defaultbillingaccountid__c
				ORDER BY b.createddate DESC
			) AS rn
		FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".stg_salesforce_order b
		where b.vlocity_cmt__Reason__c IN (
				'Apply Appreciation Discount',
				'Existing',
				'Existing Port-In',
				'New',
				'Port In'
			) --v2
			AND b.b2c_discount_applied__c = 'true'
			AND b.vlocity_cmt__orderstatus__c = 'Activated' -- V2
	) ranked ON ranked.vlocity_cmt__defaultbillingaccountid__c = vw.sf_record_id
WHERE -- vw.ar_customer_type = 'B2C'
	--AND 
	vw.sf_acct_status_std = 'Active'
	AND vw.ar_acct_status_std = 'Active'
	AND vw.ar_plan_status_std = 'Active'
	AND ranked.rn = 1 -- Only include the latest record (rank 1)
	AND ranked.vlocity_cmt__Reason__c IN (
		'Apply Appreciation Discount',
		'Existing',
		'Existing Port-In',
		'New',
		'Port In'
	)
	AND (
		UPPER(SUBSTRING(vw.sf_fan_number, 1, 12)) LIKE 'APPRDISCOUNT%'
		OR UPPER(vw.ar_coupon_codes_active) LIKE '%APPRDISCOUNT%'
	)
	AND UPPER(vw.ar_coupon_codes_active) NOT LIKE '%' || UPPER(SUBSTRING(vw.sf_fan_number, 1, 11)) || '%'
	AND LOWER(vw.ar_coupon_codes_active) <> 'no coupons found';

Description: Discrepancy report for SF Oli ID and Aria Client Instance ID mismatches for Generic Devices. B2C Customers. Custom Query
Custom Query:
with sf_generic_device as (
 select sf_parent_asset.bancan,
        sf_parent_asset.msisdn sf_parent_msisdn,
        sf_child_asset.msisdn sf_child_msisdn,
        sf_parent_asset.acct_segment sf_parent_asset_acct_segment,
        sf_parent_asset.id sf_parent_asset_id,
        sf_parent_asset.product2_code sf_parent_product2_code,
        sf_parent_asset.provisioning_status sf_parent_plan_status,
        sf_child_asset.id sf_child_asset_id,
        sf_child_asset.acct_id sf_child_acct_id,
        sf_child_asset.pr_original_oli_id__c sf_child_oli_id,
        sf_child_asset.product2_name sf_child_product2_name,
        sf_child_asset.product2_code sf_child_product2_code,
        sf_child_asset.provisioning_status sf_child_plan_status,
        sf_parent_asset.external_asset_reference_id__c sf_parent_external_assetrefid,
        length(sf_parent_asset.external_asset_reference_id__c) length_sf_parentasset,
        coalesce (sf_parent_asset.external_asset_reference_id__c,''),
        sfo.vlocity_cmt__OrderStatus__c,
        sfo.vlocity_cmt__Reason__c,
        sfo.orderid
    from "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sffinal_assets sf_parent_asset
        join "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sffinal_assets sf_child_asset on sf_parent_asset.acct_id = sf_child_asset.acct_id  
        left join  "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sf_order sfo on sfo.bancan = sf_parent_asset.bancan and sfo.pr_msisdn__c = sf_parent_asset.msisdn 
    where coalesce (sf_child_asset.external_asset_reference_id__c,'') <> ''
        and sf_parent_asset.vlocity_cmt__assetreferenceid__c = sf_child_asset.external_asset_reference_id__c
        --and lower(sf_parent_asset.product2_code) not like '%wear%'
        and lower(sf_child_asset.product2_code) not like '%wear%'
        and lower(sf_parent_asset.product2_name) not like '%byod%'
        and lower(sf_child_asset.product2_code) not like '%access%'
        and lower(sf_child_asset.product2_name) not like '%byod%'
        and sf_child_asset.provisioning_status not in ( 'Deleted' , 'Disconnect')
        and sf_parent_asset.provisioning_status not in ( 'Deleted' , 'Disconnect')
        and sf_child_asset.contract_term__c <> 'No Commit Retail Price'
        and sf_child_asset.msisdn is null),
ar_generic_device as ( select * from "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_hierarchy_all_status_reverse where group_plan_status = 'Active' and rate_plan_status ='Active'
and general_device_plan_name ='LLA_General_Device' and active_general_device_plan_status ='Active')    
select 
  'DQ-0000091' as DQ_No,
trim(ar.client_acct_id) bancan
, sf.sf_parent_msisdn
, sf.sf_parent_asset_acct_segment
, ar.bill_day
, sf.vlocity_cmt__OrderStatus__c
, sf.vlocity_cmt__Reason__c
, sf.orderid
, sf.sf_parent_asset_id 
, sf.sf_child_asset_id
, ar.general_device_oli_id ar_client_instance_id
, sf.sf_child_oli_id
, ar.rate_plan_oli_id rate_plan_oli_id
, ar.rate_plan_name rate_plan_name
, ar.rate_plan_description rate_plan_description
, ar.rate_plan_status rate_plan_status
, ar.addon_plan_names addon_plan_names
, ar.addon_plan_statuses addon_plan_statuses
, ar.rate_plan_name rate_plan_name
, sf.sf_child_product2_name
, sf.sf_child_product2_code
, sf.sf_parent_plan_status
, sf.sf_child_plan_status
, ar.general_device_plan_status
from sf_generic_device sf join ar_generic_device ar on sf.bancan = ar.client_acct_id and sf.sf_parent_msisdn = ar.msisdn 
where   trim(ar.general_device_oli_id) <> trim(sf.sf_child_oli_id)
and not (coalesce (vlocity_cmt__OrderStatus__c,'') = 'In Progress' and coalesce (vlocity_cmt__Reason__c,'') in ('Swap Lost or Stolen Device and SIM','Change Device - LCPR to LCPR','Buyers Remorse') )
and sf_parent_plan_status = 'Active' and sf_child_plan_status = 'Active' and general_device_plan_status  = 'Active' and rate_plan_status = 'Active'

Description: Discrepancy report between SF and Matrixx for International Roaming B2C customers. Custom Query
Custom Query:
with sf_roaming as (
    select 
        plan.bancan,
        plan.msisdn,
        plan.acct_segment,
        plan.id plan_asset_id,
        plan.product2_code,
        plan.provisioning_status,
        addon.id addon_asset_id,
        addon.product2_code,
        addon.product2_name,
        addon.provisioning_status roaming_provisioning_status
    from "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sffinal_assets plan,
         "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sffinal_assets addon
    where plan.msisdn is not null
      and plan.external_asset_reference_id__c is null 
      --and plan.bancan = '21513692-21515182'
      and addon.vlocity_cmt__ParentItemId__c = plan.id
      and addon.product2_name in ('International Roaming','Liberty International Passport')
),
mx_roaming_ranked as (
    select *,
           row_number() over (
               partition by msisdn, bancan 
               order by 
                   case 
                       when upper(PO_OFFER_STATUS) = 'ACTIVE' then 1
                       when upper(PO_OFFER_STATUS) like '%ACTIVE%' then 2
                       when PO_OFFER_STATUS is not null and upper(PO_OFFER_STATUS) != 'CANCEL' then 3
                       else 4
                   end,
                   PO_OFFER_STATUS
           ) as rown
    from "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_matrixx_plan 
    where lower(commercial_plan_name) like '%passport%'
),
mx_roaming as (
    select * from mx_roaming_ranked where rown = 1
)
select * 
from sf_roaming sf
full outer join mx_roaming mx on sf.msisdn = mx.msisdn and sf.bancan = mx.bancan
where roaming_provisioning_status not in ('Deleted', 'Disconnect')
and  sf.provisioning_status = 'Active'
  and (PO_OFFER_STATUS <> 'Cancel' or coalesce(PO_OFFER_STATUS,'') <> '')
  and acct_segment = 'B2C'
  and coalesce(roaming_provisioning_status,'') <> coalesce(PO_OFFER_STATUS,'')
  and (sf.provisioning_status <> 'Suspended' 
       and sf.roaming_provisioning_status <> 'Suspended' 
       and mx.SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS <> 'Lost-Stolen Suspend')
  and exists (
      select 1 
      from "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".aria_accounts 
      where test_acct_ind <> '1' 
        and client_acct_id = sf.bancan
  ) ;

Description: Plan Status consistency: Active in Aria must have corresponding Active in SF except for SF plan status as Suspeneded. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH sf AS (
    SELECT
        bancan sf_bancan,
        msisdn sf_msisdn,
        acct_segment sf_acct_sgement,
        vip_account__c sf_test_acct,
        device_contract_term__c sf_device_contract_term,
        device_classcode sf_device_class_code,
        acct_status sf_acct_status,
        acct_status_std AS sf_acct_status_std,
        bill_acct_status sf_bill_acct_status,
        billfromdate_pr sf_bill_day,
        plan_created_on  sf_plan_created_on,
        plan_id sf_plan_id,
        plan_oli_id sf_plan_oli_id,
        plan_code sf_plan_name,
        plan_name sf_plan_desc,
        plan_status sf_plan_status,
        plan_status_std sf_plan_status_std,
        device_id sf_device_id,
        device_oli_id sf_device_oli_id,
        device_code sf_device_name,
        device_name sf_device_desc,
        device_status sf_device_status,
        device_status_std sf_device_status_std,
        device_installment_id sf_inst_id
		FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sf_all_segment_hierarchy_w_installment
		where acct_status_std = 'Active'
		--AND (device_code IS NULL OR device_code NOT IN ('PR_B2C_Liberty_Connected_Wearable'))
		AND (plan_code  IS NULL OR plan_code  NOT IN ('PR_B2B_Liberty_BUS_UNL_Wearable','PR_B2C_Mobile_Accessory_Plan','PR_B2C_Liberty_Connected_Wearable','PR_B2B_Liberty_Business_Data_Pool_Wearable'))

),
ar AS (
    SELECT
        client_acct_id ar_bancan,
        msisdn ar_msisdn,
        acct_status ar_acct_status,
        acct_status_std AS ar_acct_status_std,
        test_acct_ind ar_test_acct,
        bill_day ar_bill_day,
        dunning_state ar_dunning_state,
        master_plan_description ar_master_plan_description,
        master_plan_status ar_master_plan_status,
        group_plan_oli_id ar_group_plan_oli_id,
        group_plan_name ar_group_plan_name,
        group_plan_description ar_group_plan_desc,
        group_plan_status ar_group_plan_status,
        rate_plan_oli_id ar_plan_oli_id,
        rate_plan_date ar_rate_plan_date,
        rate_plan_name ar_plan_name,
        rate_plan_description ar_plan_desc,
        rate_plan_status ar_plan_status,
        inst_id ar_inst_id,
        split_part(general_device_oli_id, ',', 1)              AS ar_device_oli_id,
split_part(general_device_plan_name, ',', 1)           AS ar_device_name,
split_part(general_device_plan_description, ',', 1)    AS ar_device_desc,
split_part(general_device_plan_status, ',', 1)         AS ar_device_status
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_hierarchy_all_status_reverse 
    where acct_status_std = 'Active'
    
),
sf_dedup as (
select * , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sf_bancan, sf_msisdn ORDER BY (CASE WHEN (sf_acct_status_std = 'Active') THEN 1 ELSE 2 END) ASC, 
(CASE WHEN (sf_bill_acct_status = 'Current') THEN 1 ELSE 2 END) ASC, 
(CASE WHEN (sf_plan_status = 'Active') THEN 1 WHEN (sf_plan_status = 'New') THEN 2 WHEN (sf_plan_status = 'Suspended') THEN 3 ELSE 9 END) ASC, 
(case when sf_plan_status_std = 'Active' then 1 else 9 end)ASC,
(CASE WHEN (coalesce (sf_device_status,'') = 'Active') THEN 1 WHEN (coalesce (sf_device_status,'') = 'New') THEN 2 WHEN (coalesce (sf_device_status,'') = 'Suspended') THEN 3 ELSE 9 END) asc,
TRY_CAST(sf_plan_created_on AS timestamp) DESC) rn
from sf 
),
ar_dedup as (
select *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ar_bancan, ar_msisdn ORDER BY (CASE WHEN (ar_acct_status_std = 'Active') THEN 1 ELSE 2 END) ASC, 
(CASE WHEN (ar_master_plan_status = 'Active') THEN 1 ELSE 2 END) ASC, 
(CASE WHEN (ar_plan_status = 'Active') THEN 1 WHEN (ar_plan_status = 'New') THEN 2 WHEN (ar_plan_status = 'Suspended') THEN 3 ELSE 9 END) ASC, 
(case when coalesce(ar_group_plan_status,'')='Active' then 1 else 9 end) asc,
(CASE WHEN (ar_device_status = 'Active') THEN 1 WHEN (ar_device_status = 'New') THEN 2 WHEN (ar_device_status = 'Suspended') THEN 3 ELSE 9 END) asc,
TRY_CAST(ar_rate_plan_date AS timestamp) DESC) rn
from ar
),
aa AS (
    SELECT
        client_instance_id ar_oli_id,
        TRY_CAST(inst_nbr_of_pymts AS INTEGER)     AS ar_inst_nbr_of_pymts,
        TRY_CAST(inst_nbr_of_pymts_inv AS INTEGER)   AS ar_inst_nbr_of_pymts_inv,
        inst_status ar_inst_status
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".aria_accounts
),
joined AS (
    SELECT
        sf.*,
        ar.*,
        aa.ar_inst_nbr_of_pymts,
        aa.ar_inst_nbr_of_pymts_inv,
        aa.ar_inst_status
    FROM sf_dedup sf
    FULL OUTER JOIN ar_dedup ar
        ON sf.sf_bancan = ar.ar_bancan
       AND sf.sf_msisdn = ar.ar_msisdn
    LEFT JOIN aa
        ON aa.ar_oli_id = ar.ar_device_oli_id
        where   coalesce (sf.rn,0 ) = 1
       and coalesce(ar.rn,0) = 1
       and  sf.sf_plan_oli_id = ar.ar_plan_oli_id

),
valid_flag AS (
    SELECT
        *,
        case
	        
	        
            WHEN sf_acct_status_std = 'Active'
             AND ar_acct_status_std = 'Active'
             AND COALESCE(ar_group_plan_status, 'Active') = 'Active'
             AND ar_plan_status = 'Active'
             AND sf_plan_status in ('Active' ,'Suspended','New')
             AND ar_plan_oli_id = sf_plan_oli_id
            THEN true

            WHEN ar_plan_status = 'Canceled'
            THEN true
            
            WHEN ar_group_plan_status = 'Canceled'
             AND sf_plan_status_std = 'Not Active'
            THEN true


            WHEN ar_dunning_state <> '0'
             AND sf_acct_status_std = 'Active'
             AND ar_acct_status_std = 'Active'
             AND COALESCE(ar_group_plan_status, 'Active') = 'Active'
             AND ar_plan_status = 'Active'
             AND sf_plan_status_std = 'Not Active'
             AND ar_plan_oli_id = sf_plan_oli_id
            THEN true

           
            
            when sf_bill_acct_status = 'Final Suspension'
             and ar_acct_status is null 
            then true
            
               
            when sf_bill_acct_status = 'Final Suspension'
             and ar_master_plan_status = 'Active Non-Billable'
            then true
            
            when ar_master_plan_status = 'Active Non-Billable'
            and sf_plan_status_std = 'Not Active'
            then true
            
            when sf_plan_status = 'deleted' 
            and ar_plan_status = 'Canceled'
            then true
            
            ELSE false
        END AS is_valid
    FROM joined
),
discrepancy_report AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM valid_flag
    WHERE NOT is_valid
)select 'DQ-00000081' AS dq_no,sf_bancan,sf_msisdn,sf_acct_sgement,sf_test_acct,ar_test_acct ,sf_acct_status,ar_acct_status,sf_acct_status_std,sf_bill_acct_status,ar_master_plan_description,ar_master_plan_status,sf_bill_day,ar_bill_day,ar_dunning_state,
sf_plan_created_on,ar_group_plan_oli_id,ar_group_plan_name,ar_group_plan_desc,ar_group_plan_status,sf_plan_id,sf_plan_oli_id,ar_plan_oli_id,sf_plan_name,ar_plan_name,sf_plan_desc,sf_plan_status,ar_plan_status
from discrepancy_report
where (lower(ar_plan_name) not like '%wearable%' and lower(ar_master_plan_description) not like '%wearable%')
and not ( lower(coalesce(sf_test_acct,'false')) like 'true' and coalesce(ar_test_acct,'0') = '1')

Description: MSISDN: Check on duplicate MSISDNs across accounts in Aria - Non-wearables. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH duplicate_msisdns AS (
    SELECT 
        p.msisdn,
        p.customer_type,
        COUNT(*) AS duplicate_count,
        LISTAGG(afa.client_instance_id, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY afa.client_instance_id) AS client_instance_id_list,
        LISTAGG(afa.aria_instance_no, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY afa.aria_instance_no) AS aria_instance_no_list,
        LISTAGG(p.acct_no, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY p.acct_no) AS acct_no_list,
        LISTAGG(p.bill_day, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY p.bancan) AS bill_day_list,
        LISTAGG(p.bancan, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY p.bancan) AS bancan_list,
        LISTAGG(p.master_lines_count, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY p.master_lines_count) AS master_lines_count_list,
        LISTAGG(p.master_supp_ban_can, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY p.master_supp_ban_can) AS master_supp_ban_can_list,
        LISTAGG(p.client_plan_id, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY p.client_plan_id) AS client_plan_id_list,
        LISTAGG(p.plan_description, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY p.plan_description) AS plan_description_list
    FROM 
        "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_msisdn_lines p
    LEFT JOIN 
        "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_ariafinal_all afa 
        ON p.client_instance_id = afa.client_instance_id
    WHERE 
        p.acct_status_std = 'Active'
        AND p.plan_status_std = 'Active'
        AND p.master_plan_status_std = 'Active'
      --  AND p.customer_type = 'B2C'
        AND LOWER(p.client_plan_id) NOT LIKE '%accessor%'
        AND LOWER(p.client_plan_id) NOT LIKE '%device%'
        AND LOWER(p.client_plan_id) NOT LIKE '%tablet%'
        -- DQ-0000063: Leaves wearable results in the exceptions (filter below should be COMMENTED OUT)
        -- DQ-0000071: Include only non-wearables (filter below should be INCLUDED)
        AND LOWER(p.client_plan_id) NOT LIKE '%wearable%'
    GROUP BY
        p.msisdn,
        p.customer_type
        -- , acct_no -- Group on acct_no in DQ-0000064 (not DQ-0000063)
    HAVING
        COUNT(*) > 1
        -- Filter to non-matching accounts in DQ-0000063 and DQ-0000071 (not DQ-0000064)
        AND MIN(p.acct_no) <> MAX(p.acct_no)
        -- DQ-0000063: The HAVING clause below should be INCLUDED
        -- Requires that at least one client_plan_id is wearable (but not necessarily all)
        -- DQ-0000071: The HAVING clause below should be COMMENTED OUT
        -- AND COUNT(
            -- CASE
                -- WHEN LOWER(client_plan_id) LIKE '%wearable%' THEN 1 
                -- ELSE NULL
            -- END
        -- ) > 1
)
SELECT DISTINCT
	'DQ-0000071' as DQ_No, --v3
 	d.acct_no_list,
	d.msisdn,
  	d.customer_type,
        d.bill_day_list,
  	d.duplicate_count,
  	d.client_instance_id_list,
  	d.aria_instance_no_list,    
    d.bancan_list,
    d.client_plan_id_list,
    d.plan_description_list,
    pa.acct_status_std,
    pa.plan_status_std,
    pa.parent_plan_status_std,
    pa.master_plan_status_std, 
    d.master_lines_count_list, 
    d.master_supp_ban_can_list
FROM 
    duplicate_msisdns d
JOIN 
    "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_msisdn_lines pa 
    ON pa.msisdn = d.msisdn
WHERE 
    pa.acct_status_std = 'Active'
    AND pa.plan_status_std = 'Active'
    AND pa.master_plan_status_std = 'Active'
    --AND p.customer_type = 'B2C'
ORDER BY
    d.acct_no_list,
	d.msisdn,
  	d.customer_type,
  	d.duplicate_count,
  	d.client_instance_id_list,
  	d.aria_instance_no_list,    
    d.bancan_list,
    d.client_plan_id_list,
    d.plan_description_list,
    pa.acct_status_std,
    pa.plan_status_std,
    pa.parent_plan_status_std,
    pa.master_plan_status_std, 
    d.master_lines_count_list, 
    d.master_supp_ban_can_list;

Description: Discrepancy report for SF Oli ID and Aria Client Instance ID mismatches for Generic Devices. B2B Customers. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH sf_general_device AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
          sf_parent_asset.bancan
        , sf_parent_asset.msisdn                                  AS sf_parent_msisdn
        , sf_child_asset.msisdn                                   AS sf_child_msisdn
        , sf_parent_asset.acct_segment                            AS sf_parent_asset_acct_segment
        , sf_parent_asset.id                                      AS sf_parent_asset_id
        , sf_parent_asset.product2_code                           AS sf_parent_product2_code
        , sf_parent_asset.provisioning_status                     AS sf_parent_plan_status
        , sf_child_asset.id                                       AS sf_child_asset_id
        , sf_child_asset.acct_id                                  AS sf_child_acct_id
        , sf_child_asset.pr_original_oli_id__c                    AS sf_child_oli_id
        , sf_child_asset.product2_name                            AS sf_child_product2_name
        , sf_child_asset.product2_code                            AS sf_child_product2_code
        , sf_child_asset.provisioning_status                      AS sf_child_plan_status
        , sf_parent_asset.external_asset_reference_id__c          AS sf_parent_external_assetrefid
        , length(sf_parent_asset.external_asset_reference_id__c)  AS length_sf_parentasset
        , CASE
            WHEN sf_child_asset.pr_original_oli_id__c IS NULL THEN NULL
            WHEN trim(sf_child_asset.pr_original_oli_id__c) = '' THEN NULL
            WHEN lower(trim(sf_child_asset.pr_original_oli_id__c)) = 'null' THEN NULL
            ELSE trim(sf_child_asset.pr_original_oli_id__c)
          END AS norm_sf_child_oli_id
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sffinal_b2b_assets sf_parent_asset
    JOIN "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sffinal_b2b_assets sf_child_asset 
      ON sf_parent_asset.acct_id = sf_child_asset.acct_id
    WHERE COALESCE(sf_child_asset.external_asset_reference_id__c, '') <> ''
      AND sf_parent_asset.vlocity_cmt__assetreferenceid__c = sf_child_asset.external_asset_reference_id__c
      --AND lower(sf_parent_asset.product2_code) NOT LIKE '%wear%'
      AND lower(sf_child_asset.product2_code) NOT LIKE '%wear%'
      AND lower(sf_parent_asset.product2_name) NOT LIKE '%byod%'
      AND lower(sf_child_asset.product2_code) NOT LIKE '%access%'
      AND lower(sf_child_asset.product2_name) NOT LIKE '%byod%'
      AND sf_child_asset.provisioning_status NOT IN ('Deleted', 'Disconnect')
      AND sf_child_asset.contract_term__c <> 'No Commit Retail Price'
      AND sf_child_asset.msisdn IS NULL
),

aria_general_device AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
          trim(ar.client_acct_id)                 AS bancan
        , ar.msisdn                               AS ar_msisdn
        , trim(ar.client_instance_id)             AS ar_client_instance_id
        , ar.client_parent_instance_id            AS ar_client_parent_instance_id
        , ar.client_plan_id                       AS ar_client_plan_id
        , ar.plan_description                     AS ar_plan_description
        , ar.plan_status                          AS ar_plan_status
        , ar.plan_status_std                      AS ar_plan_status_std
        , ar.plan_type                            AS ar_plan_type
        , arp.plan_description                    AS ar_parent_plan_description
        , arp.plan_status                         AS ar_parent_plan_status
        , arp.plan_status_std                     AS ar_parent_plan_status_std
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_ariafinal_all ar
    JOIN "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_ariafinal_all arp
      ON arp.client_acct_id    = ar.client_acct_id
     AND arp.client_instance_id = ar.client_parent_instance_id
    WHERE lower(ar.client_plan_id) LIKE '%general%device%'
),
discrepancy_report AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
          'DQ-0000103'                           AS dq_no
        , agd.bancan
        , sfgd.sf_parent_msisdn
        , sfgd.sf_parent_asset_acct_segment
        , sfgd.sf_parent_asset_id
        , sfgd.sf_child_asset_id
        , agd.ar_client_instance_id             AS ar_client_instance_id
        , sfgd.sf_child_oli_id                  AS sf_child_oli_id_raw
        , sfgd.norm_sf_child_oli_id             AS sf_child_oli_id
        , agd.ar_client_parent_instance_id
        , agd.ar_client_plan_id
        , agd.ar_plan_description
        , agd.ar_plan_status
        , agd.ar_plan_status_std
        , agd.ar_parent_plan_description
        , agd.ar_parent_plan_status
        , agd.ar_parent_plan_status_std
        , sfgd.sf_child_product2_name
        , sfgd.sf_child_product2_code
        , sfgd.sf_parent_plan_status
        , sfgd.sf_child_plan_status
    FROM sf_general_device sfgd
    JOIN aria_general_device agd
      ON agd.bancan   = sfgd.bancan
     AND agd.ar_msisdn = sfgd.sf_parent_msisdn
    WHERE agd.ar_plan_type      <> 'Master Plan'
      AND agd.ar_plan_status    not in ( 'Canceled' ,'Terminated')
      AND agd.ar_parent_plan_status <> 'Canceled'
      AND sfgd.sf_parent_plan_status = 'Active'
      AND sfgd.norm_sf_child_oli_id IS NOT NULL
      AND agd.ar_client_instance_id <> sfgd.norm_sf_child_oli_id
)
SELECT *
FROM discrepancy_report;

Description: Discrepancy report to ensure NSO is triggered for an instalment when it moves to a state where an NSO should be generated. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH aria_h AS (
    SELECT *
FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_ar_addon_dq161
 where length (trim(addon_inst_id)) >1
),

sf_base AS (
    SELECT
          a.bancan
        , NULLIF(TRIM(a.pr_msisdn__c), '')                            AS sf_msisdn
        , a.orderid
        , a.status
        , a.order_type                                                AS sf_order_type_norm
        , CAST(a.created_ts AS timestamp)                             AS created_ts
        , CAST(a.activateddate_ts AS timestamp)                       AS activateddate_ts
        , CAST(a.activateddate_ts AS date)                            AS sf_order_dt
        , a."vlocity_cmt__OrderStatus__c"
        , a.vlocity_cmt__defaultbillingaccountid__c
        , a."vlocity_cmt__DeliveryMethod__c"
        , a.vlocity_cmt__fulfilmentstatus__c
        , a."vlocity_cmt__Reason__c"                                  AS vlocity_reason
        , a.b2c_discount_applied__c
        , a.product_name_list
        , a.pref_rank

        -- ARIA hierarchy attributes pulled once here
        , h.acct_status                                               AS ar_acct_status
        , h.master_plan_status                                        AS ar_master_plan_status
		,h.addon_plan_name
		, h.addon_status
		,h.addon_plan_status_date
		,h.addon_aria_instance_no
        ,h.addon_inst_status
        ,h.addon_inst_id
        ,h.bill_day
       ,h.customer_type
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sf_order a
    JOIN "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_order_reason_type_map b
      ON UPPER(TRIM(a."vlocity_cmt__Reason__c")) = UPPER(TRIM(b.order_reason))
     AND UPPER(TRIM(a.order_type))              = UPPER(TRIM(b.order_type))
    JOIN aria_h h
      ON h.ar_bancan                        = a.bancan
     AND h.ar_msisdn                        = TRIM(a.pr_msisdn__c)
     AND TRY_CAST(h.addon_plan_status_date AS DATE) >= CAST(a.activateddate_ts AS date)
    WHERE a.activateddate_ts >= date_add('day', -2, current_timestamp)
),

aria_base AS (
    SELECT
          UPPER(TRIM(order_type))      AS aria_order_type_norm
        , CAST(order_date AS date)     AS aria_order_dt
        , TRIM(msisdn)                 AS aria_msisdn
        , bancan
        , acct_no
        , master_plan_instance_no
        , sku
        , order_no
        , quantity
        , unit_price
        , amount
        , order_line_comment
        , installment_id
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_billed_unbilled_report
where date_parse(order_date, '%m/%d/%Y') >= current_date - interval '15' day

),

matched AS (
    SELECT
'DQ-0000161' as dq_no
         , s.bancan
        , s.sf_msisdn
       , s.customer_type
        ,s.bill_day
        , s.orderid
        , s.vlocity_reason
        , s.sf_order_type_norm
        , s.created_ts
        , s.activateddate_ts
        , s."vlocity_cmt__OrderStatus__c"
        , a.order_no                    AS aria_order_no
        , s.ar_acct_status
        , s.ar_master_plan_status
        , s.addon_aria_instance_no
        , s.addon_inst_status
        , s.addon_plan_status_date
        ,s.addon_inst_id
        ,a.installment_id
        FROM sf_base s
    LEFT JOIN aria_base a
           ON a.bancan      = s.bancan
          AND a.aria_msisdn = s.sf_msisdn
         and s.addon_inst_id = a.installment_id
       )
SELECT *
FROM matched
--where sf_msisdn = '17875430251';
WHERE aria_order_no IS null
and addon_inst_status not in (
'Full Pay Off of Installment',
'PAID',
'Buyers Remorse - Delete Device'
)
;

Description: Discrepancy report of installment id comparison between SF and Aria for active installments. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH sf AS (
    SELECT
        bancan                    AS sf_bancan,
        msisdn                    AS sf_msisdn,
        acct_segment              AS sf_acct_segment,
        acct_paymenttype          AS sf_acct_paymenttype,
        vip_account__c            AS sf_test_acct,
        plan_id                   AS sf_plan_id,
        TRIM(plan_oli_id)         AS sf_plan_oli_id,
        device_id                 AS sf_device_id,
        TRIM(device_oli_id)       AS sf_device_oli_id,
        NULLIF(TRIM(device_installment_id), '') AS sf_device_inst_id_raw,
		device_installment_plan_id as sf_device_asset_installment_id,
        REGEXP_REPLACE(NULLIF(TRIM(device_installment_id), ''), '^0+', '') AS sf_device_inst_id_norm,
        device_installment_id sf_json_installment_id,
        date_format(
    from_iso8601_timestamp(device_record_created_on),
    '%m-%d-%Y'
) AS  sf_device_created_date,
        TRIM(device_contract_term__c) AS sf_device_contract_term
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sf_all_segment_hierarchy_w_installment
    WHERE device_classcode = 'PR_B2C_Mobile_Device_Class'
      AND acct_status_std   = 'Active'
      AND plan_status_std   = 'Active'
      AND device_status_std = 'Active'
      AND acct_paymenttype  = 'Postpaid'
      AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(device_contract_term__c), ''), 'null') NOT IN ('null', 'No Commit Retail Price')
),
ar_raw AS (
    SELECT
        acct_no                                AS ar_acct_no,
        client_acct_id                         AS ar_bancan,
        msisdn                                 AS ar_msisdn,
        test_acct_ind                          AS ar_test_acct,
        dunning_state                          AS ar_dunning_state,
        TRIM(group_plan_oli_id)                AS ar_group_plan_oli_id,
        TRIM(rate_plan_oli_id)                 AS ar_rate_plan_oli_id,
        NULLIF(TRIM(inst_id), '')              AS ar_inst_id_raw,
        REGEXP_REPLACE(NULLIF(TRIM(inst_id), ''), '^0+', '') AS ar_inst_id_norm,
        TRIM(active_general_device_oli_id)     AS ar_device_oli_id,
        active_general_device_aria_instance_no AS ar_device_instance_no,
        active_general_device_plan_date        as ar_device_created_date,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY TRIM(active_general_device_oli_id)
            ORDER BY
                CASE WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(inst_id), '') IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
                TRY_CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(NULLIF(TRIM(inst_id), ''), '^0+', '') AS BIGINT) DESC NULLS LAST
        ) AS rn
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_hierarchy_all_status_reverse
    WHERE acct_status_std = 'Active'
      AND master_plan_status = 'Active'
      AND COALESCE(group_plan_status, 'Active') = 'Active'
      AND COALESCE(rate_plan_status,  'Active') = 'Active'
      AND active_general_device_plan_status = 'Active'
      AND LOWER(inst_status) LIKE '%active%'
),
ar AS (
    SELECT * FROM ar_raw WHERE rn = 1
),
rc as ( select * from "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_lla_recurr_credits_installment where credit_status = 'Credits Created, Incomplete')
select
    'DQ-0000181' as dq_no ,
    ar.ar_acct_no,
    sf.sf_bancan,
    sf.sf_msisdn,
    sf.sf_acct_segment,
    sf.sf_acct_paymenttype,
    sf.sf_test_acct,
    ar.ar_test_acct,
    ar.ar_dunning_state,
    ar.ar_group_plan_oli_id,
    sf.sf_plan_id,
    sf.sf_plan_oli_id,
    ar.ar_rate_plan_oli_id,
    sf.sf_device_id,
    sf.sf_device_oli_id,
    ar.ar_device_oli_id,
    sf.sf_device_contract_term,
    ar.ar_device_instance_no,
    sf.sf_device_created_date,
    ar.ar_device_created_date,
    concat('SF_JSON_INSTALLMENT_ID - ',sf.sf_json_installment_id) as sf_json_installment_id,
    concat('SF_DEVICE_INSTALLMENT_ID - ',sf.sf_device_asset_installment_id)  AS sf_device_inst_id,
    concat('ARIA_INSTALLMENT_ID - ',ar.ar_inst_id_raw)         AS ar_inst_id,
	concat('REC_CREDIT_INSTALLMENT_ID - ',rc.installment_id) as rc_inst_id,
    CASE
        -- 1) both missing
        WHEN (sf.sf_device_inst_id_raw IS NULL OR LOWER(sf.sf_device_inst_id_raw) = 'null')
         AND (ar.ar_inst_id_raw        IS NULL OR LOWER(ar.ar_inst_id_raw)        = 'null')
            THEN 'Both systems missing Installment ID'

        -- 2) SF missing, Aria present
        WHEN (sf.sf_device_inst_id_raw IS NULL OR LOWER(sf.sf_device_inst_id_raw) = 'null')
         AND (ar.ar_inst_id_raw        IS NOT NULL AND LOWER(ar.ar_inst_id_raw) <> 'null')
            THEN 'Installment ID missing in Salesforce'

        -- 3) Aria missing, SF present
        WHEN (ar.ar_inst_id_raw IS NULL OR LOWER(ar.ar_inst_id_raw) = 'null')
         AND (sf.sf_device_inst_id_raw IS NOT NULL AND LOWER(sf.sf_device_inst_id_raw) <> 'null')
            THEN 'Installment ID missing in Aria'

        -- 4) equal after normalization (leading zeros / spacing)
        WHEN sf.sf_device_inst_id_norm = ar.ar_inst_id_norm
            THEN 'Match after normalization (leading zeros / formatting)'

        -- 5) numeric mismatch (true mismatch)
        WHEN sf.sf_device_inst_id_norm <> ar.ar_inst_id_norm
            THEN 'Installment ID mismatch (SF vs Aria)'

        ELSE 'Unknown'
    END AS discrepancy_reason

FROM sf
JOIN ar
  ON sf.sf_device_oli_id = ar.ar_device_oli_id and sf.sf_bancan = ar.ar_bancan and sf.sf_msisdn = ar.ar_msisdn
  left join rc on rc.plan_instance_id = ar.ar_device_oli_id and rc.ban_can = ar.ar_bancan

 WHERE NOT (
   sf.sf_device_inst_id_norm = ar.ar_inst_id_norm
    OR (
      (sf.sf_device_inst_id_raw IS NULL OR LOWER(sf.sf_device_inst_id_raw) = 'null')
   AND (ar.ar_inst_id_raw        IS NULL OR LOWER(ar.ar_inst_id_raw)        = 'null')
   )
)
;

Description: Add-Ons (Active): Identify duplicate charges for Generic Device for "Active" plans in ARIA.. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH add_on_counts AS (
    SELECT 
 'DQ-0000077' as DQ_No, --v3
        aml.customer_type,
        aml.bill_Day,
        aca.acct_no,
        aca.aria_instance_no,
        aca.client_acct_id,
        aca.client_instance_id,
        aca.msisdn,
		sfo.orderid,
		sfo.vlocity_cmt__OrderStatus__c,
		sfo.vlocity_cmt__fulfilmentstatus__c,
		sfo.vlocity_cmt__Reason__c,
		sfo.vlocity_cmt__DeliveryMethod__c,
        COUNT(
            CASE 
                WHEN child_client_plan_id LIKE '%General%Device%' THEN 1 
                ELSE NULL 
            END
        ) AS generic_device_cnt,
             LISTAGG(aca.child_client_instance_id, ',') 
            WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY aca.child_client_instance_id) AS child_client_instance_id_list,
             LISTAGG(afa.aria_instance_no, ',') 
            WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY afa.aria_instance_no) AS child_aria_instance_no
    FROM
        "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_msisdn_child_assets aca
    INNER JOIN 
        "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_msisdn_lines aml
    ON 
        aca.aria_instance_no = aml.aria_instance_no
    left  join 
    "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_ariafinal_all afa
    on 
    	aca.child_client_instance_id = afa.client_instance_id
	left join "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sf_order sfo on sfo.bancan = aca.client_acct_id and sfo.pr_msisdn__c = aca.msisdn
    WHERE 
        aml.plan_status_std = 'Active' and aml.acct_status_std = 'Active'
        and aca.child_client_plan_id LIKE '%General%Device%' 
    GROUP BY 
        aml.customer_type,
        aml.bill_Day,
        aca.acct_no,
        aca.client_acct_id,
        aca.client_instance_id,
        aca.msisdn,
        aca.aria_instance_no,
        sfo.orderid,
		sfo.vlocity_cmt__fulfilmentstatus__c,
		sfo.vlocity_cmt__Reason__c,
		sfo.vlocity_cmt__DeliveryMethod__c,
		vlocity_cmt__OrderStatus__c
)
SELECT *
FROM add_on_counts
WHERE 
    generic_device_cnt > 1
ORDER BY 
    acct_no,
    msisdn,
    client_acct_id,
    client_instance_id;

Description: Discrepancy report for MSISDN mismatches between Salesforce and Aria. Custom Query
Custom Query:
with sf_msisdn as (
select
	*
from
	"dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_salesforce_msisdn_lines 
),
ar_msisdn as (
select
	*
from
	"dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_msisdn_lines
),
compare_the_stack as (
select
	'DQ-0000087' as DQ_No,
	sf.bancan sf_bancan,
	sf.msisdn sf_msisdn,
	ar.msisdn ar_msisdn,
	sf.acct_status sf_acct_status,
	sf.acct_segment sf_acct_segment,
	sf.pr_original_oli_id__c sf_oli_id,
	ar.client_instance_id ar_oli_id,
	sf.provisioning_status sf_provisioning_status,
	ar.plan_status ar_plan_status,
	ar.grand_parent_plan_status_std,
	ar.master_acct_status ar_master_acct_status,
	ar.master_plan_status ar_master_plan_status
from
	sf_msisdn sf
full outer join ar_msisdn ar on
	sf.pr_original_oli_id__c = ar.client_instance_id
where
	ar.client_acct_id = sf.bancan
	and trim(sf.msisdn) <> trim(ar.msisdn)
)select
	distinct a.*,
	b.orderid,
	b."vlocity_cmt__OrderStatus__c",
	b."vlocity_cmt__Reason__c"
from
	compare_the_stack a
left join "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sf_order b on
	b.bancan = a.sf_bancan and b.pr_msisdn__c  = a.ar_msisdn
where
	(ar_plan_status = 'Active'
		and sf_provisioning_status = 'Active');

Description: Discrepancy report of where PPU Limit is incorrect based on the Credit Class.. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH mx_ppu AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
      bancan,
      account_status_std,
      TRY_CAST("Threshold Amount" AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS threshold_amount,
      bal_resource_id
  FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_matrixx_group_bill_cycle
  WHERE "Threshold Name" = 'PPU Limit'
),
sf_cr AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
      bancan,
      sf_acct_status_std,
      NULLIF(UPPER(TRIM(sf_credit_rating)), '') AS sf_credit_rating,
      sf_acct_segment
  FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_all_segement_accounts 
),
cr_pp_mapping AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
      UPPER(TRIM("Creditrating")) AS creditrating,
      CAST(ppu_limit AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS ppu_limit
  FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_creditrating_ppu
),
report as (
select
    'DQ-0000151' as dq_no,
    m.bancan,
    aa.lines_count,
    m.bal_resource_id,
    aa.acct_create_date aria_acct_create_date,
    m.threshold_amount           AS matrixx_threshold_amount,
    m.account_status_std as mx_account_status_std,
    s.sf_credit_rating,
    c.ppu_limit                  AS mapped_ppu_limit,
    s.sf_acct_segment,
    s.sf_acct_status_std,
    CASE
      WHEN s.bancan IS NULL THEN 'NO_SF_ROW'
      WHEN s.sf_credit_rating IS NULL THEN 'MISSING_SF_CREDIT_RATING'
      WHEN c.ppu_limit IS NULL THEN 'MISSING_MAPPING_FOR_RATING'
      WHEN m.threshold_amount <> c.ppu_limit THEN 'PPU_LIMIT_MISMATCH'
      ELSE 'OK'
    END AS mismatch_reason
FROM mx_ppu m
LEFT JOIN sf_cr s
  ON m.bancan = s.bancan
LEFT JOIN cr_pp_mapping c
  ON s.sf_credit_rating = c.creditrating
left join "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_ariafinal_accounts aa
  on aa.client_acct_id = s.bancan
WHERE
    s.bancan IS NULL
    OR s.sf_credit_rating IS NULL
    OR c.ppu_limit IS NULL
    OR m.threshold_amount <> c.ppu_limit
) select dq_no,bancan,aria_acct_create_date,lines_count,bal_resource_id,matrixx_threshold_amount,mx_account_status_std,sf_credit_rating,mapped_ppu_limit,sf_acct_segment,sf_acct_status_std
, case when lines_count  = '0' then 'PPU_LIMIT_NOT_SET_TO_ZERO' 
           when matrixx_threshold_amount >mapped_ppu_limit then 'MATRIXX_THRESHOLD is higher then CREDIT_RATING_LIMIT'
end
as discrepancy_reason
from report where sf_acct_status_std = 'Active' and mx_account_status_std = 'Active'
--and lines_count = '0'
--and matrixx_threshold_amount > 0
and matrixx_threshold_amount > mapped_ppu_limit
;

Description: Discrepancy for Detection of Overlapping Billing Periods. Custom Query
Custom Query:
-- Enhanced Detailed Date Validation with Improved Bill Day + Next Bill Date Logic
WITH date_analysis AS (
    SELECT
        pi.ban_can,
        pi.account_number,
        ac.bill_day,
        ac.customer_type,
        ac.next_bill_date,
        pi.transaction_date,
        pi.usage_period_start_date,
        pi.usage_period_end_date,
        pi.advance_period_start_date,
        pi.advance_period_end_date,

        -- Parse transaction date once for reuse (MM/DD/YYYY)
        TRY(date_parse(pi.transaction_date, '%m/%d/%Y')) AS parsed_transaction_date,

        -- Parse next_bill_date (looks like '11-08-2025' => MM-DD-YYYY)
        TRY(date_parse(ac.next_bill_date, '%m-%d-%Y')) AS parsed_next_bill_date,

        --------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- Expected Usage Period (still using bill_day logic as you had)
        --------------------------------------------------------------------
        DATE_ADD(
            'month',
            -1,
            DATE_ADD(
                'day',
                CAST(ac.bill_day AS INTEGER)
                - EXTRACT(DAY FROM TRY(date_parse(pi.transaction_date, '%m/%d/%Y'))),
                TRY(date_parse(pi.transaction_date, '%m/%d/%Y'))
            )
        ) AS expected_usage_start,

        DATE_ADD(
            'day',
            -1,
            DATE_ADD(
                'day',
                CAST(ac.bill_day AS INTEGER)
                - EXTRACT(DAY FROM TRY(date_parse(pi.transaction_date, '%m/%d/%Y'))),
                TRY(date_parse(pi.transaction_date, '%m/%d/%Y'))
            )
        ) AS expected_usage_end,

        --------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- Expected Advance Period based on NEXT BILL DATE (authoritative)
        -- Advance start = next_bill_date
        -- Advance end   = one month after next_bill_date minus 1 day
        --------------------------------------------------------------------
        TRY(date_parse(ac.next_bill_date, '%m-%d-%Y')) AS expected_advance_start,

        DATE_ADD(
            'day',
            -1,
            DATE_ADD(
                'month',
                1,
                TRY(date_parse(ac.next_bill_date, '%m-%d-%Y'))
            )
        ) AS expected_advance_end

    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_lla_pending_inv_line_dtl pi
    INNER JOIN "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_ariafinal_accounts ac
        ON pi.ban_can = ac.client_acct_id
    WHERE pi.service = 'Generic Device'
      AND pi.transaction_type = 'Recurring Charge'
      AND pi.transaction_date IS NOT NULL
      AND pi.transaction_date <> ''
      AND ac.bill_day IS NOT NULL
      AND ac.bill_day <> ''
      AND ac.next_bill_date IS NOT NULL
      AND ac.next_bill_date <> ''
),

validation_results AS (
    SELECT
        *,
        -- Validation Rule: Advance start should match next_bill_date
        CASE 
            WHEN TRY(date_parse(advance_period_start_date, '%m/%d/%Y')) = expected_advance_start 
            THEN 'PASS' 
            ELSE 'FAIL' 
        END AS advance_start_check,

        -- Validation Rule: Advance end = next_bill_date + 1 month - 1 day
        CASE 
            WHEN TRY(date_parse(advance_period_end_date, '%m/%d/%Y')) = expected_advance_end 
            THEN 'PASS' 
            ELSE 'FAIL' 
        END AS advance_end_check
    FROM date_analysis
),

final_results AS (
    SELECT
        *,
        (CASE WHEN advance_start_check = 'FAIL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
         CASE WHEN advance_end_check   = 'FAIL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_failures
    FROM validation_results
),

discrepancy_report AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        -- Account identifiers
        ban_can,
        account_number,
        customer_type,
        bill_day,
        next_bill_date,
        transaction_date,

        -- Validation results summary
        advance_start_check,
        advance_end_check,

        -- Actual vs Expected comparison for troubleshooting
        advance_period_start_date AS actual_advance_start,
        DATE_FORMAT(expected_advance_start, '%m/%d/%Y') AS expected_advance_start,

        advance_period_end_date AS actual_advance_end,
        DATE_FORMAT(expected_advance_end, '%m/%d/%Y') AS expected_advance_end,

        -- Failure summary
        total_failures,

        CASE 
            WHEN total_failures = 0 THEN 'ALL_PASS'
            ELSE CONCAT_WS(', ',
                CASE WHEN advance_start_check = 'FAIL' THEN 'ADVANCE_START' END,
                CASE WHEN advance_end_check   = 'FAIL' THEN 'ADVANCE_END' END
            )
        END AS failed_validations

    FROM final_results
    ORDER BY total_failures DESC, ban_can
)

SELECT
    'DQ-0000124' AS dq_no,
    *
FROM discrepancy_report
WHERE failed_validations <> 'ALL_PASS'
and next_bill_date not like '02-28-20%';

Description: PORTED OUT: Lines that are ported out according to Tru Finder but still is Active in Aria. Filtered to  where Aria Account, Master Plan and the Line is Active, Sales Force Account is Active, even though sometimes Provisioning says it is ported out. But in True Finder, it is showing it is ported out to anything other than Liberty and Sinch%. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH sf_raw AS (
    select distinct
        msisdn,
        bancan,
        acct_segment,
        acct_paymenttype,
        acct_status,
        plan_code,
        plan_oli_id,
        plan_status,
        CASE
            WHEN billfromdate_pr IS NOT NULL
                THEN CAST(day(CAST(billfromdate_pr AS date)) AS integer)
            ELSE -1
        END AS billfromdate_pr
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sf_all_segment_hierarchy
    WHERE plan_status IN ('Active', 'New', 'Suspended')
      AND acct_paymenttype = 'Postpaid'
      AND acct_status = 'Active'
),

ar_raw AS (
    select distinct
        msisdn,
        client_acct_id,
        customer_type,
        acct_status AS aria_acct_status,
        rate_plan_name,
        rate_plan_oli_id,
        rate_plan_status,
        master_plan_status,
        CAST(bill_day AS integer) AS bill_day
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod"."vw_aria_hierarchy_all_status_reverse"
    WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(group_plan_status), ''), 'Active') = 'Active'
      AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rate_plan_status),  ''), 'Active') = 'Active'
      AND acct_status = 'Active'
      AND rate_plan_name NOT IN ('PR_B2C_Mobile_Late_Payment_Fee')
),

trufinder_raw AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        msisdn,
        service_provider_name,
        activity_time
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_tffinal
    WHERE is_ported_out > 0
)
,

nokia as (select * from "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_nokia_raw),

sf_agg AS (
    SELECT
        msisdn,
        LISTAGG(CAST(billfromdate_pr AS varchar), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY billfromdate_pr) AS sf_billfromdate_pr,
        LISTAGG(bancan, ', ')          WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY bancan)        AS sf_bancan,
        LISTAGG(acct_segment, ', ')    WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY acct_segment)  AS sf_segment,
        LISTAGG(acct_paymenttype, ', ')WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY acct_paymenttype) AS sf_payment_type,
        LISTAGG(plan_code, ', ')       WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY plan_code)     AS sf_plan_codes,
        LISTAGG(plan_oli_id, ', ')     WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY plan_oli_id)   AS sf_plan_oli_ids,
        LISTAGG(plan_status, ', ')     WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY plan_status)   AS sf_plan_statuses
    FROM sf_raw
    GROUP BY msisdn
),

ar_agg AS (
    SELECT
        msisdn,
        LISTAGG(CAST(bill_day AS varchar), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY bill_day) AS ar_bill_day,
        LISTAGG(client_acct_id, ', ')            WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY client_acct_id) AS ar_client_acct_id,
        LISTAGG(customer_type, ', ')             WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY customer_type) AS ar_customer_type,
        LISTAGG(aria_acct_status, ', ')          WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY aria_acct_status) AS ar_acct_status,
        LISTAGG(master_plan_status, ', ')          WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY master_plan_status) AS ar_master_plan_status,
        LISTAGG(rate_plan_name, ', ')            WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY rate_plan_name) AS ar_rate_plan_names,
        LISTAGG(rate_plan_oli_id, ', ')          WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY rate_plan_oli_id) AS ar_rate_plan_oli_ids,
        LISTAGG(rate_plan_status, ', ')          WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY rate_plan_status) AS ar_rate_plan_statuses
    FROM ar_raw
    GROUP BY msisdn
),

dq AS (
    SELECT
        t.msisdn,
        COALESCE(s.sf_bancan, a.ar_client_acct_id) AS bancan,
        COALESCE(s.sf_segment, a.ar_customer_type) AS customer_type,
        COALESCE(a.ar_bill_day, s.sf_billfromdate_pr) AS bill_day,
        t.service_provider_name,
        t.activity_time tf_activity_time,

        s.sf_plan_codes,
        s.sf_plan_oli_ids,
        s.sf_plan_statuses,
        a.ar_master_plan_status,
        a.ar_rate_plan_names,
        a.ar_rate_plan_oli_ids,
        a.ar_rate_plan_statuses,
        n.msisdn_status,
        n.pool_id,
        n.status,

        CASE
            WHEN s.msisdn IS NOT NULL AND a.msisdn IS NOT NULL THEN 'Active in SF & Aria'
            WHEN s.msisdn IS NOT NULL THEN 'Active in SF'
            WHEN a.msisdn IS NOT NULL THEN 'Active in Aria'
            ELSE 'No active subscription'
        END AS active_status,

        CASE
            WHEN (s.msisdn IS NOT NULL OR a.msisdn IS NOT NULL)
                THEN 'Ported out in TruFinder but still ACTIVE in system'
            ELSE NULL
        END AS discrepancy_reason
    FROM trufinder_raw t
    LEFT JOIN sf_agg s ON s.msisdn = t.msisdn
    LEFT JOIN ar_agg a ON a.msisdn = t.msisdn
    left join nokia n on n.msisdn = t.msisdn
),
final_report as (
SELECT DISTINCT
    'DQ-0000052' AS DQ_No,
    *,
    sfo."vlocity_cmt__OrderStatus__c" as order_status,
    sfo."vlocity_cmt__Reason__c" as order_reason
FROM dq
left join "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sf_order sfo on sfo.bancan = dq.bancan and sfo.pr_msisdn__c = dq.msisdn
WHERE discrepancy_reason IS NOT NULL
)select * from final_report where coalesce (order_reason,'') not in ('Existing-Port In','Port In','Port Out','Port Out - Wearable','Queued') and coalesce (order_status,'') <> 'Cancelled' and sf_plan_statuses <> 'New'
and pool_id is null;

Description: Discrepancy report Active Plans in Salesforce must have corresponding Active Group/Rate Plans in Aria for Active Aria accounts. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH sf AS (
    SELECT
        bancan sf_bancan,
        msisdn sf_msisdn,
        acct_segment sf_acct_sgement,
        vip_account__c sf_test_acct,
        device_contract_term__c sf_device_contract_term,
        device_classcode sf_device_class_code,
        acct_status sf_acct_status,
        acct_status_std AS sf_acct_status_std,
        bill_acct_status sf_bill_acct_status,
        billfromdate_pr sf_bill_day,
        plan_id sf_plan_id,
        plan_created_on sf_plan_created_on,
        plan_oli_id sf_plan_oli_id,
        plan_code sf_plan_name,
        plan_name sf_plan_desc,
        plan_status sf_plan_status,
        plan_status_std sf_plan_status_std,
        device_id sf_device_id,
        device_oli_id sf_device_oli_id,
        device_code sf_device_name,
        device_name sf_device_desc,
        device_status sf_device_status,
        device_status_std sf_device_status_std,
        device_installment_id sf_inst_id
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sf_all_segment_hierarchy_w_installment
    WHERE acct_status_std = 'Active'
      AND acct_paymenttype = 'Postpaid'
      AND (device_code IS NULL OR device_code NOT IN ('PR_B2C_Liberty_Connected_Wearable'))
      AND (plan_code  IS NULL OR plan_code  NOT IN ('PR_B2B_Liberty_BUS_UNL_Wearable','PR_B2C_Mobile_Accessory_Plan','PR_B2C_Liberty_Connected_Wearable'))
),
sf_dedup AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT s.*,
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                 PARTITION BY sf_bancan, sf_msisdn, sf_plan_oli_id
                 ORDER BY
                   (CASE WHEN sf_acct_status_std = 'Active' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END),
                   (CASE WHEN sf_bill_acct_status = 'Current' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END),
                   (CASE WHEN sf_plan_status IN ('Active','New','Suspended') THEN 1 ELSE 9 END),
                   (CASE WHEN sf_plan_status_std = 'Active' THEN 1 ELSE 9 END),
                   (CASE WHEN COALESCE(sf_device_status,'') IN ('Active','New','Suspended') THEN 1 ELSE 9 END),
                   TRY_CAST(sf_plan_created_on AS timestamp) DESC
               ) rn
        FROM sf s
    ) x
    WHERE rn = 1
),
ar AS (
    SELECT
        client_acct_id ar_bancan,
        msisdn ar_msisdn,
        acct_status ar_acct_status,
        acct_status_std AS ar_acct_status_std,
        test_acct_ind ar_test_acct,
        bill_day ar_bill_day,
        dunning_state ar_dunning_state,
        master_plan_status ar_master_plan_status,
        group_plan_oli_id ar_group_plan_oli_id,
        group_plan_name ar_group_plan_name,
        group_plan_status ar_group_plan_status,
        rate_plan_oli_id ar_plan_oli_id,
        rate_plan_date ar_rate_plan_date,
        rate_plan_name ar_plan_name,
        rate_plan_status ar_plan_status,
        split_part(general_device_oli_id, ',', 1) AS ar_device_oli_id,
        split_part(general_device_plan_status, ',', 1) AS ar_device_status
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_hierarchy_all_status_reverse
    WHERE acct_status in ( 'Active' , 'Permanent')
),
ar_dedup AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT a.*,
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                 PARTITION BY ar_bancan, ar_msisdn, ar_plan_oli_id
                 ORDER BY
                   (CASE WHEN ar_acct_status_std = 'Active' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END),
                   (CASE WHEN ar_master_plan_status = 'Active' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END),
                   (CASE WHEN ar_plan_status IN ('Active','New','Suspended') THEN 1 ELSE 9 END),
                   (CASE WHEN COALESCE(ar_group_plan_status,'')='Active' THEN 1 ELSE 9 END),
                   (CASE WHEN COALESCE(ar_device_status,'') IN ('Active','New','Suspended') THEN 1 ELSE 9 END),
                   TRY_CAST(ar_rate_plan_date AS timestamp) DESC
               ) rn
        FROM ar a
    ) x
    WHERE rn = 1
),
aa AS (
    SELECT
        client_instance_id ar_oli_id,
        TRY_CAST(inst_nbr_of_pymts AS INTEGER)       AS ar_inst_nbr_of_pymts,
        TRY_CAST(inst_nbr_of_pymts_inv AS INTEGER)   AS ar_inst_nbr_of_pymts_inv,
        inst_status ar_inst_status,
        inst_id ar_inst_id
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".aria_accounts
),
joined AS (
    SELECT
        sf.*,
        ar.*,
        aa.ar_inst_nbr_of_pymts,
        aa.ar_inst_nbr_of_pymts_inv,
        aa.ar_inst_status,
        aa.ar_inst_id,
        amd.acct_status,
        sfo.vlocity_cmt__OrderStatus__c sf_order_status,
        sfo.order_type sf_order_type
    FROM sf_dedup sf
    LEFT JOIN ar_dedup ar
      ON sf.sf_bancan = ar.ar_bancan
     AND sf.sf_msisdn = ar.ar_msisdn
     AND sf.sf_plan_oli_id = ar.ar_plan_oli_id
    LEFT JOIN aa
      ON aa.ar_oli_id = ar.ar_device_oli_id
    left join  "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_masterplan_details amd on amd.client_acct_id =  sf.sf_bancan
    left join "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sf_order sfo on sfo.pr_msisdn__c  = sf.sf_msisdn and sfo.bancan = sf.sf_bancan
),
discrepancy_report AS (
    select 'DQ-0000090' AS dq_no,
        sf_bancan AS bancan,
        sf_msisdn AS msisdn,
        sf_acct_sgement,
        sf_test_acct,
        ar_test_acct,
        ar_dunning_state,
        ar_bill_day,
        sf_device_contract_term,
        sf_device_class_code,
        sf_acct_status,
        coalesce (ar_acct_status,acct_status) as ar_acct_status,
        sf_bill_acct_status,
        ar_master_plan_status,
        ar_group_plan_status,
        sf_plan_created_on,
        sf_plan_id,
        sf_plan_oli_id,
        ar_plan_oli_id,
        sf_plan_name,
        ar_plan_name,
        sf_plan_status,
        ar_plan_status,
        sf_device_id,
        sf_device_oli_id,
        ar_device_oli_id,
        sf_device_status,
        ar_device_status,
        sf_inst_id,
        ar_inst_id,
        ar_inst_status,
        ar_inst_nbr_of_pymts,
        ar_inst_nbr_of_pymts_inv,
        case
	        
	      when sf_plan_status in ('deleted','Deleted','Disconnect') and ar_msisdn IS NULL THEN  'Valid'
	      when sf_order_status = 'Queued' then 'Valid'
	      when sf_bill_acct_status in ('Overdue' ,'Final Suspension') and acct_status = 'Archived' then 'Valid'
	      when  sf_plan_status = 'Suspended' and ar_plan_status is null then 'Valid'
          WHEN sf_msisdn IS NOT NULL AND ar_msisdn IS NULL THEN 'missing_in_aria'

          WHEN coalesce(ar_group_plan_status,'Active') <> 'Active'
           AND coalesce(ar_plan_status,'Active') <> 'Active'
           AND sf_plan_status_std  = 'Active'
           AND sf_device_status_std = 'Active'
          THEN CONCAT(
                 'group_plan_status=', COALESCE(ar_group_plan_status,'NULL'),
                 ' (', COALESCE(ar_group_plan_name,'N/A'), ') ; ',
                 'rate_plan_status=', COALESCE(ar_plan_status,'NULL'),
                 ' (', COALESCE(ar_plan_name,'N/A'), ')'
               )

          WHEN coalesce(ar_group_plan_status,'Active') <> 'Active'
           AND sf_plan_status_std  = 'Active'
           AND sf_device_status_std = 'Active'
          THEN CONCAT(
                 'group_plan_status=', COALESCE(ar_group_plan_status,'NULL'),
                 ' (', COALESCE(ar_group_plan_name,'N/A'), ')'
               )

          WHEN coalesce(ar_plan_status,'Active') <> 'Active'
           AND sf_plan_status_std  = 'Active'
           AND sf_device_status_std = 'Active'
          THEN CONCAT(
                 'rate_plan_status=', COALESCE(ar_plan_status,'NULL'),
                 ' (', COALESCE(ar_plan_name,'N/A'), ')'
               )
        END AS status_issue,
        sf_order_status,
        sf_order_type
    FROM joined
)
SELECT *
FROM discrepancy_report
where status_issue not in ('Valid')
and COALESCE(LOWER(CAST(sf_test_acct AS varchar)), 'false') <> 'true'
AND COALESCE(ar_test_acct, '0') <> '1' 
and ar_acct_status not in ('Permanent')
;

Description: MSISDN: Check on duplicate MSISDNs across accounts in Aria - Wearables.. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH duplicate_msisdns AS (
    SELECT 
        p.msisdn,
        p.customer_type,
        COUNT(*) AS duplicate_count,
        LISTAGG(afa.client_instance_id, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY p.bancan) AS client_instance_id_list,
        LISTAGG(afa.aria_instance_no, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY p.bancan) AS child_aria_instance_no,
        LISTAGG(p.master_plan_status,',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY p.bancan) AS master_plan_status_list,
        LISTAGG(p.acct_no, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY p.bancan) AS acct_no_list,
