        LISTAGG(p.bancan,',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY p.bancan) AS bancan_list,
        LISTAGG(p.bill_day,',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY p.bancan) AS bill_day_list,
        LISTAGG(p.master_lines_count, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY p.bancan) AS master_lines_count_list,
        LISTAGG(p.master_supp_ban_can,',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY p.bancan) AS master_supp_ban_can_list,
        LISTAGG(p.client_plan_id,',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY p.bancan) AS client_plan_id_list,
        LISTAGG(p.plan_description,',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY p.bancan) AS plan_description_list,
        -- Add this to check if the MSISDN exists in the combined result of both tables
        CASE 
            WHEN EXISTS (
                SELECT 1 
                FROM (
                    -- First table: B2B assets
                    SELECT msisdn
                    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sffinal_b2b_assets 
                    WHERE LOWER(product2_code) LIKE '%wear%' 
                    AND provisioning_status_std IN ('Active','Suspended')
                    
                    UNION ALL
                    
                    -- Second table: Regular assets
                    SELECT msisdn
                    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sffinal_assets
                    WHERE LOWER(product2_code) LIKE '%wear%' 
                    AND provisioning_status_std IN ('Active','Suspended')
                ) combined_assets
                WHERE combined_assets.msisdn = p.msisdn 
                GROUP BY combined_assets.msisdn
                HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
            ) THEN 'Yes' 
            ELSE 'No' 
        END AS multiple_wearables_in_sf
    FROM 
        "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_msisdn_lines p
    LEFT JOIN 
        "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_ariafinal_all afa 
        ON p.client_instance_id = afa.client_instance_id
    WHERE 
        p.acct_status_std = 'Active'
        AND p.plan_status_std = 'Active'
        AND p.master_plan_status_std = 'Active'
        AND LOWER(p.client_plan_id) NOT LIKE '%accessor%'
        AND LOWER(p.client_plan_id) NOT LIKE '%device%'
    GROUP BY
        p.msisdn,
        p.customer_type
    HAVING
        COUNT(*) > 1
        AND MIN(p.acct_no) <> MAX(p.acct_no)  
        AND COUNT(
            CASE
                WHEN LOWER(p.client_plan_id) LIKE '%wearable%' THEN 1 
                ELSE NULL
            END
        ) > 1
)
SELECT  DISTINCT
    'DQ-0000063' as DQ_No,
    d.msisdn,
    d.acct_no_list,    
    d.customer_type,
    d.bill_day_list,
    d.duplicate_count,
    d.client_instance_id_list,
    d.child_aria_instance_no, 
    d.master_plan_status_list,
    d.bancan_list,
    d.client_plan_id_list,
    d.plan_description_list,
    p.acct_status_std,
    p.plan_status_std,
    p.parent_plan_status_std,
    p.master_plan_status_std, 
    d.master_lines_count_list, 
    d.master_supp_ban_can_list,
    d.multiple_wearables_in_sf AS has_multiple_wearables_in_sf
FROM 
    duplicate_msisdns d
    JOIN "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_msisdn_lines p 
        ON p.msisdn = d.msisdn
WHERE 
    p.acct_status_std = 'Active'
    AND p.plan_status_std = 'Active'
    AND p.master_plan_status_std = 'Active'
ORDER BY
    d.acct_no_list,
    d.msisdn,
    d.customer_type,
    d.duplicate_count,
    d.client_instance_id_list,
    d.child_aria_instance_no, 
    d.bancan_list,
    d.client_plan_id_list,
    d.plan_description_list

Description: INFORMATIONAL: Discrepancy report of promotions issue in Aria recurring credit. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH aria_prom AS (
    SELECT
        ar.client_acct_id,
        ar.msisdn,
        ar.customer_type,
        ar.bill_day,
        ar.group_plan_name,
        ar.group_plan_date,
        ar.rate_plan_name,
        ar.rate_plan_date,
        ar.active_general_device_oli_id general_device_oli_id,
        ar.active_general_device_aria_instance_no general_device_aria_instance_no,
        ar.active_general_device_plan_date general_device_plan_date,
        ar.inst_id,
        ar.inst_status,
        ar.inst_promo_monthly_amt,
        ar.inst_promo_bal,
        ar.inst_nbr_promos_inv,
        ar.inst_nbr_promos,
        ar.inst_nbr_of_pymts,
        sf.device_installment_id AS sf_device_installment_id
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_hierarchy_all_status_reverse ar
    LEFT JOIN "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sf_all_segment_hierarchy_w_installment sf
        ON ar.client_acct_id = sf.bancan
       AND ar.msisdn       = sf.msisdn
       AND ar.rate_plan_oli_id = sf.plan_oli_id
       AND ar.active_general_device_oli_id = sf.device_oli_id
    WHERE ar.acct_status = 'Active'
      AND COALESCE(ar.group_plan_status, 'Active') = 'Active'
      AND COALESCE(ar.rate_plan_status,  'Active') = 'Active'
      AND ar.active_general_device_plan_status = 'Active'
      AND LOWER(ar.inst_status) = 'active'
      AND (
            COALESCE(TRY_CAST(ar.inst_nbr_promos     AS DOUBLE), 0)
          - COALESCE(TRY_CAST(ar.inst_nbr_promos_inv AS DOUBLE), 0)
          ) > 1
      AND TRUNCATE(CAST(ar.inst_promo_bal AS DECIMAL(18, 4)), 0) <> 0
      AND (ar.dunning_state IS NULL OR ar.dunning_state <> '2')
),

-- All recurring credits, ALL statuses
rec_credit_all AS (
    SELECT
        a.installment_id,
        a.ban_can,
        a.rec_credit_number,
        a.created_date,    -- varchar 'MM/DD/YYYY'
        a.created_user,
        TRY_CAST(date_parse(a.created_date, '%m/%d/%Y') AS DATE) AS created_date_parsed,
        a.credit_amount,
        a.credits_completed,
        a.credits_remaining,
        a.plan_instance_number,
        a.plan_instance_id,
        a.credit_status,
        a.service_credit,
		a.service_code
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_lla_rec_service_credit_onetime a
),

-- Only statuses you want to treat as "valid" for installment mapping
rec_credit_raw AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM rec_credit_all
    WHERE credit_status IN ('Credits Created, Incomplete')
),

-- Rank duplicates within (BAN/CAN + plan + installment)
rec_credit_ranked AS (
    SELECT
        r.*,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY ban_can, plan_instance_number, installment_id
            ORDER BY created_date_parsed DESC, rec_credit_number DESC
        ) AS rn_newest,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY ban_can, plan_instance_number, installment_id
            ORDER BY created_date_parsed ASC, rec_credit_number ASC
        ) AS rn_oldest,
        COUNT(*) OVER (
            PARTITION BY ban_can, plan_instance_number, installment_id
        ) AS dup_count
    FROM rec_credit_raw r
),

-- Keep newest row for "main" RC fields used in reporting
rec_credit_dedup AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM rec_credit_ranked
    WHERE rn_newest = 1
),

-- Plan exists with VALID status
rec_credit_plan_valid AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        ban_can,
        plan_instance_number,
        installment_id,
        rec_credit_number
    FROM rec_credit_raw
),

-- Plan exists with ANY status (even invalid ones)
rec_credit_plan_any AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        ban_can,
        plan_instance_number
    FROM rec_credit_all
),

/* =========================================================
   CANCEL LOGIC (your rules):
   - Look only at duplicate RC groups (dup_count > 1)
   - If any duplicate row matches Aria promo amount (±1 trunc tolerance),
       cancel all mismatching rows.
   - If ALL duplicate rows mismatch,
       cancel ONLY the oldest created_date row.
   ========================================================= */

rc_dupe_eval AS (
    SELECT
        ap.client_acct_id,
        ap.general_device_aria_instance_no,
        ap.inst_id,
        ap.inst_promo_monthly_amt,

        rc.ban_can,
        rc.plan_instance_number,
        rc.installment_id,
        rc.rec_credit_number,
        rc.created_date_parsed,
        rc.credit_amount,
        rc.credit_status,
        rc.dup_count,
        rc.rn_newest,
        rc.rn_oldest,

        CASE
            WHEN ABS(
                TRUNCATE(TRY_CAST(ap.inst_promo_monthly_amt AS DECIMAL(18,4)), 0)
                -
                TRUNCATE(TRY_CAST(rc.credit_amount        AS DECIMAL(18,4)), 0)
            ) > 1
            THEN 1 ELSE 0
        END AS is_amount_mismatch_row
    FROM aria_prom ap
    JOIN rec_credit_ranked rc
      ON ap.client_acct_id = rc.ban_can
     AND ap.general_device_aria_instance_no = rc.plan_instance_number
     AND ap.inst_id = rc.installment_id
    WHERE rc.dup_count > 1
),

rc_dupe_summary AS (
    SELECT
        ban_can,
        plan_instance_number,
        installment_id,
        MAX(CASE WHEN is_amount_mismatch_row = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_any_amount_match
    FROM rc_dupe_eval
    GROUP BY 1,2,3
),

rec_credit_to_cancel AS (
    SELECT
        e.ban_can,
        e.plan_instance_number,
        e.installment_id,
        e.rec_credit_number,
        e.created_date_parsed,
        e.credit_amount,
        e.credit_status
    FROM rc_dupe_eval e
    JOIN rc_dupe_summary s
      ON e.ban_can = s.ban_can
     AND e.plan_instance_number = s.plan_instance_number
     AND e.installment_id = s.installment_id
    WHERE
        (
            s.has_any_amount_match = 1
            AND e.is_amount_mismatch_row = 1      -- cancel all mismatching rows if any good row exists
        )
        OR
        (
            s.has_any_amount_match = 0
            AND e.rn_oldest = 1                   -- if all mismatch, cancel oldest only
        )
 OR
        (
            s.has_any_amount_match = 1
            AND e.rn_oldest = 1                   -- if all match, cancel oldest only
        )
),

can_rec_credit AS (
    SELECT
        ban_can,
        plan_instance_number,
        installment_id,
        array_join(
            array_agg(rec_credit_number ORDER BY created_date_parsed ASC, rec_credit_number ASC),
            ', '
        ) AS rec_credit_numbers_to_cancel
    FROM rec_credit_to_cancel
    GROUP BY 1,2,3
),

joined AS (
    SELECT
        ap.client_acct_id,
        ap.msisdn,
        ap.customer_type,
        ap.bill_day,
        ap.group_plan_name,
        ap.group_plan_date,
        ap.rate_plan_name,
        ap.rate_plan_date,
        ap.general_device_oli_id,
        ap.general_device_aria_instance_no,
        ap.general_device_plan_date,
        ap.inst_id,
        ap.sf_device_installment_id,
        ap.inst_status,
        ap.inst_promo_monthly_amt,
        ap.inst_promo_bal,
        ap.inst_nbr_promos_inv,
        ap.inst_nbr_promos,
        ap.inst_nbr_of_pymts,

        rcd.ban_can,
        rcd.plan_instance_number,
        rcpv.installment_id AS incorrect_rc_installment_id,
        rcpv.rec_credit_number AS incorrect_rc_rec_credit_number,

        rcd.installment_id AS rc_installment_id,
        rcd.rec_credit_number,
        rcd.created_date,
        rcd.created_user,
        rcd.created_date_parsed,
        rcd.credit_amount,
        rcd.credits_completed,
        rcd.credits_remaining,
        rcd.credit_status,
        rcd.service_credit,
		rcd.service_code,
        rcd.dup_count,

        CASE WHEN rcpv.ban_can IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS has_plan_valid_credit,
        CASE WHEN rcpa.ban_can IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS has_plan_any_credit,

        ccr.rec_credit_numbers_to_cancel
    FROM aria_prom ap
    LEFT JOIN rec_credit_dedup rcd
        ON ap.client_acct_id = rcd.ban_can
       AND ap.general_device_aria_instance_no = rcd.plan_instance_number
       AND ap.inst_id = rcd.installment_id
    LEFT JOIN rec_credit_plan_valid rcpv
        ON ap.client_acct_id = rcpv.ban_can
       AND ap.general_device_aria_instance_no = rcpv.plan_instance_number
    LEFT JOIN rec_credit_plan_any rcpa
        ON ap.client_acct_id = rcpa.ban_can
       AND ap.general_device_aria_instance_no = rcpa.plan_instance_number
    LEFT JOIN can_rec_credit ccr
        ON ap.client_acct_id = ccr.ban_can
       AND ap.general_device_aria_instance_no = ccr.plan_instance_number
       AND ap.inst_id = ccr.installment_id

),

eval_flags AS (
    SELECT
        client_acct_id,
        msisdn,
        customer_type,
        bill_day,
        group_plan_name,
        group_plan_date,
        rate_plan_name,
        rate_plan_date,
        general_device_oli_id,
        general_device_aria_instance_no,
        general_device_plan_date,
        inst_id,
        sf_device_installment_id,
        inst_status,
        inst_promo_monthly_amt,
        inst_promo_bal,
        inst_nbr_promos_inv,
        inst_nbr_promos,
        inst_nbr_of_pymts,

        ban_can,
        plan_instance_number,
        incorrect_rc_installment_id,
        incorrect_rc_rec_credit_number,
        rc_installment_id,
        rec_credit_number,
        created_user,
        created_date,
        created_date_parsed,
        credit_amount,
        credits_completed,
        credits_remaining,
        credit_status,
        service_credit,
		service_code,
        dup_count,
        has_plan_valid_credit,
        has_plan_any_credit,

        rec_credit_numbers_to_cancel,
		
        case when credit_status = 'Credits Created, Incomplete'
        	  and service_code <> '2' then 1
        	  else 0
        end as is_valid_service_code	,  
        	  
        
        
        -- Duplicate recurring credit group exists (valid-status set)
        CASE
            WHEN rc_installment_id IS NOT NULL AND dup_count > 1 THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS is_duplicate_rec_credit,

        -- Installment ID mismatch: valid plan exists, but no row for this inst_id
        CASE
            WHEN rc_installment_id IS NULL AND has_plan_valid_credit = 1 THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS is_installment_id_mismatch,

        -- Missing in valid statuses but exists in any statuses
        CASE
            WHEN rc_installment_id IS NULL
             AND has_plan_valid_credit = 0
             AND has_plan_any_credit   = 1
            THEN 1 ELSE 0
        END AS is_missing_rec_credit_invalid_status,

        -- Truly missing in all recurring credits
        CASE
            WHEN rc_installment_id IS NULL AND has_plan_any_credit = 0 THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS is_missing_rec_credit_absent,

        -- Amount mismatch (dedup/newest row) using ±1 tolerance after truncation
        CASE
            WHEN rc_installment_id IS NOT NULL
             AND ABS(
                    TRUNCATE(TRY_CAST(inst_promo_monthly_amt AS DECIMAL(18,4)), 0)
                    -
                    TRUNCATE(TRY_CAST(credit_amount        AS DECIMAL(18,4)), 0)
                 ) > 1
            THEN 1 ELSE 0
        END AS is_amount_mismatch,

        -- Promo term vs RC frequency check (your existing logic)
        CASE
            WHEN (TRY_CAST(credits_completed AS INTEGER) + TRY_CAST(credits_remaining AS INTEGER) = TRY_CAST(inst_nbr_promos AS INTEGER)
                  AND credit_status = 'Credits Created, Incomplete') THEN 0
            WHEN ((TRY_CAST(credits_completed AS INTEGER) + TRY_CAST(credits_remaining AS INTEGER)) >=
                  (TRY_CAST(inst_nbr_promos AS INTEGER) - TRY_CAST(inst_nbr_promos_inv AS INTEGER))
                  AND credit_status = 'Credits Created, Incomplete') THEN 0
            WHEN (TRY_CAST(credits_remaining AS INTEGER) <
                  (TRY_CAST(inst_nbr_promos AS INTEGER) - TRY_CAST(inst_nbr_promos_inv AS INTEGER))
                  AND credit_status <> 'Credits Created, Complete') THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS is_credits_completed
    FROM joined
),

discrepancy_report AS (
    SELECT
        'DQ-0000166' AS dq_no,

        client_acct_id,
        msisdn,
        created_user,
        customer_type,
        bill_day,
        group_plan_name,
        group_plan_date,
        rate_plan_name,
        rate_plan_date,
        general_device_oli_id,
        general_device_aria_instance_no,
        general_device_plan_date,

        is_duplicate_rec_credit,

        CONCAT('Installment_ID - ', COALESCE(rc_installment_id, incorrect_rc_installment_id)) AS rc_inst_id,
        CONCAT('Installment_ID - ', inst_id) AS ar_inst_id,
        CONCAT('Installment_ID - ', sf_device_installment_id) AS sf_inst_id,

        inst_status,

        inst_promo_bal,
        inst_nbr_promos_inv,
        inst_nbr_promos,
        inst_promo_monthly_amt,

        credit_amount,
        COALESCE(rec_credit_number, incorrect_rc_rec_credit_number) AS rec_credit_number,
        created_date,
        credit_status,
        credits_completed,
        credits_remaining,
        service_credit,
		service_code,

        -- THIS is what you asked for: which RC(s) to cancel (only when dup + amount mismatch logic says so)
        CASE
            WHEN is_duplicate_rec_credit = 1 AND COALESCE(rec_credit_numbers_to_cancel, '') <> ''
            THEN CONCAT('CANCEL RC(s): ', rec_credit_numbers_to_cancel)
        END AS cancel_action,

        CONCAT_WS(
            ' | ',
            CASE
                WHEN is_duplicate_rec_credit = 1 AND COALESCE(rec_credit_numbers_to_cancel, '') <> ''
                THEN CONCAT(
                    'Duplicate RC rows with amount mismatch vs Aria promo. ',
                    'Cancel only mismatching RC(s); if all mismatch, cancel oldest only. ',
                    'RC(s) to cancel: ', rec_credit_numbers_to_cancel
                )
            END,
            case 
            	WHEN is_duplicate_rec_credit = 1 AND COALESCE(rec_credit_numbers_to_cancel, '') = ''
            	then 'Duplicate recurring credit rows found (BAN/CAN + plan + installment) with valid credit status'
            end,
            
            CASE WHEN is_installment_id_mismatch = 1
                 THEN 'Installment ID mismatch: recurring credit exists for BAN/CAN + plan instance with valid status, but installment_id does not match Aria inst_id' END,
            CASE WHEN is_missing_rec_credit_invalid_status = 1
                 THEN 'Recurring credit exists for BAN/CAN + plan instance, but credit_status is not in (''Credits Created, Incomplete'')' END,
            CASE WHEN is_missing_rec_credit_absent = 1
                 THEN 'No recurring credit record exists for BAN/CAN + plan instance in recurring credits table' END,
            CASE WHEN is_amount_mismatch = 1
                 THEN 'Promo amount and recurring credit amount mismatch after truncation with ±1 tolerance' END,
            CASE WHEN is_credits_completed = 1
                 THEN 'Recurring Credit frequency does not match with Promotion term' end,
            case when is_valid_service_code = 1
            	 then 'REcurring credit has invalid service code' end
        ) AS discrepancy_reason

    FROM eval_flags
    WHERE
        is_duplicate_rec_credit = 1
        OR is_installment_id_mismatch = 1
        OR is_missing_rec_credit_invalid_status = 1
        OR is_missing_rec_credit_absent = 1
        OR is_amount_mismatch = 1
        OR is_credits_completed = 1
)

SELECT DISTINCT *
FROM discrepancy_report
WHERE discrepancy_reason <> 'No recurring credit record exists for BAN/CAN + plan instance in recurring credits table'
  -- keep your existing exclusion if you still want it:
  AND NOT (is_duplicate_rec_credit = 1 AND credit_status = 'Credits Created, Complete');

Description: Discrepancy report of Supplement plans with next bill date in the past from Master Plan Next Bill date. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH parsed AS (
    SELECT
        client_acct_id,
        msisdn,
        gp_next_bill_dt,
        rp_next_bill_dt,
        ad_next_bill_dt,
        ad2_next_bill_dt,
        acct_status,
        group_plan_status,
        rate_plan_status,
        general_device_plan_status,
        master_plan_status,
        rate_plan_oli_id,
        -- Robust parser for mp_next_bill_date
        COALESCE(
          TRY(CAST(date_parse(CAST(mp_next_bill_date AS VARCHAR), '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE)),
          TRY(CAST(date_parse(CAST(mp_next_bill_date AS VARCHAR), '%m-%d-%Y') AS DATE)),
          TRY(CAST(date_parse(CAST(mp_next_bill_date AS VARCHAR), '%d-%m-%Y') AS DATE)),
          TRY(CAST(date_parse(CAST(mp_next_bill_date AS VARCHAR), '%Y/%m/%d') AS DATE)),
          TRY(CAST(date_parse(CAST(mp_next_bill_date AS VARCHAR), '%m/%d/%Y') AS DATE)),
          TRY(CAST(date_parse(CAST(mp_next_bill_date AS VARCHAR), '%d/%m/%Y') AS DATE))
        ) AS mp_next_bill_dt
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_hierarchy_all_status_reverse
    WHERE rate_plan_name <> 'PR_B2C_Mobile_Late_Payment_Fee'
      AND master_plan_status = 'Active'
      AND COALESCE(group_plan_status,'Active') = 'Active'
      AND COALESCE(rate_plan_status,'Active') = 'Active'
      AND COALESCE(addon_plan_statuses,'Active') LIKE '%Active%'
      AND COALESCE(general_device_plan_status,'Active') = 'Active'
      AND acct_status = 'Active'
),

acct_min_next_bill AS (
    SELECT client_acct_id, MIN(dt) AS acct_min_next_bill_dt
    FROM (
        SELECT client_acct_id, gp_next_bill_dt AS dt FROM parsed WHERE gp_next_bill_dt IS NOT NULL
        UNION ALL
        SELECT client_acct_id, rp_next_bill_dt     FROM parsed WHERE rp_next_bill_dt IS NOT NULL
        UNION ALL
        SELECT client_acct_id, ad_next_bill_dt     FROM parsed WHERE ad_next_bill_dt IS NOT NULL
        UNION ALL
        SELECT client_acct_id, ad2_next_bill_dt    FROM parsed WHERE ad2_next_bill_dt IS NOT NULL
    ) u
    GROUP BY client_acct_id
),

mp AS (
    SELECT
        client_acct_id,
        -- one MP per account; pick any (or use MAX/MIN)
        MAX(aria_instance_no) AS mp_aria_instance_no
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_ariafinal_all
    WHERE plan_type = 'Master Plan'
    GROUP BY client_acct_id
),
discrepancy_report as (
SELECT
    'DQ-0000133' AS dq_no,
    p.client_acct_id,
    mp.mp_aria_instance_no,
    p.mp_next_bill_dt,
    a.acct_min_next_bill_dt AS oldest_sup_nxt_bill_dt,
    DATE_DIFF('day', a.acct_min_next_bill_dt, p.mp_next_bill_dt) AS days_gap,
    -- LISTAGG of all rate_plan_oli_id that meet the condition, de-duped & sorted
    array_join(
        array_sort(array_distinct(array_agg(p.rate_plan_oli_id))),
        ','
    ) AS rate_plan_oli_id_list
FROM parsed p
JOIN acct_min_next_bill a
  ON a.client_acct_id = p.client_acct_id
JOIN mp
  ON mp.client_acct_id = p.client_acct_id
WHERE p.mp_next_bill_dt > a.acct_min_next_bill_dt
GROUP BY
    p.client_acct_id,
    mp.mp_aria_instance_no,
    p.mp_next_bill_dt,
    a.acct_min_next_bill_dt
)
select * from discrepancy_report;

Description: DISCOUNTS: Employee Discount matches between SF and Aria Active Accounts / Plans. Remove stacked discounts and autopay discount if added to the account in Aria.. Custom Query
Custom Query:
with discount as (
select
	'DQ-0000127' as DQ_No,
	case
		when sf_billfromdate_pr is not null then cast(extract(day
	from
		cast(sf_billfromdate_pr as DATE)) as INT)
		else -1
	end as sf_billfromdate_pr_std,
	*,
	case
		when UPPER(sf_fan_number) like '%EMPDISCOUNT%' then 1
		else 0
	end as sf_discount,
	case
		when UPPER(ar_coupon_codes_active) like '%EMPDISCOUNT%' then 1
		else 0
	end as ar_discount,
	case
		when exists (
		select
			1
		from
			"dvsum-s3-glue-prod".aria_accounts aa
		where
			aa.client_acct_id = vw.bancan
			and aa.plan_description = 'Liberty U-Pick Mobile Ultimate'
			and aa.plan_status = 'Active' ) then 'Y'
		else 'N'
	end as is_liberty_u_pick_ultimate_active,
	sf_acct_isfixedline_customer_pr as A_sf_acct_isfixedline_customer_pr,
	sf_acct_fixedaccountnumber_pr as A_sf_acct_fixedaccountnumber_pr,
	-- Priority-based coupon selection 
	case
		when UPPER(ar_coupon_codes_active) like '%EMPDISCOUNT%' then 'EMPDiscount_50PCT'
		when UPPER(ar_coupon_codes_active) like '%APPRDISCOUNT%' then 'APPRDiscount_25PCT'
		when UPPER(ar_coupon_codes_active) like '%FMCDISCOUNT%'
		and ( case
			when exists (
			select
				1
			from
				"dvsum-s3-glue-prod".aria_accounts aa
			where
				aa.client_acct_id = vw.bancan
				and aa.plan_description = 'Liberty U-Pick Mobile Ultimate'
				and aa.plan_status = 'Active' ) then 'Y'
			else 'N'
		end ) = 'Y'
		and sf_acct_isfixedline_customer_pr = 'true' then 'FMCDiscount_15AMT'
		when UPPER(ar_coupon_codes_active) like '%B2B2CDISCOUNT%' then 'B2B2CDiscount_10AMT'
		else sf_fan_number
	end as ar_highest_priority_coupon,
	-- Count and flags 
	(case
		when UPPER(ar_coupon_codes_active) like '%EMPDISCOUNT%' then 1
		else 0
	end + case
		when UPPER(ar_coupon_codes_active) like '%B2B2CDISCOUNT%' then 1
		else 0
	end + case
		when UPPER(ar_coupon_codes_active) like '%APPRDISCOUNT%' then 1
		else 0
	end + case
		when UPPER(ar_coupon_codes_active) like '%FMCDISCOUNT%' then 1
		else 0
	end) as priority_discount_count,
	case
		when UPPER(ar_coupon_codes_active) like '%EMPDISCOUNT%' then 1
		else 0
	end as has_empdiscount,
	case
		when UPPER(ar_coupon_codes_active) like '%B2B2CDISCOUNT%' then 1
		else 0
	end as has_b2b2cdiscount,
	case
		when UPPER(ar_coupon_codes_active) like '%APPRDISCOUNT%' then 1
		else 0
	end as has_apprdiscount,
	case
		when UPPER(ar_coupon_codes_active) like '%FMCDISCOUNT%' then 1
		else 0
	end as has_fmcdiscount,
	case
		when UPPER(ar_coupon_codes_active) like '%AUTOPAY%' then 1
		else 0
	end as has_autopaydiscount
from
	"dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_all_segement_accounts vw
where
	( UPPER(sf_fan_number) like '%EMPDISCOUNT%'
		or UPPER(ar_coupon_codes_active) like '%EMPDISCOUNT%' )
	and sf_acct_status_std = 'Active'
	and ar_acct_status_std = 'Active'
	and ar_plan_status_std = 'Active' ),
decision as (
select
	distinct e.DQ_No,
	e.sf_billfromdate_pr_std,
	e.bancan,
	e.sf_record_id,
	e.sf_acct_segment,
	e.sf_acct_status,
	e.ar_acct_status,
	e.is_liberty_u_pick_ultimate_active,
	e.A_sf_acct_isfixedline_customer_pr,
	e.A_sf_acct_fixedaccountnumber_pr,
	e.sf_fan_number as sf_coupon_code,
	e.ar_coupon_codes_active,
	e.sf_discount,
	e.ar_discount,
	e.ar_highest_priority_coupon,
	e.priority_discount_count,
	e.has_empdiscount,
	e.has_b2b2cdiscount,
	e.has_apprdiscount,
	e.has_fmcdiscount,
	e.has_autopaydiscount,
	case
		when e.priority_discount_count > 1 then 'MULTIPLE_PRIORITY_DISCOUNTS'
		when e.priority_discount_count = 1 then 'SINGLE_PRIORITY_DISCOUNT'
		else 'NO_PRIORITY_DISCOUNTS'
	end as discount_complexity,
	-- EXISTING recommendation logic (unchanged)
	 case
		when e.has_empdiscount = 1
			and e.has_apprdiscount = 0
			and e.has_fmcdiscount = 0
			and e.has_b2b2cdiscount = 0
			and e.has_autopaydiscount = 0 then case
				when e.sf_discount = 0
				and e.ar_discount = 0 then 'UPDATE_BOTH: Add EMPDiscount flags to SF and AR'
				when e.sf_discount = 1
				and e.ar_discount = 0 then 'UPDATE_ARIA: Add EMPDiscount flag'
				when e.sf_discount = 0
				and e.ar_discount = 1 then 'UPDATE_SF: Add EMPDiscount flag'
				else 'ALIGNED: EMPDiscount properly set in both systems'
			end
			when e.has_empdiscount = 0
			and e.has_apprdiscount = 1
			and e.has_fmcdiscount = 0
			and e.has_b2b2cdiscount = 0
			and e.has_autopaydiscount = 0 then case
				when e.sf_discount = 0
				and e.ar_discount = 0 then 'UPDATE_BOTH: Add APPRDiscount flags to SF and AR'
				when e.sf_discount = 1
				and e.ar_discount = 0 then 'UPDATE_ARIA: Add APPRDiscount flag'
				when e.sf_discount = 0
				and e.ar_discount = 1 then 'UPDATE_SF: Add APPRDiscount flag'
				else 'ALIGNED: APPRDiscount properly set in both systems'
			end
			when e.has_empdiscount = 0
			and e.has_apprdiscount = 0
			and e.has_fmcdiscount = 1
			and e.has_b2b2cdiscount = 0
			and e.has_autopaydiscount = 0 then case
				when e.is_liberty_u_pick_ultimate_active = 'Y'
				and e.A_sf_acct_isfixedline_customer_pr = 'true' then case
					when e.sf_discount = 0
					and e.ar_discount = 0 then 'UPDATE_BOTH: Add FMCDiscount flags to SF and AR'
					when e.sf_discount = 1
					and e.ar_discount = 0 then 'UPDATE_ARIA: Add FMCDiscount flag'
					when e.sf_discount = 0
					and e.ar_discount = 1 then 'UPDATE_SF: Add FMCDiscount flag'
					else 'ALIGNED: FMCDiscount properly set in both systems'
				end
				else 'UPDATE_ARIA: Remove FMCDiscount - Customer not eligible (requires Liberty U-Pick + Fixed Line)'
			end
			when e.has_empdiscount = 0
			and e.has_apprdiscount = 0
			and e.has_fmcdiscount = 0
			and e.has_b2b2cdiscount = 1
			and e.has_autopaydiscount = 0 then case
				when e.sf_discount = 0
				and e.ar_discount = 0 then 'UPDATE_BOTH: Add B2B2CDiscount flags to SF and AR'
				when e.sf_discount = 1
				and e.ar_discount = 0 then 'UPDATE_ARIA: Add B2B2CDiscount flag'
				when e.sf_discount = 0
				and e.ar_discount = 1 then 'UPDATE_SF: Add B2B2CDiscount flag'
				else 'ALIGNED: B2B2CDiscount properly set in both systems'
			end
			-- Multiple discount scenarios (unchanged)
			when e.has_empdiscount = 1
			and e.has_apprdiscount = 1
			and e.has_fmcdiscount = 0
			and e.has_b2b2cdiscount = 0
			and e.has_autopaydiscount = 0 then 'UPDATE_ARIA: Remove APPRDiscount - EMPDiscount takes precedence (50% > 25%)'
			when e.has_empdiscount = 1
			and e.has_apprdiscount = 0
			and e.has_fmcdiscount = 1
			and e.has_b2b2cdiscount = 0
			and e.has_autopaydiscount = 0 then 'UPDATE_ARIA: Remove FMCDiscount - EMPDiscount takes precedence (50% > 15AMT)'
			when e.has_empdiscount = 1
			and e.has_apprdiscount = 0
			and e.has_fmcdiscount = 0
			and e.has_b2b2cdiscount = 1
			and e.has_autopaydiscount = 0 then 'UPDATE_ARIA: Remove B2B2CDiscount - EMPDiscount takes precedence (50% > 10AMT)'
			when e.has_empdiscount = 0
			and e.has_apprdiscount = 1
			and e.has_fmcdiscount = 1
			and e.has_b2b2cdiscount = 0
			and e.has_autopaydiscount = 0 then case
				when e.is_liberty_u_pick_ultimate_active = 'Y'
				and e.A_sf_acct_isfixedline_customer_pr = 'true' then 'UPDATE_ARIA: Remove FMCDiscount - APPRDiscount takes precedence (25% > 15AMT)'
				else 'UPDATE_ARIA: Remove FMCDiscount (ineligible) - Keep APPRDiscount'
			end
			when e.has_empdiscount = 0
			and e.has_apprdiscount = 1
			and e.has_fmcdiscount = 0
			and e.has_b2b2cdiscount = 1 then 'UPDATE_ARIA: Remove B2B2CDiscount - APPRDiscount takes precedence (25% > 10AMT)'
			when e.has_empdiscount = 0
			and e.has_apprdiscount = 0
			and e.has_fmcdiscount = 1
			and e.has_b2b2cdiscount = 1 then case
				when e.is_liberty_u_pick_ultimate_active = 'Y'
				and e.A_sf_acct_isfixedline_customer_pr = 'true' then 'UPDATE_ARIA: Remove B2B2CDiscount - FMCDiscount takes precedence (15AMT > 10AMT)'
				else 'UPDATE_ARIA: Remove FMCDiscount (ineligible) - Keep B2B2CDiscount'
			end
			-- Three discounts (unchanged) 
			when e.has_empdiscount = 1
			and e.has_apprdiscount = 1
			and e.has_fmcdiscount = 1
			and e.has_b2b2cdiscount = 0 then 'UPDATE_ARIA: Remove APPRDiscount and FMCDiscount - EMPDiscount takes precedence'
			when e.has_empdiscount = 1
			and e.has_apprdiscount = 1
			and e.has_fmcdiscount = 0
			and e.has_b2b2cdiscount = 1 then 'UPDATE_ARIA: Remove APPRDiscount and B2B2CDiscount - EMPDiscount takes precedence'
			when e.has_empdiscount = 1
			and e.has_apprdiscount = 0
			and e.has_fmcdiscount = 1
			and e.has_b2b2cdiscount = 1 then 'UPDATE_ARIA: Remove FMCDiscount and B2B2CDiscount - EMPDiscount takes precedence'
			when e.has_empdiscount = 0
			and e.has_apprdiscount = 1
			and e.has_fmcdiscount = 1
			and e.has_b2b2cdiscount = 1 then case
				when e.is_liberty_u_pick_ultimate_active = 'Y'
				and e.A_sf_acct_isfixedline_customer_pr = 'true' then 'UPDATE_ARIA: Remove FMCDiscount and B2B2CDiscount - APPRDiscount takes precedence'
				else 'UPDATE_ARIA: Remove FMCDiscount (ineligible) and B2B2CDiscount - Keep APPRDiscount'
			end
			-- All four (unchanged) 
			when e.has_empdiscount = 1
			and e.has_apprdiscount = 1
			and e.has_fmcdiscount = 1
			and e.has_b2b2cdiscount = 1 then 'UPDATE_ARIA: Remove APPRDiscount, FMCDiscount, and B2B2CDiscount - EMPDiscount takes precedence'
			-- No discounts (unchanged) 
			when e.has_empdiscount = 0
			and e.has_apprdiscount = 0
			and e.has_fmcdiscount = 0
			and e.has_b2b2cdiscount = 0 then case
				when e.sf_discount = 1
				and e.ar_discount = 0 then 'UPDATE_SF: Remove discount flag - No active discounts in AR'
				when e.sf_discount = 0
				and e.ar_discount = 1 then 'UPDATE_ARIA: Remove discount flag - No active discounts found'
				when e.sf_discount = 1
				and e.ar_discount = 1 then 'UPDATE_BOTH: Remove discount flags - No active discounts found'
				else 'ALIGNED: No discounts in either system'
			end
			else 'MANUAL_REVIEW: Unexpected discount scenario - requires investigation'
		end as system_update_recommendation,
		-- Which single discount should remain active 
		case
			when e.has_empdiscount = 1 then 'EMPDiscount_50PCT'
			when e.has_apprdiscount = 1 then 'APPRDiscount_25PCT'
			when e.has_fmcdiscount = 1
			and e.is_liberty_u_pick_ultimate_active = 'Y'
			and e.A_sf_acct_isfixedline_customer_pr = 'true' then 'FMCDiscount_15AMT'
			when e.has_b2b2cdiscount = 1 then 'B2B2CDiscount_10AMT'
			else 'NO_PRIORITY_DISCOUNT'
		end as recommended_active_discount,
		-- Existing removal list (unchanged) 
		case
			when e.has_empdiscount = 1 then case
				when e.has_apprdiscount = 1
				and e.has_fmcdiscount = 1
				and e.has_b2b2cdiscount = 1 then 'apprdiscount_25pct|fmcdiscount_15amt|b2b2cdiscount_10amt'
				when e.has_apprdiscount = 1
				and e.has_fmcdiscount = 1 then 'apprdiscount_25pct|fmcdiscount_15amt'
				when e.has_apprdiscount = 1
				and e.has_b2b2cdiscount = 1 then 'apprdiscount_25pct|b2b2cdiscount_10amt'
				when e.has_fmcdiscount = 1
				and e.has_b2b2cdiscount = 1 then 'fmcdiscount_15amt|b2b2cdiscount_10amt'
				when e.has_apprdiscount = 1 then 'apprdiscount_25pct'
				when e.has_fmcdiscount = 1 then 'fmcdiscount_15amt'
				when e.has_b2b2cdiscount = 1 then 'b2b2cdiscount_10amt'
				else null
			end
			when e.has_apprdiscount = 1 then case
				when e.has_fmcdiscount = 1
				and e.has_b2b2cdiscount = 1 then 'fmcdiscount_15amt|b2b2cdiscount_10amt'
				when e.has_fmcdiscount = 1 then 'fmcdiscount_15amt'
				when e.has_b2b2cdiscount = 1 then 'b2b2cdiscount_10amt'
				else null
			end
			when e.has_fmcdiscount = 1
			and e.is_liberty_u_pick_ultimate_active = 'Y'
			and e.A_sf_acct_isfixedline_customer_pr = 'true' then case
				when e.has_b2b2cdiscount = 1 then 'b2b2cdiscount_10amt'
				else null
			end
			when e.has_fmcdiscount = 1
			and (e.is_liberty_u_pick_ultimate_active = 'N'
				or e.A_sf_acct_isfixedline_customer_pr <> 'true') then case
				when e.has_b2b2cdiscount = 1 then 'fmcdiscount_15amt|b2b2cdiscount_10amt'
				else 'fmcdiscount_15amt'
			end
			else null
		end as aria_discounts_to_remove,
		-- Priority 
		case
			when e.has_empdiscount = 1 then 1
			when e.has_apprdiscount = 1 then 2
			when e.has_fmcdiscount = 1 then 3
			when e.has_b2b2cdiscount = 1 then 4
			else 5
		end as implementation_priority,
		-- Salesforce Order Information 
		sfo.pr_msisdn__c,
		sfo.orderid,
		sfo."vlocity_cmt__OrderStatus__c",
		sfo."vlocity_cmt__Reason__c"
	from
		discount e
	left join "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sf_order sfo on
		sfo.bancan = e.bancan 
		and sfo."vlocity_cmt__OrderStatus__c" = 'In Progress'
		),
discrepancy_report as (
-- OUTER layer to append AUTOPAY removal alongside your existing recommendation 
select
	d.*,
	case
		when d.has_empdiscount = 1
			and d.has_autopaydiscount = 1 then 'UPDATE_ARIA: Remove AUTOPAYDiscount - cannot combine with EMPDiscount'
			else 'NO_ACTION'
		end as autopay_update_recommendation,
		case
			when d.has_empdiscount = 1
			and d.has_autopaydiscount = 1 then CONCAT(d.system_update_recommendation, ' | Remove AUTOPAYDiscount (EMPDiscount cannot be combined)')
			else d.system_update_recommendation
		end as final_recommendation,
		case
			when d.has_empdiscount = 1
				and d.has_autopaydiscount = 1 then 'autopaydiscount'
				else null
			end as aria_discounts_to_remove_extra
		from
			decision d
		order by
			d.implementation_priority asc,
			d.priority_discount_count desc,
			d.ar_highest_priority_coupon)
select
	*
from
	discrepancy_report
where
	final_recommendation not like '%ALI%';

Description: Discrepancy report between SF and Matrixx for International Roaming B2B customers. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH sf_roaming AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT plan.bancan sf_bancan, plan.msisdn sf_msisdn, plan.acct_segment, plan.id AS plan_asset_id,
    plan.product2_code, plan.provisioning_status,
    addon.id AS addon_asset_id,
    addon.product2_code AS addon_product2_code,
    addon.product2_name AS addon_product2_name,
    addon.provisioning_status AS roaming_provisioning_status,
    plan.acct_customer_subtype,
	af.dunning_group,
	af.dunning_state,
	af.dunning_step,
	af.dunning_step_desc,
	af.dunning_degrade_date
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sffinal_b2b_assets plan
    JOIN "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sffinal_b2b_assets addon ON addon.vlocity_cmt__ParentItemId__c = plan.id
	left join "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_ariafinal_all af on af.client_acct_id = plan.bancan and af.plan_type = 'Master Plan'
    WHERE plan.msisdn IS NOT NULL
    AND plan.external_asset_reference_id__c IS NULL
    AND addon.product2_name = 'International Roaming'
    AND plan.acct_segment = 'B2B'
	and plan.provisioning_status <> 'Deleted'
    AND addon.provisioning_status <> 'Deleted'
    AND plan.bancan = addon.bancan
    and not exists (SELECT 1
FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_ariafinal_all 
WHERE msisdn  = plan.msisdn and plan_description like '%Wearable%' and plan_status = 'Active')
),
mx_roaming_raw AS (
    SELECT * FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_matrixx_plan
    WHERE catalog_item_external_id IN ('Postpaid_AddOn_Roaming_Daypass', 'Postpaid_AddOn_Roaming_Daypass_B2B')
),
-- Modified CTE to prioritize Active status and handle duplicates
mx_roaming AS (
    SELECT 
        msisdn,
        bancan,
        catalog_item_external_id,
        subscription_status,
        po_offer_status
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            msisdn,
            bancan,
            catalog_item_external_id,
            subscription_status,
            po_offer_status,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                PARTITION BY msisdn, bancan 
                ORDER BY 
                    CASE WHEN po_offer_status = 'Active' THEN 1 
                         WHEN po_offer_status = 'Cancel' THEN 2 
                         ELSE 3 END,
                    catalog_item_external_id
            ) as rn
        FROM mx_roaming_raw
    ) ranked
    WHERE rn = 1
),
mx_all_numbers AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT msisdn, bancan FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_matrixx_plan
),
discrepancy_report AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        mx_all.bancan mx_bancan,
        ar.client_acct_id ar_bancan,
        ar.client_plan_id ar_rate_plan,
        ar.plan_status ar_rate_plan_status,
        sf.*,
        mx.*,
        mx_all.msisdn AS mx_all_msisdn,
        so.orderid sf_order_id,
        so.vlocity_cmt__OrderStatus__c sf_order_status,
        CASE
            WHEN sf.roaming_provisioning_status = 'Suspended' AND mx.SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS = 'Lost-Stolen Suspend' AND mx.PO_OFFER_STATUS = 'Active' THEN 'Valid'
            WHEN sf.roaming_provisioning_status = 'Suspended' AND mx.SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS != 'Active' AND mx.PO_OFFER_STATUS = 'Active' THEN 'Valid'
            WHEN sf.provisioning_status = 'Active' AND sf.roaming_provisioning_status IN ('Disconnect','Deleted') AND mx.PO_OFFER_STATUS IS NULL THEN 'Valid'
            WHEN sf.provisioning_status IN ('New','Disconnect','Deleted','deleted') AND mx_all.msisdn IS NULL THEN 'Valid'
            WHEN sf.provisioning_status = 'Deleted' AND sf.roaming_provisioning_status IN ('Suspended') AND mx.PO_OFFER_STATUS = 'Cancel' THEN 'Valid'
            WHEN sf.roaming_provisioning_status IN ('Disconnect') AND mx.PO_OFFER_STATUS = 'Cancel' THEN 'Valid'
            WHEN LOWER(sf.product2_code) LIKE '%wearable%' THEN 'Valid'
            WHEN mx.msisdn IS NULL AND mx_all.msisdn IS NOT NULL AND sf.sf_bancan <> mx_all.bancan THEN 'Mismatch BANCAN between SF and Matrixx'
            WHEN mx.msisdn IS NULL AND mx_all.msisdn IS NULL AND dv.access_number IS NOT NULL THEN 'MSISDN not configured properly in Matrixx'
            WHEN mx.msisdn IS NULL AND mx_all.msisdn IS NULL THEN 'MSISDN Not in Matrixx'
            WHEN mx.msisdn IS NULL AND mx_all.msisdn IS NOT NULL THEN 'International Roaming Not in Matrixx'
            WHEN sf.sf_msisdn IS NULL THEN 'Missing in Salesforce'
            WHEN sf.roaming_provisioning_status = 'Active' AND mx.PO_OFFER_STATUS != 'Active' THEN 'Active in SF, Not Active in Matrixx'
            WHEN sf.roaming_provisioning_status != 'Active' AND mx.PO_OFFER_STATUS = 'Active' THEN 'Not Active in SF, Active in Matrixx'
            ELSE 'Status Mismatch'
        END AS discrepancy_reason
    FROM sf_roaming sf
    LEFT JOIN mx_roaming mx ON sf.sf_msisdn = mx.msisdn AND sf.sf_bancan = mx.bancan
    LEFT JOIN mx_all_numbers mx_all ON mx_all.msisdn = sf.sf_msisdn
    LEFT JOIN "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".sox_matrixx_deviceaccess dv ON dv.access_number = sf.sf_msisdn
    LEFT JOIN "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_msisdn_lines ar ON ar.msisdn = sf.sf_msisdn
    left join "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sf_order so on so.bancan = sf.sf_bancan and so.pr_msisdn__c = sf.sf_msisdn
    WHERE roaming_provisioning_status NOT IN ('Deleted', 'deleted')
    AND COALESCE(roaming_provisioning_status,'') <> COALESCE(PO_OFFER_STATUS,'')
)
SELECT 
    'DQ-0000108' as DQ_No,
    sf_msisdn,
    LISTAGG(DISTINCT sf_order_id, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY sf_order_id) AS sf_order_id_list,
    LISTAGG(DISTINCT sf_order_status, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY sf_order_status) AS sf_order_status_list,
    LISTAGG(DISTINCT sf_bancan, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY sf_bancan) AS sf_bancan_list,
    LISTAGG(DISTINCT ar_bancan, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ar_bancan) AS ar_bancan_list,
    LISTAGG(DISTINCT mx_bancan, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY mx_bancan) AS mx_bancan_list,
    LISTAGG(DISTINCT acct_segment, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY acct_segment) AS acct_segment_list,
    LISTAGG(DISTINCT plan_asset_id, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY plan_asset_id) AS plan_asset_id_list,
    LISTAGG(DISTINCT product2_code, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY product2_code) AS product2_code_list,
    LISTAGG(DISTINCT provisioning_status, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY provisioning_status) AS provisioning_status_list,
    LISTAGG(DISTINCT addon_asset_id, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY addon_asset_id) AS addon_asset_id_list,
    LISTAGG(DISTINCT addon_product2_code, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY addon_product2_code) AS addon_product2_code_list,
    LISTAGG(DISTINCT addon_product2_name, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY addon_product2_name) AS addon_product2_name_list,
    LISTAGG(DISTINCT roaming_provisioning_status, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY roaming_provisioning_status) AS roaming_provisioning_status_list,
    LISTAGG( ar_rate_plan, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ar_bancan) AS ar_rate_plan_list,
	LISTAGG( ar_rate_plan_status, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ar_bancan) AS ar_rate_plan_statuslist,
	LISTAGG(DISTINCT dunning_group, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY dunning_group) AS dunning_group_list,
    LISTAGG(DISTINCT dunning_state, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY dunning_state) AS dunning_state_list,
    LISTAGG(DISTINCT dunning_step, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY dunning_step) AS dunning_step_list,
    LISTAGG(DISTINCT dunning_step_desc, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY dunning_step_desc) AS dunning_step_desc_list,
    LISTAGG(DISTINCT dunning_degrade_date, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY dunning_degrade_date) AS dunning_degrade_date_list,
    LISTAGG(DISTINCT acct_customer_subtype, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY acct_customer_subtype) AS acct_customer_subtype_list,
    LISTAGG(DISTINCT catalog_item_external_id, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY catalog_item_external_id) AS catalog_item_external_id_list,
    LISTAGG(DISTINCT subscription_status, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY subscription_status) AS subscription_status_list,
    LISTAGG(DISTINCT po_offer_status, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY po_offer_status) AS po_offer_status_list,
    LISTAGG(DISTINCT mx_all_msisdn, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY mx_all_msisdn) AS mx_all_msisdn_list,
    LISTAGG(DISTINCT discrepancy_reason, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY discrepancy_reason) AS discrepancy_reason_list
FROM discrepancy_report
WHERE discrepancy_reason <> 'Valid' AND ar_bancan IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1,2;

Description: Discrepancy report of Same account which has more than one "Restoral Fee" applied within 7 days in Aria. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH billed AS (
    SELECT
        ban_can AS bancan,
        TRY(date_parse(TRIM(order_date), '%m/%d/%Y')) AS dt,
        order_no AS order_no,
        'billed' AS src
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".dvsum_lla_billed_orders where service_name = 'Restoral Fee'
),
unbilled AS (
    SELECT
        ban_can AS bancan,
        TRY(date_parse(TRIM(created_date), '%m/%d/%Y')) AS dt,
        order_no AS order_no,
        'unbilled' AS src
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".dvsum_lla_unbilled_orders where  "sku" like '%Restoral_Fee%'
),
combined AS (
    SELECT bancan, dt, order_no, src FROM billed
    UNION ALL
    SELECT bancan, dt, order_no, src FROM unbilled
),
sequenced AS (
    SELECT
        bancan,
        dt,
        order_no,
        src,
        LAG(dt)        OVER (PARTITION BY bancan ORDER BY dt, order_no) AS prev_dt,
        LAG(order_no)  OVER (PARTITION BY bancan ORDER BY dt, order_no) AS prev_order_no
    FROM combined
    WHERE dt IS NOT NULL
),
sequenced_with_gap AS (
    SELECT
        bancan,
        dt,
        order_no,
        src,
        md.bill_day,
        prev_dt,
        prev_order_no,
        CASE WHEN prev_dt IS NOT NULL THEN date_diff('day', prev_dt, dt) END AS gap_days
    FROM sequenced s
    left join "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_masterplan_details md on md.client_acct_id = s.bancan
),
discrepancy_report as (
SELECT
    bancan,
    
    LISTAGG(src, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY dt, order_no) AS src_list,

    LISTAGG(bill_day, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY dt, order_no) AS bill_day_list,

    COUNT(*) AS occurrence_count,

    -- readable timeline in order
    LISTAGG(
        format('%s|%s|%s', date_format(dt, '%Y-%m-%d'), order_no, src),
        ' -> '
    ) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY dt, order_no) AS order_timeline,

    -- also a straight list of order numbers if you want it
    LISTAGG(order_no, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY dt, order_no) AS order_no_list,

    -- min consecutive gap (based only on adjacent rows in time order)
    MIN(CASE WHEN gap_days IS NOT NULL THEN gap_days END) AS min_consecutive_gap_days,

    -- how many adjacent pairs are within 7 days
    SUM(CASE WHEN gap_days IS NOT NULL AND gap_days <= 7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS consecutive_pairs_within_7,

    -- which adjacent pairs triggered it (prev -> current with days)
    ARRAY_JOIN(
        ARRAY_AGG(
            CASE
                WHEN gap_days IS NOT NULL AND gap_days <= 7
                THEN CONCAT(prev_order_no, '→', order_no, ' (', CAST(gap_days AS VARCHAR), 'd)')
            END
        ),
        ', '
    ) AS offending_pairs,

    CASE
        WHEN COUNT(*) > 1
         AND SUM(CASE WHEN gap_days IS NOT NULL AND gap_days <= 7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
        THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N'
    END AS flag_within_7_days
FROM sequenced_with_gap
GROUP BY bancan
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY flag_within_7_days DESC, min_consecutive_gap_days, bancan)
select 'DQ-00000147' AS dq_no,
* from discrepancy_report where flag_within_7_days = 'Y';

Description: Discrepancy report of  account with active assets in SF has a No Line Item Pending Invoice.. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH pending_invoices AS (
  SELECT
      a."account number"           AS account_number,
      a."ban-can"                  AS invoice_bancan,
      a."invoice number"           AS invoice_number,
      a."invoice status"           AS invoice_status,
      a."invoice date"             AS invoice_date,
      b.plan_status                AS master_plan_status
  FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".lla_no_lin_item_inv_rpt a
  JOIN (
      SELECT client_acct_id, plan_status
      FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_ariafinal_accounts
  ) b
    ON a."ban-can" = b.client_acct_id
  WHERE a."invoice status" = 'Pending'
    AND TRY_CAST(a."row count" AS INTEGER) = 0
),
active_bancans AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT bancan
  FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_all_segement_assets
  WHERE sf_account_acct_status_std   = 'Active'
    AND sf_provisioning_status   = 'Active'
    and ar_plan_status = 'Active'
)
SELECT
  'DQ-0000139' AS dq_no,
  pi.account_number,
  pi.invoice_bancan,
  pi.master_plan_status,
  pi.invoice_number,
  pi.invoice_status,
  DATE_FORMAT(DATE_PARSE(pi.invoice_date, '%m/%d/%Y'), '%Y-%m-%d') AS invoice_date
FROM pending_invoices pi
JOIN active_bancans ab
  ON ab.bancan = pi.invoice_bancan 
where pi.master_plan_status = 'Active'
  order by 4;

Description: Autopay discount discrepancy rule check for B2B customers.. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH 
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 1) Explode the PLAN_DESCRIPTIONS into individual plan rows.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
exploded_plans AS (
  SELECT 
      a.CLIENT_ACCT_ID,
      a.CLIENT_PLAN_ID,
      a.ARIA_INSTANCE_NO,
      a.customer_type,
      a.AUTOPAY,
      a.BILL_DELIVERY,
      a.PLAN_DESCRIPTIONS,
      a.COUPONS_CODES,          -- applied coupon codes from the source view
      a.PAYMENT_METHOD,
      TRIM(plan) AS PLAN        -- individual plan extracted from the pipe-delimited list
  FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_auto_pay a
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(a.PLAN_DESCRIPTIONS, '|')) AS t(plan)
  WHERE a.ACCT_STATUS = 'Active'
    AND lower(a.PLAN_DESCRIPTIONS) NOT LIKE '%wearable%'
),

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 2) Group by CLIENT_ACCT_ID and PLAN to get the count for each plan.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
expected_plan_counts AS (
  SELECT 
      CLIENT_ACCT_ID,
      PLAN,
      COUNT(*) AS plan_count
  FROM exploded_plans
  GROUP BY CLIENT_ACCT_ID, PLAN
),

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 3) Base client-level info (for eligibility & payment method matching)
--------------------------------------------------------------------
base AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT 
      CLIENT_ACCT_ID, 
      AUTOPAY, 
      BILL_DELIVERY, 
      PAYMENT_METHOD
  FROM exploded_plans
),

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 4) Expected Coupons: Apply mapping-driven eligibility.
--    Enriched with plan, plan_count, and mapping flags for reasons.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
expected_coupons AS (
  SELECT
      ep.CLIENT_ACCT_ID,
      ep.PLAN,
      ep.plan_count,
      m.cupon,
      m.discount,
      m.autopay_true,
      m.ebill,
      COALESCE(m.payment_method, '') AS mapping_payment_method,
      m.multiple_allowed,
      m.is_max,
      CASE 
        WHEN m.multiple_allowed = true THEN m.discount
        WHEN m.multiple_allowed = false 
             AND ep.plan_count >= 2 
             AND m.is_max = true THEN m.discount
        WHEN m.multiple_allowed = false 
             AND ep.plan_count < 2 
             AND m.is_max = false THEN m.discount
        ELSE 0
      END AS discount_value
  FROM expected_plan_counts ep
  JOIN base b 
    ON ep.CLIENT_ACCT_ID = b.CLIENT_ACCT_ID
  JOIN "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".plan_coupon_mapping m
    ON lower(trim(ep.PLAN)) = lower(trim(m.plan))
   AND m.domain = 'autopay'
  WHERE
    (m.autopay_true = false OR b.AUTOPAY = true)
    AND (m.ebill = false OR UPPER(b.BILL_DELIVERY) IN ('EMAIL', 'ELECTRONIC STATEMENTS', 'ELECTRONIC STATEMENT'))
    AND (
      m.payment_method IS NULL
      OR m.payment_method = ''
      OR m.payment_method = b.PAYMENT_METHOD
    )
),

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 5) Aggregate expected discount per account (dedupe per cupon first).
--------------------------------------------------------------------
expected_coupon_discount AS (
  SELECT
      CLIENT_ACCT_ID,
      SUM(discount_value) AS expected_discount
  FROM (
    SELECT CLIENT_ACCT_ID, cupon, MAX(discount_value) AS discount_value
    FROM expected_coupons
    GROUP BY CLIENT_ACCT_ID, cupon
  ) t
  GROUP BY CLIENT_ACCT_ID
),

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 6) Build the expected coupon set (distinct expected coupon codes for each account).
--------------------------------------------------------------------
expected_coupon_set AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT 
         CLIENT_ACCT_ID, 
         cupon AS coupon
  FROM expected_coupons
  WHERE discount_value > 0
),

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 7) Extract applied coupon codes using CROSS JOIN UNNEST.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
applied_coupons AS (
  SELECT 
      a.CLIENT_ACCT_ID,
      TRIM(t.coupon) AS coupon
  FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_auto_pay a
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(LOWER(a.COUPONS_CODES), '|')) AS t(coupon)
  WHERE a.COUPONS_CODES IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(t.coupon) <> ''         -- guard against empty tokens
),

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 8) Deduplicate the applied coupon codes per account.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
distinct_applied_coupons AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT 
         CLIENT_ACCT_ID, 
         coupon
  FROM applied_coupons
),

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 9) Coupon whitelist from mapping (domain='autopay') for current discount & relevance.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
distinct_coupon_mapping AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT 
         lower(trim(cupon)) AS cupon, 
         discount
  FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".plan_coupon_mapping
  WHERE cupon IN (
    'autopay_discountb2b_10',
    'autopay_discountb2b_15',
    'autopay_discountb2b_20'
  ) AND domain = 'autopay'
),

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 9b) Human-readable reasons for expected coupons (per coupon/account)
--     (Athena-safe: concat + cast; no format/ternary)
--------------------------------------------------------------------
expected_coupon_reasons AS (
  SELECT
    ec.CLIENT_ACCT_ID,
    lower(trim(ec.cupon)) AS coupon,
    concat(
      'Expected by mapping: plan="', ec.PLAN, '" (count=', CAST(ec.plan_count AS VARCHAR), '); ',
      'rules[multiple_allowed=', CAST(ec.multiple_allowed AS VARCHAR),
      ', is_max=', CAST(ec.is_max AS VARCHAR), ']; ',
      'flags[autopay_required=', CAST(ec.autopay_true AS VARCHAR),
      ', ebill_required=', CAST(ec.ebill AS VARCHAR),
      ', payment_method=', COALESCE(NULLIF(ec.mapping_payment_method, ''), 'ANY'), ']; ',
      'discount=', CAST(ec.discount AS VARCHAR)
    ) AS reason
  FROM expected_coupons ec
  WHERE ec.discount_value > 0
),

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 10) Compute missing coupons (Coupons_To_Add): expected not found among applied.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
missing_coupons AS (
  SELECT 
      e.CLIENT_ACCT_ID, 
      array_join(
        array_distinct(array_agg(e.coupon)), ', '
      ) AS coupons_to_add
  FROM (
    SELECT CLIENT_ACCT_ID, lower(trim(coupon)) AS coupon
    FROM expected_coupon_set
  ) e
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT CLIENT_ACCT_ID, lower(trim(coupon)) AS coupon
    FROM distinct_applied_coupons
  ) a
    ON e.CLIENT_ACCT_ID = a.CLIENT_ACCT_ID 
   AND e.coupon = a.coupon
  WHERE a.coupon IS NULL
  GROUP BY e.CLIENT_ACCT_ID
),

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 10b) Reasons for coupons_to_add (only those not currently applied)
--------------------------------------------------------------------
missing_coupons_reason AS (
  SELECT 
    r.CLIENT_ACCT_ID,
    array_join(
      array_agg(concat(r.coupon, ' -> ', r.reason)),
      ' | '
    ) AS coupons_to_add_reason
  FROM expected_coupon_reasons r
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT CLIENT_ACCT_ID, lower(trim(coupon)) AS coupon
    FROM distinct_applied_coupons
  ) a
    ON r.CLIENT_ACCT_ID = a.CLIENT_ACCT_ID AND r.coupon = a.coupon
  WHERE a.coupon IS NULL
  GROUP BY r.CLIENT_ACCT_ID
),

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 11) Compute extra coupons (Coupons_To_Remove):
--     applied coupons that are NOT expected (limited to autopay-domain whitelist).
--------------------------------------------------------------------
extra_coupons AS (
  SELECT 
      a.CLIENT_ACCT_ID,
      array_join(
        array_distinct(array_agg(a.coupon)), ', '
      ) AS coupons_to_remove
  FROM (
    SELECT CLIENT_ACCT_ID, lower(trim(coupon)) AS coupon
    FROM distinct_applied_coupons
  ) a
  JOIN distinct_coupon_mapping w
    ON a.coupon = w.cupon           -- consider only autopay-domain coupons
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT CLIENT_ACCT_ID, lower(trim(coupon)) AS coupon
    FROM expected_coupon_set
  ) e
    ON a.CLIENT_ACCT_ID = e.CLIENT_ACCT_ID 
   AND a.coupon = e.coupon
  WHERE e.coupon IS NULL
  GROUP BY a.CLIENT_ACCT_ID
),

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 11b) Reasons for coupons_to_remove (applied but not expected).
--------------------------------------------------------------------
extra_coupons_reason AS (
  SELECT 
    a.CLIENT_ACCT_ID,
    array_join(
      array_agg(
        concat(
          a.coupon,
          ' -> Applied but not expected for any active plan in domain=autopay ',
          '(check plan eligibility and flags: AUTOPAY/EBILL/payment_method).'
        )
      ),
      ' | '
    ) AS coupons_to_remove_reason
  FROM (
    SELECT CLIENT_ACCT_ID, lower(trim(coupon)) AS coupon
    FROM distinct_applied_coupons
  ) a
  JOIN distinct_coupon_mapping w
    ON a.coupon = w.cupon
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT CLIENT_ACCT_ID, lower(trim(coupon)) AS coupon
    FROM expected_coupon_set
  ) e
    ON a.CLIENT_ACCT_ID = e.CLIENT_ACCT_ID 
   AND a.coupon = e.coupon
  WHERE e.coupon IS NULL
  GROUP BY a.CLIENT_ACCT_ID
),

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 12) Compute current coupon discount by summing discount values for applied coupons (whitelisted).
--------------------------------------------------------------------
current_coupon_discount AS (
  SELECT 
      ac.CLIENT_ACCT_ID,
      SUM(m.discount) AS current_discount
  FROM (
    SELECT CLIENT_ACCT_ID, lower(trim(coupon)) AS coupon
    FROM distinct_applied_coupons
  ) ac
  JOIN distinct_coupon_mapping m
    ON ac.coupon = m.cupon
  GROUP BY ac.CLIENT_ACCT_ID
),

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 13) Aggregate relevant applied coupons (restricted to whitelist) into a comma-separated string.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
relevant_coupons AS (
  SELECT 
      ac.CLIENT_ACCT_ID,
      array_join(
        array_distinct(array_agg(ac.coupon)), ', '
      ) AS relevant_coupons
  FROM (
    SELECT CLIENT_ACCT_ID, lower(trim(coupon)) AS coupon
    FROM distinct_applied_coupons
  ) ac
  JOIN distinct_coupon_mapping m
    ON ac.coupon = m.cupon
  GROUP BY ac.CLIENT_ACCT_ID
),

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 14) Final base of unique accounts (carry along SF & IAV joins later).
--------------------------------------------------------------------
final_base AS (
  SELECT 
      CLIENT_ACCT_ID,
      max(customer_type)       AS customer_type,
      MAX(CLIENT_PLAN_ID)      AS CLIENT_PLAN_ID,
      MAX(ARIA_INSTANCE_NO)    AS ARIA_INSTANCE_NO,
      MAX(AUTOPAY)             AS AUTOPAY,
      MAX(BILL_DELIVERY)       AS BILL_DELIVERY,
      MAX(PLAN_DESCRIPTIONS)   AS PLAN_DESCRIPTIONS,
      MAX(COUPONS_CODES)       AS COUPONS_CODES,
      MAX(PAYMENT_METHOD)      AS PAYMENT_METHOD
  FROM exploded_plans
  GROUP BY CLIENT_ACCT_ID
),

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 15a) B2B plan set from mapping (domain='autopay' and cupon like '%b2b%')
--------------------------------------------------------------------
b2b_plans AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT lower(trim(plan)) AS plan_norm
  FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".plan_coupon_mapping
  WHERE domain = 'autopay'
    AND lower(cupon) LIKE '%b2b%'
),

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 15b) Per-MSISDN plan mapping from Aria (Active only; exclude wearable)
--------------------------------------------------------------------
msisdn_plan_map AS (
  SELECT
      a.client_acct_id AS client_acct_id,
      a.msisdn,
      lower(trim(a.plan_description)) AS plan_norm
  FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_msisdn_lines a
  WHERE a.msisdn IS NOT NULL
    AND a.acct_status_std = 'Active'
    AND a.plan_status_std = 'Active'
    AND (a.plan_description IS NOT NULL AND lower(a.plan_description) NOT LIKE '%wearable%')
),

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 15c) MSISDNs that DO have at least one B2B plan
--------------------------------------------------------------------
msisdn_has_b2b AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
      m.client_acct_id,
      m.msisdn
  FROM msisdn_plan_map m
  JOIN b2b_plans b
    ON m.plan_norm = b.plan_norm
),

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 15d) Aggregate MSISDNs that do NOT have any B2B plan
--------------------------------------------------------------------
msisdns_without_b2b_plans AS (
  SELECT
      m.client_acct_id AS CLIENT_ACCT_ID,
      array_join(array_distinct(array_agg(m.msisdn)), ', ') AS msisdns_without_b2b_plans
  FROM msisdn_plan_map m
  LEFT JOIN msisdn_has_b2b h
    ON m.client_acct_id = h.client_acct_id
   AND m.msisdn = h.msisdn
  WHERE h.msisdn IS NULL
  GROUP BY m.client_acct_id
),

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 15) Final assembly with expected vs current + helpers.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
autopay_discrepancy_report AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
      fb.CLIENT_ACCT_ID,
      sa.billing_name,
      vaa.lines_count,
      COALESCE(NULLIF(nw.msisdns_without_b2b_plans, ''), 'NA') as msisdns_with_autopay_ineligible_plans,
      vaa.customer_class,
      fb.CLIENT_PLAN_ID,
      fb.ARIA_INSTANCE_NO,
      fb.customer_type,
      fb.AUTOPAY,
      iav.autopay_alignment,
      iav.discrepancy_reason autopay_discrepancy_reason,
      fb.BILL_DELIVERY,
      fb.PLAN_DESCRIPTIONS,
      fb.COUPONS_CODES,
      fb.PAYMENT_METHOD,
      COALESCE(ecd.expected_discount, 0) AS expected_discount,
      COALESCE(ccd.current_discount, 0)  AS current_discount,
      sa.sf_autopay_coupon,
      rc.relevant_coupons,
      mc.coupons_to_add,
      ec.coupons_to_remove,
      COALESCE(mcr.coupons_to_add_reason, 'NA')     AS coupons_to_add_reason,
      COALESCE(ecr.coupons_to_remove_reason, 'NA')  AS coupons_to_remove_reason
  FROM final_base fb
  LEFT JOIN expected_coupon_discount ecd
    ON fb.CLIENT_ACCT_ID = ecd.CLIENT_ACCT_ID
  LEFT JOIN current_coupon_discount ccd
    ON fb.CLIENT_ACCT_ID = ccd.CLIENT_ACCT_ID
  LEFT JOIN relevant_coupons rc
    ON fb.CLIENT_ACCT_ID = rc.CLIENT_ACCT_ID
  LEFT JOIN missing_coupons mc
    ON fb.CLIENT_ACCT_ID = mc.CLIENT_ACCT_ID
  LEFT JOIN extra_coupons ec
    ON fb.CLIENT_ACCT_ID = ec.CLIENT_ACCT_ID
  LEFT JOIN missing_coupons_reason mcr
    ON fb.CLIENT_ACCT_ID = mcr.CLIENT_ACCT_ID
  LEFT JOIN extra_coupons_reason ecr
    ON fb.CLIENT_ACCT_ID = ecr.CLIENT_ACCT_ID
  LEFT JOIN "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sffinal_b2b_accounts sa
    ON sa.billing_bancan = fb.CLIENT_ACCT_ID
  LEFT JOIN "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_is_autopay_valid iav 
    ON iav.a_bancan = sa.billing_bancan
  LEFT JOIN "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_ariafinal_accounts vaa 
    ON vaa.client_acct_id = fb.CLIENT_ACCT_ID
  LEFT JOIN msisdns_without_b2b_plans nw
    ON nw.CLIENT_ACCT_ID = fb.CLIENT_ACCT_ID
)
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 16) DQ output
--------------------------------------------------------------------
SELECT DISTINCT 
  'DQ-0000145' AS DQ_No,
  *
FROM autopay_discrepancy_report
WHERE 
  (
    expected_discount <> current_discount
    OR COALESCE(length(coupons_to_add), 0) > 0
    OR COALESCE(length(coupons_to_remove), 0) > 0
  )
  AND customer_type = 'B2B'
  AND COALESCE(lower(sf_autopay_coupon), '') <> COALESCE(lower(relevant_coupons), '')
and CLIENT_ACCT_ID not in ('23510697-23510634',
'41001399-43534112',
'43529174-43528932')
  ;

Description: Validate that the Master Plan Next Bill Date is not in the past compared to the oldest active asset. Custom Query. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH parsed AS (
    SELECT
       acct_no,
        client_acct_id,
        msisdn,
        bill_day,
        gp_next_bill_dt,
        rp_next_bill_dt,
        ad_next_bill_dt,
        ad2_next_bill_dt,
        acct_status,
        group_plan_oli_id,
        group_plan_status,
        rate_plan_oli_id,
        rate_plan_status,
        general_device_plan_status,
        master_plan_status,
        rate_plan_name,

        -- Robust parser for mp_next_bill_date
        COALESCE(
          TRY(CAST(date_parse(CAST(mp_next_bill_date AS VARCHAR), '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE)),
          TRY(CAST(date_parse(CAST(mp_next_bill_date AS VARCHAR), '%m-%d-%Y') AS DATE)),
          TRY(CAST(date_parse(CAST(mp_next_bill_date AS VARCHAR), '%d-%m-%Y') AS DATE)),
          TRY(CAST(date_parse(CAST(mp_next_bill_date AS VARCHAR), '%Y/%m/%d') AS DATE)),
          TRY(CAST(date_parse(CAST(mp_next_bill_date AS VARCHAR), '%m/%d/%Y') AS DATE)),
          TRY(CAST(date_parse(CAST(mp_next_bill_date AS VARCHAR), '%d/%m/%Y') AS DATE))
        ) AS mp_next_bill_dt
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_hierarchy_all_status_reverse
    WHERE rate_plan_name <> 'PR_B2C_Mobile_Late_Payment_Fee'
      AND master_plan_status = 'Active'
      AND COALESCE(group_plan_status,'Active') = 'Active'
      AND COALESCE(rate_plan_status,'Active') = 'Active'
     -- AND COALESCE(addon_plan_statuses,'Active') like '%Active%'
      AND COALESCE(general_device_plan_status,'Active') = 'Active'
      AND acct_status = 'Active'
),

acct_min_next_bill AS (
    SELECT client_acct_id, MIN(dt) AS acct_min_next_bill_dt
    FROM (
        SELECT client_acct_id, gp_next_bill_dt AS dt FROM parsed WHERE gp_next_bill_dt IS NOT NULL
        UNION ALL
        SELECT client_acct_id, rp_next_bill_dt     FROM parsed WHERE rp_next_bill_dt IS NOT NULL
        UNION ALL
        SELECT client_acct_id, ad_next_bill_dt     FROM parsed WHERE ad_next_bill_dt IS NOT NULL
        UNION ALL
        SELECT client_acct_id, ad2_next_bill_dt    FROM parsed WHERE ad2_next_bill_dt IS NOT NULL
    ) u
    GROUP BY client_acct_id
),
discrepancy_report as (
SELECT DISTINCT
    'DQ-0000137' AS dq_no,
p.acct_no,
    p.bill_day,
    p.client_acct_id,
    (select aria_instance_no from "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_ariafinal_all where client_acct_id = p.client_acct_id and plan_type ='Master Plan'  ) master_plan_instance_no,
    p.mp_next_bill_dt master_plan_next_bill_date,
    a.acct_min_next_bill_dt oldest_sup_nxt_bill_dt,
    DATE_DIFF('day', a.acct_min_next_bill_dt, p.mp_next_bill_dt) AS days_gap,
	row_number() over (partition by p.client_acct_id order by p.rate_plan_oli_id desc ) row_num
FROM parsed p
JOIN acct_min_next_bill a
  ON a.client_acct_id = p.client_acct_id
where  p.mp_next_bill_dt  <  a.acct_min_next_bill_dt ) select dq_no,acct_no,bill_day,client_acct_id,master_plan_instance_no,master_plan_next_bill_date,oldest_sup_nxt_bill_dt,days_gap
from discrepancy_report where row_num = 1;

Description: Autopay discount discrepancy rule check for B2C customers.. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH 
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 1. Explode the PLAN_DESCRIPTIONS into individual plan rows.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
exploded_plans AS (
SELECT 
    a.CLIENT_ACCT_ID,
    a.CLIENT_PLAN_ID,
    a.ARIA_INSTANCE_NO,
    a.customer_type,
    a.AUTOPAY,
    a.BILL_DELIVERY,
    a.PLAN_DESCRIPTIONS,
    a.COUPONS_CODES,         -- applied coupon codes from the source view
    a.PAYMENT_METHOD,
    TRIM(plan) AS PLAN       -- individual plan extracted from the pipe-delimited list
  FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_auto_pay a
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(a.PLAN_DESCRIPTIONS, '|')) AS t(plan)
  WHERE --(a.AUTOPAY = true OR UPPER(a.BILL_DELIVERY) IN ('EMAIL', 'ELECTRONIC STATEMENTS'))
  --and 
  ACCT_STATUS = 'Active'
  and lower(PLAN_DESCRIPTIONS) not like '%wearable%'
),
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 2. Group by CLIENT_ACCT_ID and PLAN to get the count for each plan.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
expected_plan_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    CLIENT_ACCT_ID,
    PLAN,
    COUNT(*) AS plan_count
  FROM exploded_plans
  GROUP BY CLIENT_ACCT_ID, PLAN
),
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 3. Base client-level info (for eligibility & payment method matching)
--------------------------------------------------------------------
base AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT 
    CLIENT_ACCT_ID, 
    AUTOPAY, 
    BILL_DELIVERY, 
    PAYMENT_METHOD
  FROM exploded_plans
),
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 4. Expected Coupons: Apply the expected discount logic per plan.
--    Also capture the REASON each coupon is expected, based on which
--    branch of the CASE rule matched.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
expected_coupons AS (
  SELECT
    ep.CLIENT_ACCT_ID,
    m.cupon,
    ep.PLAN,
    ep.plan_count,
    b.PAYMENT_METHOD,
    CASE 
      WHEN m.multiple_allowed = true THEN m.discount
      WHEN m.multiple_allowed = false 
           AND ep.plan_count >= 2 
           AND m.is_max = true THEN m.discount
      WHEN m.multiple_allowed = false 
           AND ep.plan_count < 2 
           AND m.is_max = false THEN m.discount
      ELSE 0
    END AS discount_value,
    CASE 
      WHEN m.multiple_allowed = true 
        THEN 'Plan "' || ep.PLAN || '" (x' || CAST(ep.plan_count AS VARCHAR) 
             || ') qualifies for coupon "' || m.cupon 
             || '" (multiple-allowed rule)'
             || CASE WHEN length(coalesce(m.payment_method,'')) > 0 
                     THEN ' with payment method ' || m.payment_method ELSE '' END
      WHEN m.multiple_allowed = false 
           AND ep.plan_count >= 2 
           AND m.is_max = true 
        THEN 'Plan "' || ep.PLAN || '" has ' || CAST(ep.plan_count AS VARCHAR) 
             || ' occurrences (>=2) -> max-tier coupon "' || m.cupon || '" applies'
             || CASE WHEN length(coalesce(m.payment_method,'')) > 0 
                     THEN ' with payment method ' || m.payment_method ELSE '' END
      WHEN m.multiple_allowed = false 
           AND ep.plan_count < 2 
           AND m.is_max = false 
        THEN 'Plan "' || ep.PLAN || '" has ' || CAST(ep.plan_count AS VARCHAR) 
             || ' occurrence (<2) -> base-tier coupon "' || m.cupon || '" applies'
             || CASE WHEN length(coalesce(m.payment_method,'')) > 0 
                     THEN ' with payment method ' || m.payment_method ELSE '' END
      ELSE NULL
    END AS expected_reason
  FROM expected_plan_counts ep
  JOIN base b 
    ON ep.CLIENT_ACCT_ID = b.CLIENT_ACCT_ID
  JOIN "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".plan_coupon_mapping m
    ON ep.PLAN = m.plan
  WHERE b.AUTOPAY = true
    AND domain = 'autopay'
    AND UPPER(b.BILL_DELIVERY) IN ('EMAIL', 'ELECTRONIC STATEMENTS')
    AND (length(m.payment_method) =0  OR m.payment_method = b.PAYMENT_METHOD)
),
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 5. Aggregate expected discount per account.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
expected_coupon_discount AS (
  SELECT
    CLIENT_ACCT_ID,
    SUM(discount_value) AS expected_discount
  FROM (
    SELECT CLIENT_ACCT_ID, cupon, MAX(discount_value) AS discount_value
    FROM expected_coupons
    GROUP BY CLIENT_ACCT_ID, cupon
  ) t
  GROUP BY CLIENT_ACCT_ID
),
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 6. Build the expected coupon set (distinct expected coupon codes for each account).
--------------------------------------------------------------------
expected_coupon_set AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT 
         CLIENT_ACCT_ID, 
         cupon AS coupon
  FROM expected_coupons
  WHERE discount_value > 0
),
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 6b. Consolidated reason per (account, coupon) for EXPECTED coupons.
--     Collapses multiple matching plan rows into one descriptive string.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
expected_coupon_reasons AS (
  SELECT 
    CLIENT_ACCT_ID,
    cupon AS coupon,
    array_join(array_agg(DISTINCT expected_reason), ' ; ') AS reason_text
  FROM expected_coupons
  WHERE discount_value > 0
    AND expected_reason IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY CLIENT_ACCT_ID, cupon
),
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 7. Extract applied coupon codes using CROSS JOIN UNNEST.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
applied_coupons AS (
  SELECT 
    a.CLIENT_ACCT_ID,
    TRIM(t.coupon) AS coupon
  FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_auto_pay a
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(LOWER(a.COUPONS_CODES), '|')) AS t(coupon)
  WHERE a.COUPONS_CODES IS NOT NULL
),
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 8. Deduplicate the applied coupon codes per account.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
distinct_applied_coupons AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT 
         CLIENT_ACCT_ID, 
         coupon
  FROM applied_coupons
),
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 9. Compute missing coupons (Coupons_To_Add):
--    Expected coupons that are NOT found among the applied coupons.
--    Also build a paired reason list explaining WHY each coupon should be added.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
missing_coupons AS (
  SELECT 
    e.CLIENT_ACCT_ID, 
    array_join(array_agg(DISTINCT e.coupon), ', ') AS coupons_to_add,
    array_join(
      array_agg(DISTINCT 
        e.coupon || ' -> ' 
        || COALESCE(r.reason_text, 'Expected by plan-coupon mapping but not currently applied')
      ), 
      ' | '
    ) AS coupons_to_add_reason
  FROM expected_coupon_set e
  LEFT JOIN distinct_applied_coupons a
    ON e.CLIENT_ACCT_ID = a.CLIENT_ACCT_ID 
   AND e.coupon = a.coupon
  LEFT JOIN expected_coupon_reasons r
    ON e.CLIENT_ACCT_ID = r.CLIENT_ACCT_ID
   AND e.coupon = r.coupon
  WHERE a.coupon IS NULL
  GROUP BY e.CLIENT_ACCT_ID
),
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 10. Compute extra coupons (Coupons_To_Remove):
--     Applied coupons that are NOT expected.
--     Reason explains why the applied coupon does not qualify.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
extra_coupons AS (
  SELECT 
    a.CLIENT_ACCT_ID,
    array_join(array_agg(DISTINCT a.coupon), ', ') AS coupons_to_remove,
    array_join(
      array_agg(DISTINCT 
        a.coupon || ' -> Applied but not expected: no matching plan/payment-method rule '
                 || 'qualifies this account for coupon "' || a.coupon || '"'
      ), 
      ' | '
    ) AS coupons_to_remove_reason
  FROM distinct_applied_coupons a
  LEFT JOIN expected_coupon_set e
    ON a.CLIENT_ACCT_ID = e.CLIENT_ACCT_ID 
   AND a.coupon = e.coupon
  WHERE e.coupon IS null
  and a.coupon like '%auto%'
  GROUP BY a.CLIENT_ACCT_ID
),
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 11. Deduplicate mapping for current discount.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
distinct_coupon_mapping AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT 
         cupon,
         discount
  FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".plan_coupon_mapping
  WHERE cupon IN (
    'autopay_discount',
    'autopay_discount_cc_5',
    'autopay_discount_ach_10',
    'autopay_discount_5',
    'autopay_discount_10',
    'autopay_discount_20'
  )   AND domain = 'autopay'
),
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 12. Compute current coupon discount by summing discount values for applied coupons.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
current_coupon_discount AS (
  SELECT 
    ac.CLIENT_ACCT_ID,
    SUM(m.discount) AS current_discount
  FROM distinct_applied_coupons ac
  JOIN distinct_coupon_mapping m
         ON ac.coupon = m.cupon
  GROUP BY ac.CLIENT_ACCT_ID
),
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 13. Aggregate the relevant applied coupons (from the autopay discount list) into a comma-separated string.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
relevant_coupons AS (
  SELECT 
    CLIENT_ACCT_ID,
    array_join(array_agg(DISTINCT coupon), ', ') AS relevant_coupons
  FROM distinct_applied_coupons
  WHERE coupon IN (
    'autopay_discount',
    'autopay_discount_cc_5',
    'autopay_discount_ach_10',
    'autopay_discount_5',
    'autopay_discount_10',
    'autopay_discount_20'
  )
  GROUP BY CLIENT_ACCT_ID
),
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 14. Build a final base of unique accounts.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
final_base AS (
  SELECT 
    CLIENT_ACCT_ID,
    max(customer_type) as customer_type,
    MAX(CLIENT_PLAN_ID) AS CLIENT_PLAN_ID,
    MAX(ARIA_INSTANCE_NO) AS ARIA_INSTANCE_NO,
    MAX(AUTOPAY) AS AUTOPAY,
    MAX(BILL_DELIVERY) AS BILL_DELIVERY,
    MAX(PLAN_DESCRIPTIONS) AS PLAN_DESCRIPTIONS,
    MAX(COUPONS_CODES) AS COUPONS_CODES,
    MAX(PAYMENT_METHOD) AS PAYMENT_METHOD
  FROM exploded_plans
  GROUP BY CLIENT_ACCT_ID
),
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 15. Final Output
--------------------------------------------------------------------
autopay_discrepancy_report as (
SELECT 
  fb.CLIENT_ACCT_ID,
  fb.CLIENT_PLAN_ID,
  fb.ARIA_INSTANCE_NO,
  fb.customer_type,
  fb.AUTOPAY,
  fb.BILL_DELIVERY,
  fb.PLAN_DESCRIPTIONS,
  fb.COUPONS_CODES,
  fb.PAYMENT_METHOD,
  COALESCE(ecd.expected_discount, 0) AS expected_discount,
  COALESCE(ccd.current_discount, 0) AS current_discount,
  sa.sf_autopay_coupon,
  relevant_coupons.relevant_coupons,
  missing_coupons.coupons_to_add,
  missing_coupons.coupons_to_add_reason,       -- NEW
  extra_coupons.coupons_to_remove,
  extra_coupons.coupons_to_remove_reason       -- NEW
FROM final_base fb
LEFT JOIN expected_coupon_discount ecd
   ON fb.CLIENT_ACCT_ID = ecd.CLIENT_ACCT_ID
LEFT JOIN current_coupon_discount ccd
   ON fb.CLIENT_ACCT_ID = ccd.CLIENT_ACCT_ID
LEFT JOIN relevant_coupons 
   ON fb.CLIENT_ACCT_ID = relevant_coupons.CLIENT_ACCT_ID
LEFT JOIN missing_coupons 
   ON fb.CLIENT_ACCT_ID = missing_coupons.CLIENT_ACCT_ID
LEFT JOIN extra_coupons 
   ON fb.CLIENT_ACCT_ID = extra_coupons.CLIENT_ACCT_ID
left join "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sffinal_accounts sa
   on sa.bancan =  fb.CLIENT_ACCT_ID  
)
select  'DQ-0000083' AS DQ_No,* from autopay_discrepancy_report where (expected_discount <> current_discount or 
(( length(coupons_to_add) > 0 or length(coupons_to_remove) > 0) or coalesce (lower(sf_autopay_coupon),'') <> coalesce(lower(relevant_coupons),'')) )
 and  customer_type = 'B2C' and COUPONS_CODES not like '%empdiscount%'
 and trim(relevant_coupons) not in ('autopay_discount_10,autopay_discount_cc_5','autopay_discount_10,autopay_discount_ach_10' )
 and payment_method not in ('CC','ACH')
and  CLIENT_ACCT_ID not in ('23510697-23510634',
'41001399-43534112',
'43529174-43528932')
   ;
