Description: Auto-Pay: Validate that autopay payment option is enabled consistently between SF & Aria for both Dunning and Non-dunning customers. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH dq_44 AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    'DQ-0000136' AS dq_no,
    bancan AS a_bancan,
    sf_acct_segment AS sf_acct_segment,
    CASE
      WHEN sf_billfromdate_pr IS NOT NULL THEN
        CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM CAST(sf_billfromdate_pr AS DATE)) AS INTEGER)
      ELSE -1
    END AS sf_billfromdate_pr_std,
    sf_ssp_autopayenable,
    sf_autopay_billdelivery_method,
    sf_payment_method_isactive,
    case when sf_acct_segment = 'B2C' then sf_payment_method_token when sf_acct_segment= 'B2B' then 
sf_payment_method_token_b2b end as sf_payment_method_token_trans,
    ar_primary_payment_method_token,       -- kept in case you need it downstream
    sf_billing_paymentmethod_type_pr,
    ar_bill_delivery,
    ar_payment_option,
    ar_payment_method,
ar_acct_no,
sf_autopay_coupon,
ar_coupon_codes_active,

    CASE
      WHEN sf_ssp_autopayenable = TRUE
        AND sf_billing_paymentmethod_type_pr IN ('Bank Account','Credit Card / Debit Card','null')
        AND SUBSTRING(UPPER(sf_autopay_billdelivery_method), 1, 1) = 'E'
        AND UPPER(sf_payment_method_isactive) = 'TRUE'
        AND TRIM(sf_payment_method_token) IS NOT NULL
        AND TRIM(sf_payment_method_token) <> ''
        and sf_acct_segment = 'B2C'
      THEN 'SF_AUTOPAY_VALID'
      
      WHEN sf_ssp_autopayenable = TRUE
        AND sf_billing_paymentmethod_type_pr IN ('Bank Account','Credit Card / Debit Card','null')
        AND SUBSTRING(UPPER(sf_autopay_billdelivery_method), 1, 1) = 'E'
        AND UPPER(sf_payment_method_isactive) = 'TRUE'
        AND TRIM(sf_payment_method_token_b2b) IS NOT NULL
        AND TRIM(sf_payment_method_token_b2b) <> ''
        and sf_acct_segment = 'B2B'
      THEN 'SF_AUTOPAY_VALID'
      
      
      ELSE 'SF_AUTOPAY_INVALID'
    END AS sf_autopay_validation,

    CASE
      WHEN ar_payment_option = 'Methods'
        AND SUBSTRING(UPPER(ar_bill_delivery), 1, 1) = 'E'
        AND ar_payment_method IN ('CC','ACH')
      THEN 'AR_AUTOPAY_VALID'
      ELSE 'AR_AUTOPAY_INVALID'
    END AS ar_autopay_validation
  FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_all_segement_accounts
  WHERE sf_acct_status_std = 'Active'
    AND ar_acct_status_std = 'Active'
    AND ar_plan_status_std = 'Active'
    AND ar_active_msisdn_count > 0
   -- AND CAST(ar_dunning_state AS INTEGER) = 0
    --AND ar_dunning_process <> 'Dunning_process_Payment_Plan'
),
final AS (
  SELECT
    dq.*,

    -- Combined alignment exactly from your two flags
    CASE
      WHEN sf_autopay_validation = 'SF_AUTOPAY_VALID' AND ar_autopay_validation = 'AR_AUTOPAY_VALID'
        THEN 'Match: Both Valid'
      WHEN sf_autopay_validation = 'SF_AUTOPAY_INVALID' AND ar_autopay_validation = 'AR_AUTOPAY_INVALID'
        THEN 'Match: Both Invalid'
      WHEN sf_autopay_validation = 'SF_AUTOPAY_VALID'   AND ar_autopay_validation = 'AR_AUTOPAY_INVALID'
        THEN 'Mismatch: SF Valid / AR Invalid'
      WHEN sf_autopay_validation = 'SF_AUTOPAY_INVALID' AND ar_autopay_validation = 'AR_AUTOPAY_VALID'
        THEN 'Mismatch: SF Invalid / AR Valid'
      ELSE 'Unknown'
    END AS autopay_alignment,

    -- Explain exactly which checks failed on each side (no lambdas, skips NULLs)
    CONCAT_WS(
      '; ',
      CASE WHEN sf_autopay_validation = 'SF_AUTOPAY_INVALID' THEN CONCAT(
        'SF issues: ',
        CONCAT_WS(', ',
          CASE WHEN sf_ssp_autopayenable <> TRUE THEN 'sf_ssp_autopayenable=false' END,
          CASE WHEN sf_billing_paymentmethod_type_pr NOT IN ('Bank Account','Credit Card / Debit Card','null')
               THEN 'sf_billing_paymentmethod_type_pr not in [Bank Account, Credit Card / Debit Card, null]' END,
          CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(UPPER(COALESCE(sf_autopay_billdelivery_method,'')), 1, 1) <> 'E'
               THEN 'sf_autopay_billdelivery_method not electronic' END,
          CASE WHEN UPPER(COALESCE(sf_payment_method_isactive,'')) <> 'TRUE'
               THEN 'sf_payment_method_isactive!=TRUE' END,
          CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(sf_payment_method_token_trans AS VARCHAR), '')) = ''
               THEN 'sf_payment_method_token_trans missing/blank' END
        )
      ) END,
      CASE WHEN ar_autopay_validation = 'AR_AUTOPAY_INVALID' THEN CONCAT(
        'AR issues: ',
        CONCAT_WS(', ',
          CASE WHEN ar_payment_option <> 'Methods' THEN 'ar_payment_option!=Methods' END,
          CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(UPPER(COALESCE(ar_bill_delivery,'')), 1, 1) <> 'E'
               THEN 'ar_bill_delivery not electronic' END,
          CASE WHEN ar_payment_method NOT IN ('CC','ACH')
               THEN 'ar_payment_method not in (CC, ACH)' END,
	      CASE when lower(ar_coupon_codes_active) like '%autopay%' then 'REMOVE Autopay Coupon' end
        )
      ) END
    ) AS discrepancy_reason
  FROM dq_44 dq
)
SELECT
  dq_no,
ar_acct_no,
  a_bancan,
  sf_acct_segment,
  sf_billfromdate_pr_std,
  autopay_alignment,
  discrepancy_reason,
  -- keep originals for debugging
  sf_ssp_autopayenable,
  sf_billing_paymentmethod_type_pr,
  sf_autopay_billdelivery_method,
  sf_payment_method_isactive,
  sf_payment_method_token_trans,
  ar_payment_option,
  ar_bill_delivery,
  ar_payment_method,
  ar_primary_payment_method_token,
sf_autopay_coupon,
ar_coupon_codes_active
FROM final
WHERE (sf_autopay_validation = 'SF_AUTOPAY_VALID' AND ar_autopay_validation = 'AR_AUTOPAY_INVALID')
   OR (sf_autopay_validation = 'SF_AUTOPAY_INVALID' AND ar_autopay_validation = 'AR_AUTOPAY_VALID');

Description: Discrepancy report of Plan name between SF, Aria, Matrixx, Nokia. B2C customer, Tru finder.. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH salesforce_data AS (
    SELECT 
        bancan,
        msisdn,
        vip_account__c,
        -- Not available in vw_sf_all_segment_hierarchy; set to NULL
        CAST(NULL AS varchar) AS record_parentid,
        CAST(NULL AS varchar) AS sf_account_id,
        CAST(NULL AS varchar) AS record_id,
        CAST(NULL AS varchar) AS line_asset_id,

        -- Plan status as SF provisioning status
        plan_status AS provisioning_status,
        plan_status AS provisioning_status_std,

        -- Plan mapping
        plan_code AS sf_plan,
        plan_name AS sf_plan_desc,

        -- Not available here
        CAST(NULL AS varchar) AS vlocity_cmt__assetreferenceid__c,

        acct_status,
        acct_status AS acct_status_std,
        acct_segment,
        plan_oli_id AS sf_oli_id,
        acct_paymenttype
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sf_all_segment_hierarchy
    WHERE plan_code NOT IN ('PR_B2C_Mobile_Accessory_Plan')
      AND plan_status NOT IN (
            'Disconnected',
            'Disconnect-Port out',
            'Deleted',
            'deleted',
            'Disconnect',
            'Delete',
            'disconnect',
            'Disconnet'
        )
      AND acct_paymenttype = 'Postpaid'
),

aria_data AS (
    SELECT 
        client_acct_id AS bancan,
        msisdn,
        test_acct_ind,
       null as aria_instance_no,
        master_plan_status,
        rate_plan_name AS aria_plan,
        rate_plan_description AS aria_plan_desc,
        rate_plan_oli_id AS ar_oli_id,
        rate_plan_status AS aria_status,
        group_plan_status AS parent_plan_status
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_hierarchy_all_status_reverse
    WHERE COALESCE(acct_status, 'Active') = 'Active'
      AND COALESCE(group_plan_status, 'Active') IN ('Active', 'Active Non-Billable')
      AND COALESCE(rate_plan_status, 'Active') not in ('Canceled','Terminated')
      AND rate_plan_name NOT IN ('PR_B2C_Liberty_Home_Assistance','PR_B2C_Mobile_Accessory_Plan')
),

matrixx_data AS (
    SELECT 
        mm.bancan,
        mm.msisdn,
        mp.offer_type,
        mm.subscriber_status AS ma_subscription_status,
        PO_OFFER_STATUS AS ma_plan_status,
        mp.resource_id,
        mp.commercial_plan_name AS matrixx_plan_desc,
        mp.commercial_plan_code AS matrixx_plan
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_matrixx_msisdn mm  left join "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_matrixx_mobile_plan mp on mm.msisdn=mp.msisdn and mm.bancan = mp.bancan  and PO_OFFER_STATUS <> 'Cancel'
   -- WHERE mp.SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS NOT IN ('Cancel')
   --   AND mp.PO_OFFER_STATUS NOT IN ('Cancel')
   --   and mp.catalog_item_external_id like '%Postpaid%'
),

nokia_data AS (
    SELECT 
        nr.msisdn AS nokia_msisdn,
        nr."customer id" AS nokia_cust_id,
        nr."service type" AS nokia_service_type,
        nr.migrationtype AS nokia_migration_type,
        nr.pool_id AS nokia_pool_id,
        nr.status AS nokia_status,
        nr.msisdn_status AS nokia_msisdn_status,
        np.cmr_plan_code AS nokia_plan,
        np.plan_id AS nokia_plan_id
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_nokia_raw nr
    INNER JOIN "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_nokia_commercial_plan np 
        ON nr."plan id" = np.plan_id
),

truefinder_data AS (
    SELECT 
        msisdn AS tf_msisdn,
        service_provider_name,
        CASE WHEN is_ported_out = 0 THEN 'No' ELSE 'Yes' END AS is_ported_out
    FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_true_finder_raw
),

all_msisdns AS (
    SELECT msisdn FROM salesforce_data
    UNION
    SELECT msisdn FROM aria_data
    UNION
    SELECT msisdn FROM matrixx_data
    UNION
    SELECT nokia_msisdn AS msisdn FROM nokia_data
    UNION
    SELECT tf_msisdn AS msisdn FROM truefinder_data
    WHERE tf_msisdn IS NOT NULL 
      AND is_ported_out = 'No'
),

combined_data AS (
    SELECT 
        am.msisdn,
        sf.bancan,
        sf.vip_account__c,
        sf.acct_paymenttype,
        ar.test_acct_ind,
        sf.record_parentid,
        sf.sf_account_id,
        sf.record_id,
        sf.line_asset_id,
        sf.provisioning_status,
        sf.provisioning_status_std,
        sf.sf_plan,
        sf.vlocity_cmt__assetreferenceid__c,
        sf.acct_status,
        sf.acct_status_std,
        sf.acct_segment,
        sf.sf_oli_id,
        sf.sf_plan_desc,

        ar.aria_instance_no,
        ar.master_plan_status,
        ar.aria_plan,
        ar.ar_oli_id,
        ar.aria_status,
        ar.parent_plan_status,
        ar.aria_plan_desc,

        ma.ma_subscription_status,
        ma.ma_plan_status,
        ma.resource_id,
        ma.matrixx_plan,
        ma.offer_type,
        ma.matrixx_plan_desc,

        tf.service_provider_name,
        tf.is_ported_out,

        nk.nokia_service_type,
        nk.nokia_pool_id,
        nk.nokia_status,
        nk.nokia_msisdn_status,
        nk.nokia_plan,
        nk.nokia_plan_id
    FROM all_msisdns am
    LEFT JOIN salesforce_data sf 
        ON am.msisdn = sf.msisdn
    LEFT JOIN aria_data ar 
        ON am.msisdn = ar.msisdn
    LEFT JOIN matrixx_data ma 
        ON am.msisdn = ma.msisdn
    LEFT JOIN nokia_data nk 
        ON am.msisdn = nk.nokia_msisdn
    LEFT JOIN truefinder_data tf 
        ON am.msisdn = tf.tf_msisdn
    WHERE (sf.bancan IS NULL OR ar.bancan IS NULL OR sf.bancan = ar.bancan)
      AND (ma.bancan IS NULL OR ar.bancan IS NULL OR ma.bancan = ar.bancan)
),

combined_ranked AS (
    SELECT
        cd.*,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY cd.msisdn
            ORDER BY
                CASE 
                    WHEN cd.sf_plan LIKE '%Wearable%' THEN
                        CASE 
                            WHEN cd.offer_type = 'WearablePlan' THEN 1
                            WHEN cd.offer_type = 'BasePlan' THEN 2
                            ELSE 3
                        END
                    ELSE
                        CASE 
                            WHEN cd.offer_type = 'BasePlan' THEN 1
                            WHEN cd.offer_type = 'WearablePlan' THEN 2
                            ELSE 3
                        END
                END,
                CASE WHEN cd.ma_subscription_status = 'Active' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
        ) AS mx_rn
    FROM combined_data cd
),

combined_best AS (
    SELECT * 
    FROM combined_ranked
    WHERE mx_rn = 1
),

matrixx_match_check AS (
    SELECT 
        cb.msisdn,
        CASE 
            WHEN EXISTS (
                SELECT 1 
                FROM matrixx_data md
                WHERE md.msisdn = cb.msisdn
                  AND md.matrixx_plan = cb.sf_plan
                  AND md.matrixx_plan = cb.aria_plan
                  AND md.matrixx_plan = cb.nokia_plan
            ) THEN TRUE
            ELSE FALSE
        END AS has_matching_matrixx_plan
    FROM combined_best cb
),

discrepancy_analysis AS (
    SELECT 
        cb.*,
        mmc.has_matching_matrixx_plan,
        CASE
            WHEN mmc.has_matching_matrixx_plan = TRUE THEN 'Valid'
            WHEN cb.sf_plan IS NULL 
             AND cb.aria_plan IS NULL 
             AND cb.matrixx_plan IS NULL 
             AND cb.nokia_plan IS NOT NULL 
                THEN 'Valid'
                
            when provisioning_status = 'Suspended' and ma_subscription_status = 'Lost-Stolen Suspend' and ma_plan_status is null then 'Valid'
            
            when sf_oli_id = ar_oli_id and sf_plan = aria_plan and matrixx_plan = nokia_plan and aria_plan = matrixx_plan then 'Valid'
                
            WHEN cb.sf_plan IS NULL 
             AND cb.aria_plan IS NULL 
             AND cb.matrixx_plan IS NULL 
             AND cb.nokia_plan IS NULL 
                THEN 'Valid'
            WHEN EXISTS (
                SELECT 1
                FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_aria_hierarchy_all_status_reverse a
                WHERE a.msisdn = cb.msisdn
                  AND (
                      a.acct_status IN ('Archived','Inactive','Permanent') 
                      OR a.master_plan_status IN ('Pending Termination','Terminated','Suspended')
                  )
            ) THEN 'Valid' 			
            WHEN cb.sf_plan LIKE '%Wearable%' THEN 'Valid'
            WHEN cb.nokia_plan_id = '16' 
                 AND cb.sf_plan = 'PR_B2C_VoiceOnly_Lifeline_Wireless_Home_Phone' 
                 AND cb.aria_plan = 'PR_B2C_VoiceOnly_Lifeline_Wireless_Home_Phone'
                 THEN 'Valid'
                 
            WHEN cb.sf_plan like 'PR_B2B_Liberty_Business_Data_Pool_DataVoice' 
                 AND cb.aria_plan like 'PR_B2B_Liberty_Business_Data_Pool_DataVoice%'
                 AND cb.matrixx_plan = 'PR_B2B_Liberty_Business_Data_Pool_DataVoice'
                 AND cb.nokia_plan = 'PR_B2B_Liberty_Business_Data_Pool_DataVoice'
                 THEN 'Valid'
                 
            WHEN cb.nokia_plan_id = '21' 
                 AND cb.sf_plan IN ('PR_B2C_100GB_MiFi_Line','PR_B2C_200GB_MiFi_Line') 
                 AND cb.aria_plan IN ('PR_B2C_100GB_MiFi_Line','PR_B2C_200GB_MiFi_Line') 
                 THEN 'Valid'

            WHEN cb.sf_plan IS NOT NULL AND cb.aria_plan IS NOT NULL 
             AND cb.matrixx_plan IS NOT NULL AND cb.nokia_plan IS NOT NULL
             AND cb.sf_plan <> cb.aria_plan 
             AND cb.sf_plan <> cb.matrixx_plan 
             AND cb.sf_plan <> cb.nokia_plan
             AND cb.aria_plan <> cb.matrixx_plan
             AND cb.aria_plan <> cb.nokia_plan
             AND cb.matrixx_plan <> cb.nokia_plan 
                THEN 'All Systems Differ'

            WHEN cb.sf_plan IS NOT NULL AND cb.aria_plan IS NOT NULL 
             AND cb.matrixx_plan IS NOT NULL AND cb.nokia_plan IS NOT NULL
             AND cb.sf_plan = cb.aria_plan 
             AND cb.sf_plan = cb.nokia_plan
             AND cb.sf_plan <> cb.matrixx_plan 
                THEN 'Matrixx Different'

            WHEN cb.sf_plan IS NOT NULL AND cb.aria_plan IS NOT NULL 
             AND cb.matrixx_plan IS NOT NULL AND cb.nokia_plan IS NOT NULL
             AND cb.sf_plan = cb.matrixx_plan 
             AND cb.sf_plan = cb.nokia_plan
             AND cb.sf_plan <> cb.aria_plan 
                THEN 'Aria Different'

            WHEN cb.sf_plan IS NOT NULL AND cb.aria_plan IS NOT NULL 
             AND cb.matrixx_plan IS NOT NULL AND cb.nokia_plan IS NOT NULL
             AND cb.sf_plan = cb.aria_plan 
             AND cb.sf_plan = cb.matrixx_plan
             AND cb.sf_plan <> cb.nokia_plan 
                THEN 'Nokia Different'

            WHEN cb.sf_plan IS NOT NULL AND cb.aria_plan IS NOT NULL 
             AND cb.matrixx_plan IS NOT NULL AND cb.nokia_plan IS NOT NULL
             AND cb.aria_plan = cb.matrixx_plan 
             AND cb.aria_plan = cb.nokia_plan
             AND cb.sf_plan <> cb.aria_plan 
                THEN 'Salesforce Different'

            WHEN cb.sf_plan IS NOT NULL AND cb.aria_plan IS NOT NULL 
             AND cb.matrixx_plan IS NOT NULL AND cb.nokia_plan IS NOT NULL
             AND cb.sf_plan = cb.aria_plan 
             AND cb.matrixx_plan = cb.nokia_plan
             AND cb.sf_plan <> cb.matrixx_plan 
                THEN 'SF-Aria vs Matrixx-Nokia'

            WHEN cb.sf_plan IS NOT NULL AND cb.aria_plan IS NOT NULL 
             AND cb.matrixx_plan IS NOT NULL AND cb.nokia_plan IS NOT NULL
             AND cb.sf_plan = cb.matrixx_plan 
             AND cb.aria_plan = cb.nokia_plan
             AND cb.sf_plan <> cb.aria_plan 
                THEN 'SF-Matrixx vs Aria-Nokia'

            WHEN cb.sf_plan IS NOT NULL AND cb.aria_plan IS NOT NULL 
             AND cb.matrixx_plan IS NOT NULL AND cb.nokia_plan IS NOT NULL
             AND cb.sf_plan = cb.nokia_plan 
             AND cb.aria_plan = cb.matrixx_plan
             AND cb.sf_plan <> cb.aria_plan 
                THEN 'SF-Nokia vs Aria-Matrixx'

            WHEN cb.sf_plan IS NOT NULL AND cb.aria_plan IS NOT NULL 
             AND cb.sf_plan <> cb.aria_plan 
                THEN 'SF-Aria Mismatch'

            WHEN cb.sf_plan IS NOT NULL AND cb.matrixx_plan IS NOT NULL 
             AND cb.sf_plan <> cb.matrixx_plan 
                THEN 'SF-Matrixx Mismatch'

            WHEN cb.sf_plan IS NOT NULL AND cb.nokia_plan IS NOT NULL 
             AND cb.sf_plan <> cb.nokia_plan 
                THEN 'SF-Nokia Mismatch'

            WHEN cb.aria_plan IS NOT NULL AND cb.matrixx_plan IS NOT NULL 
             AND cb.aria_plan <> cb.matrixx_plan 
                THEN 'Aria-Matrixx Mismatch'

            WHEN cb.aria_plan IS NOT NULL AND cb.nokia_plan IS NOT NULL 
             AND cb.aria_plan <> cb.nokia_plan 
                THEN 'Aria-Nokia Mismatch'

            WHEN cb.matrixx_plan IS NOT NULL AND cb.nokia_plan IS NOT NULL 
             AND cb.matrixx_plan <> cb.nokia_plan 
                THEN 'Matrixx-Nokia Mismatch'

            WHEN cb.sf_plan IS NULL THEN  'SF Plan is undefined'   
            WHEN cb.aria_plan IS NULL THEN  'Aria Plan is undefined'   
            WHEN cb.matrixx_plan IS NULL THEN  'Matrixx Plan is undefined' 
            WHEN cb.nokia_plan IS NULL THEN 'Nokia Plan is undefined' 
            ELSE 'Unknown Discrepancy'
        END AS discrepancy_systems
    FROM combined_best cb
    LEFT JOIN matrixx_match_check mmc 
        ON cb.msisdn = mmc.msisdn
)

Description: INFORMATIONAL: Discrepancy report to proactively identify BAN/CAN accounts where Autopay is being cancelled.. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH rb AS (  -- normalize dates from MM-DD-YYYY strings
  SELECT
    rb.*,
    TRY(CAST(date_parse(TRIM(rb.due_date),  '%m-%d-%Y') AS DATE)) AS due_dt,
    TRY(CAST(date_parse(TRIM(rb.bill_date), '%m-%d-%Y') AS DATE)) AS bill_dt
  FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".lla_bill_run_details_report rb
),
sfoh AS (  -- cancel-autopay orders with normalized timestamp
  SELECT
    bancan,
    id,
    "vlocity_cmt__Reason__c"      AS reason,
    "vlocity_cmt__OrderStatus__c" AS order_status,
    COALESCE(
      TRY(CAST(created_ts AS TIMESTAMP)),
      TRY(from_iso8601_timestamp(regexp_replace(CAST(created_ts AS VARCHAR), '([+-]\\d{2})(\\d{2})$', '\\1:\\2')))
    ) AS created_ts_norm
  FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_sf_order_history
  WHERE LOWER("vlocity_cmt__Reason__c") LIKE '%cancel%autopay%'
),
latest_cancel AS (  -- pick the latest cancel order per (BAN/CAN, bill_dt, due_dt) window
  SELECT *
  FROM (
    SELECT
      rb.ban_can,
      rb.bill_dt,
      rb.due_dt,
      oh.id,
      oh.reason,
      oh.order_status,
      oh.created_ts_norm,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY rb.ban_can, rb.bill_dt, rb.due_dt
        ORDER BY oh.created_ts_norm DESC
      ) AS rn
    FROM rb
    JOIN sfoh oh
      ON oh.bancan = rb.ban_can
     AND oh.created_ts_norm BETWEEN rb.bill_dt AND rb.due_dt  -- window condition (inclusive)
  ) q
  WHERE rn = 1
),
autopay_count as (SELECT sf_acct_segment,count(distinct a_bancan)autopay_account_count FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod"."vw_is_autopay_valid" 
where  autopay_alignment ='Match: Both Valid' and ar_acct_status_std = 'Active' and sf_acct_status_std='Active'
group by 1)
SELECT
  'DQ-0000144' AS dq_no,
  rb.ban_can                  AS bancan,
  rb.customer_type,
  ac.autopay_account_count,
  TRY(CAST(DATE_PARSE(TRIM(CAST(rb.bill_dt AS VARCHAR)), '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE)) AS bill_dt,
  TRY(CAST(DATE_PARSE(TRIM(CAST(rb.due_dt AS VARCHAR)), '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE)) AS due_dt,
  rb.balance_due,
  sfa.autopay_ssp_autopayenable,
  sfa.payment_method_token,
  lc.id orderid,
  lc.reason                   AS "vlocity_cmt__Reason__c",
  lc.order_status             AS "vlocity_cmt__OrderStatus__c",
  lc.created_ts_norm          AS order_created_ts
FROM rb
JOIN latest_cancel lc
  ON lc.ban_can = rb.ban_can
 AND lc.bill_dt = rb.bill_dt
 AND lc.due_dt  = rb.due_dt
JOIN "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_salesforce_autopay sfa
  ON TRIM(sfa.autopay_bancan) = TRIM(rb.ban_can)
join autopay_count ac on ac.sf_acct_segment = rb.customer_type
WHERE rb.due_dt > current_date
  AND COALESCE(sfa.autopay_ssp_autopayenable, FALSE) = false
  and  rb.balance_due <> '0'
order by  rb.due_dt;

Description: INFORMATIONAL: Discrepancy report to Validate that autopay draft was successfully completed or Failed. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH target_date AS (
    SELECT 
        CURRENT_DATE AS today,
        DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD('day', -16, CURRENT_DATE), '%m-%d-%Y') AS approval_date_str,
        		DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD('day', -1, CURRENT_DATE), '%m-%d-%Y') AS due_date_str
),
approved_invoices AS (
    SELECT 
        lb.acct_number,
        lb.ban_can,
        lb.invoice_number,
        lb.create_user,
        lb.bill_day,
        lb.invoice_status,
        lb.due_date,
        lb.bill_date,
        lb.total_amount,
        lb.balance_due,
        lb.business_unit,
        lb.customer_type,
        va.dunning_state,
        va.dunning_step,
        coalesce ((case when sa.ssp_autopayenable__c = true then 'Y' else 'N' end), 'N') as is_autpay_enabled_in_sf
    FROM 
        "dvsum-s3-glue-prod"."lla_bill_run_details_report" lb
        left join  "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".salesforce_autopay  sa on lb.ban_can = sa.pr_mobile_billing_number__c
         left join  "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_ariafinal_accounts va on va.client_acct_id = lb.ban_can
    WHERE 
        invoice_status = 'Approved'
        AND bill_date = (SELECT approval_date_str FROM target_date)
                				and due_date = (SELECT due_date_str FROM target_date)
),
autopay_attempts AS (
    SELECT 
        acct_no,
        ban_can,
        payment_date,
        aria_payment_id,
        processor_payment_id,
        transaction_id,
        amount,
        currency,
        payment_method,
        response_code,
        description,
        create_session_type
    FROM 
        "dvsum-s3-glue-prod"."lla_electronic_payment_detail"
    WHERE 
        create_session_type = 'Batch'  
)
,
discrepancy_report as (SELECT 'DQ-0000121' as DQ_No,
    (select count(*) from approved_invoices) no_of_approved_invoices,
	(select count(*) from approved_invoices where balance_due= '0') no_of_approved_invoices_with_zero_due,
    CAST(CURRENT_DATE AS VARCHAR) AS report_date,
    ai.acct_number,
    ai.ban_can,
    ai.is_autpay_enabled_in_sf,
    ai.invoice_number,
    ai.bill_date AS approved_date,
    ai.due_date,
    ai.balance_due AS amount_due,
    CASE 
        WHEN aa.acct_no IS NULL THEN 'No autopay attempt found'
        WHEN aa.description IN ('Approved', 'settled') THEN 'Success'
        ELSE 'Failed'
    END AS result,
    CASE 
        WHEN aa.acct_no IS NULL THEN 'N/A'
        WHEN aa.description IN ('Approved', 'settled') THEN 'N/A'
        ELSE aa.description
    END AS failure_reason,
    aa.response_code,
    aa.payment_method,
    aa.processor_payment_id,
    ai.business_unit,
    ai.customer_type,
    CASE WHEN aa.acct_no IS NULL THEN 0
         WHEN aa.description IN ('Approved', 'settled') THEN 1
         ELSE 0
    END AS is_success,
    CASE WHEN aa.acct_no IS NULL THEN 0
         WHEN aa.description IN ('Approved', 'settled') THEN 0
         ELSE 1
    END AS is_failed,
    CASE WHEN aa.acct_no IS NULL THEN 1
         ELSE 0
    END AS is_no_attempt,
    ai.dunning_state,
    ai.dunning_step,
    case 
         when aa.payment_method = 'Tokenized Credit Card' and aa.description in ('Settlement Pending','Settlement Declined','Settled') then 'Invalid payment Method'
         else  'Valid payment Method'  
    end as payment_discrepancy
FROM 
    approved_invoices ai
 left JOIN 
    autopay_attempts aa ON ai.acct_number = aa.acct_no 
        AND aa.payment_date = ai.due_date
ORDER BY
    CASE 
        WHEN aa.acct_no IS NULL THEN 2  -- No attempt
        WHEN aa.description IN ('Approved', 'settled') THEN 3  -- Success
        ELSE 1  
    END,
    ai.acct_number)select * from discrepancy_report where result <> 'Success' and amount_due <> '0'
and not exists (select 1 from "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".aria_accounts where client_acct_id = ban_can and test_acct_ind = '1');

    sf.device_status                     AS sf_device_status,

Description: INFORMATIONAL: Discrepancy report of the dunning customer with approved invoice with future due date. Custom Query
Custom Query:
WITH parsed AS (
  SELECT
      aa.client_acct_id,
      aa.customer_type,
      aa.acct_status,
      aa.plan_status,
      aa.bill_day,
      TRY(CAST(aa.dunning_state AS INTEGER)) AS dunning_state_i,
      aa.dunning_step,
      br.invoice_number,
      br.due_date,
      br.bill_date,
      br.balance_due,
      TRY(CAST(date_parse(TRIM(br.due_date), '%m-%d-%Y') AS DATE)) AS due_dt,
      TRY(CAST(date_parse(TRIM(br.bill_date), '%m-%d-%Y') AS DATE)) AS bill_dt
  FROM "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_ariafinal_accounts aa
  JOIN "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".lla_bill_run_details_report br
    ON aa.client_acct_id = br.ban_can
)
SELECT
    p.client_acct_id,
    p.customer_type,
    p.acct_status,
    p.plan_status,
    p.balance_due,
    via.autopay_alignment,
    p.bill_day,
    p.dunning_state_i AS dunning_state,
    p.dunning_step,
    p.invoice_number,
    p.due_dt,
    p.bill_dt
FROM parsed p
LEFT JOIN "dvsum-s3-glue-prod".vw_is_autopay_valid via
  ON via.a_bancan = p.client_acct_id
WHERE p.dunning_state_i IS NOT NULL
  AND p.dunning_state_i <> 0
  AND p.due_dt > current_date
  and coalesce (via.autopay_alignment ,'') ='Match: Both Valid'
  order by p.due_dt
